title: ATO NIM'OTU
first_line: Nso, Nso, Nso! Chuku-Okike,  N'isi ututu ayi gabu abu nye Gi.  Nso, Nso, Nos! Onye-ebere,  Ato nim'Otu, Chuku di ngozi.
subtitle: Ha adigh-ezu ike ehihe na abali, nasi, Nso, Nso, Nso
english_hint: Holy, Holy, Holy, Lord God Almighty.
lyrics:
1.
Nso, Nso, Nso! Chuku-Okike,

N'isi ututu ayi gabu abu nye Gi.

Nso, Nso, Nos! Onye-ebere,

Ato nim'Otu, Chuku di ngozi.

2.
Nso, Nso, Nso! Hu nso neto Gi,

Natuda okpu-ha n'iru oche-eze-Gi;

Cherubim na Serafim nada n’iru Gi,

Onye nori, nano, ganogide.

3.
Nso, Nso, Nso! Gi di ebube,

Anya ndi-nmehie apugh ihi; otuto-Gi;

O bu nani I di nso: o digh ony'ozo

Zur’oké n’ike, na ihu-n’anya.

4.
Nso,Nso, Nso! Chuku-Okike,

Olu-Gi dum n'igwé n’uwa geto aha-Gi,

Nso, Nso, Nso! Onye-ebere,

Ato nim'Otu, Chuku di ngozi.   Amen.

title: ATO NIM’OTU
first_line: Nso, Nso, Nso Chuku  Eze di mgb’ebigh-ebi,  Ony’igwé n’uwa neto;  Ndi-m’ozi nabu abu,  Neto mgbe ebigh-ebi  Triniti nke di ngozi.
subtitle: Nso, nso, nso, ka Jehova . . . di.
english_hint: Aisaia 6. 3. Holy, Holy, Holy, Lord God of hosts.
lyrics:
1.
Nso, Nso, Nso Chuku

Eze di mgb’ebigh-ebi,

Ony’igwé n’uwa neto;

Ndi-m’ozi nabu abu,

Neto mgbe ebigh-ebi

Triniti nke di ngozi.

2.
Gi kere ihe nile,

Na Gi ka ha nadi ndu,

Gi nwe nsopuru nile;

Ihe nile neto Gi.

Neto mgbe ebigh-ebi

Triniti nke di ngozi.

3.
Cherubim na Serafim

Ji nku-ha kpuch’iru-ha,

Otu nazu ibe-ya

Si, Nso, Nso, Nso;

Neto mgbe ebigh-ebi

Triniti nke di ngozi.

4.
Aleluya! ayi neto

Nna, n’Okpara na Mo Nso,

Ato nim’Otu di nso;

Ayi soro usu nd'igwé

Neto mgbe ebigh-ebi

Triniti nke di ngozi. Amen.

title: ATO NIM'OTU
first_line: Nna nk’igwé, Nke hur’ayi n'anya,  We cheputar’ayi ngbaputa,  Ayi nd’ojo gburu I ikpere;  Biko, gbaghar'ayi njo nile.
subtitle: N'ihi na ndi ahu ndi nagba ama, di Ato.
english_hint: 1 Jon 6. 8. Father of heaven, whose love Profound.
lyrics:
1.
Nna nk’igwé, Nke hur’ayi n'anya,

We cheputar’ayi ngbaputa,

Ayi nd’ojo gburu I ikpere;

Biko, gbaghar'ayi njo nile.

2.
Okpara, Okwu Chineke,

Onye-ngbaputa, n’Eze-ayi,

Ayi nd’ojo gburu I ikpere;

Wer’amara-Gi zoput’ayi.

3.
Mo Nso nke neme nkpur’obi

K’o puta na njo na onwu,

Ayi nd’ojo gburu I ikpere;

Nye ayi ike nke ndu ohu.

4.
Jehova . . . Nna, Okpara, Mo . . . .

Chineke, Ato, nim’Otu,

Ayi nd'ojo gburu I ikpere:

Gbaghara nmehie, nye ayi idu. Amen.

title: ATO NIM'OTU
first_line: Chineke Nna nk'igwe,  Onye bi nim’ihe,  Ony’ebube.  Ihé nenwu nk’uku  Ihu-n’anya d’ike,  Ony’anahugh anya,    Ayi neto Gi.
subtitle: Onye nagagh-atu oqwu, Onye-nwe-ayi, to kwa aha-Gi
english_hint: Father of heaven above.
lyrics:
1.
Chineke Nna nk'igwe,

Onye bi nim’ihe,

Ony’ebube.

Ihé nenwu nk’uku

Ihu-n’anya d’ike,

Ony’anahugh anya,

  Ayi neto Gi.

2.
Chineke Qkpara,

Kraist Onye ghor'aru,

Onye-nzota.

Onye no n’aka nri

Nna nke di ebube,

Qnu-nekwuru-ayi,

Ayi neto Gi

3.
Chineke, Mo di nso,

Onye nenye ayi ndu,

Onye-nkasi.

Mo nke amam-ihe,

N’ihu-n’anya n’ike,

Onyinye nke igwé,

Ayi neto Gi

4.
Madu nile n’uwa

Soro usu nk’igwé

To aha-Ya.

Otuto diri Gi,

Ato nime Otu,

Rue mgbe ebigh-ebi

Chuku di nso.   Amen

title: ATO NIM'OTU
first_line: Chineke Nna zite ngozi  Nye ayi, ndi zukQrQ n’ebe a;  Le ayi, anya n’ihu-n’anya,  Bu umu nasopuru Gi.
subtitle: N'ebe nhu ka Jehova nyere ngozi ahu iwu
english_hint: "Abu Qma 133. 3." Command Thy blessing from above.
lyrics:
1.
Chineke Nna zite ngozi

Nye ayi, ndi zukQrQ n’ebe a;

Le ayi, anya n’ihu-n’anya,

Bu umu nasopuru Gi.

2.
Kraist Qkpara zite. ngozi,

Kwe k’ayi so uzo-Gi n'ezie;

Me k’Okwu-Gi -ba n'obi-ayi,

Nye ayi ike nke ndu ohu.

3.
Mo nke di nso zite ngozi,

Wer’ike-Gi mej’u1o nka;

Mukwasi ndi di um'a1a,

Kpughere ha amara-Gi.

4.
Chineke, Ato nim’Otu

Nna na Qkpara na Mo Nso,

Eb'ayi nario I n’otu obi,

K'ayi fegide Gi mgbe' nile.   Amen.

title: ATO NIM'OTU
first_line: Nna di nso,  nur’olum;  Gi bu Onye-nzotam;  Nanom nso mgbe nile,  Gi  Onye-amara.
subtitle: Chinekem ka I bu, anamachosi Gi ike.
english_hint: Abu Oma 63. 1. Holy Father, hear me.
lyrics:
1.
Nna di nso,  nur’olum;

Gi bu Onye-nzotam;

Nanom nso mgbe nile,

Gi  Onye-amara.

2.
Jisus, Onye-nwe-ayi,

Eze indu n'ebube,

Ka mgbe ahu bia ngwa,

Mgbe m’gada n’iru, Gi

3.
Mo Nso, Onye-nkasi,

Nke bi nime obim,

Mazuru nkpam nile,

Doruem nso I, mem nke-Gi.

4.
Nso, Nso, Nso,

Bia, arapukwalam;

N’obim nke di ala,

K'I gebi mgbe nile. Amen.

title: ATO NIM'OTU
first_line: Le k'obi'ahu gesi di'ocha  Nke nabia n'iru Gi;  Nelekwasi ihé nso-Gi,  Nanuri Qnu n’obi'uto  N'iru Gi, Chineke.
subtitle: Onye... nebi nime ihe nke anapugh ibiaru nso
english_hint: "1 Tim. 6. 18." Eternal Light! Eternal Light!
lyrics:
1.
Le k'obi'ahu gesi di'ocha

Nke nabia n'iru Gi;

Nelekwasi ihé nso-Gi,

Nanuri Qnu n’obi'uto

N'iru Gi, Chineke.

2.
Mo ndi no nso och'eze-Gi

Nenwe Qnu ahu;

O bu nani ha mara ya,

Ebe ha namagh kwa nmehie,

Ha adagh kwa ada.

3.
M'gesi ana, mu b’onye-njo,

Ony'obi gbachiri,

Bia n'iru Ya, Nke di egwu,

Mo nkem gesi ana hu Ya;

Ih'anekegh eke!

4.
Uzo di ayi gesi bilie

Ba nim'Ihé ahu;

Otu Aja nke zur'ezu,

Ike Mo Nso 0ny'amara,

Qnu-nekwuru-ayl.

5.
O bu ndia nakwadebe ayi

bu ebe-nso-Gi,

Umu ochichiri na njo

Gedi n'ihe ebigh-ebi

Site n'ihe-n'anya-I. Amen.

title: CHINEKE NNA
first_line: Chineke di mma; n'el'igwe,  N’akuku nile nke uwa,  K’otutu olu naza, si,  Chuku, Onye ker’ayi, di uma.
subtitle: Uwa juputara n’ebere Jehova.
english_hint: Abu Oma 33. 5. Yes, God is good; in earth and sky
lyrics:
1.
Chineke di mma; n'el'igwe,

N’akuku nile nke uwa,

K’otutu olu naza, si,

Chuku, Onye ker’ayi, di uma.

2.
Anyanwu nke nag’ije-ya,

Namus’ihe nile n’uwa,

Usu mbara nke el’igwe,

Ha dum nasi, Chuku di nma.

3.
Umu-nnunu ndi ji onu

Nabu abu-ha kw’ubochi:

Miri-ozuzo n’ikuku

Nekwu nwayo: Chuku di nma.

4.
Anurum ya nim’ok’ohia,

N'el'ugwu na osimiri;

Ha nile nesoye n’abu,

Nekwus’ike: Chuku di nma.

5.
Ihe nile ekére'éké

Nekwu si, Chineke di nma;

Madu j’onu neto s'ike,

Naza n’abu: Chuku di nma.

6.
yi neso ihe dum nk'uwa

Neto Gi, Onye-amara;

Ma nke ka, n’ihi Jisus Kraist,

Ka ayi gasi; Chuku di nma! Amen.

title: CHINEKE NNA.
first_line: Chuk'Ony'Okike    Nke uwa n'el’igwe,  Onye ker'anyanwu,  Nelekotam.
subtitle: Le, i werewo nehegbu a nile ehegbu onwe-gi bayere ayi
english_hint: 2 Ndi Eze 4. 13 God, who made the north.
lyrics:
1.
Chuk'Ony'Okike
  
Nke uwa n'el’igwe,

Onye ker'anyanwu,

Nelekotam.

2.
Onye ker'ohia,

Osisi na nkpuru,

Ehihie n'abali,

Nelekotam.

3.
Onye ker'anwu,

Qnwa na kpakpando,

Mgb'ahuhu biara, O

Gelekotam.

4.
Ya ziri Nwa-Ya

K'O nwua na Kalvari;

Ma m'dabere Ya, O

Gelekotam.

5.
Mgbe m'ruru n'igwé,

Ma hu ndi-eyi-Ya,

M'geso ndi nag bua: O

Lekotaram!   Amen.

title: OCHINEKE NNA
first_line: NAbu nke ndi-m'ozi nada  N’och'eze-I mgbe dum;  Okpukpo-ubo ndi-m'e  Enwegh iz'ike;  Ha di ndu nani igozi I,  N'ikwuputa I  Nna nk'ike.
subtitle: O onwe gi kére ihe nile, o bu kwa n'ihi ochecho Gi ka ha diri, eké-kwa-ra ha éké
english_hint: Nkpughe 4. 11. Angel voise, ever singing.
lyrics:
1.
NAbu nke ndi-m'ozi nada

N’och'eze-I mgbe dum;

Okpukpo-ubo ndi-m'e

Enwegh iz'ike;

Ha di ndu nani igozi I,

N'ikwuputa I

Nna nk'ike.

2.
Gi Nke bi n’ebe di anya

Kari k’ayi gahu;

O gabu na I nege nti

N'abu ndi-nmehie?

Ayi pur'ima n'I no nso ayi,

N'I ganu ayi?

E, n'ezie!

3.
E, ayi mara n'I nanuri

N’olu-Gi ni1e;

I ker’aka, n’olu na nti,

Inyé I otuto;

Olu ndi-nka, n’olu abu,

Jikoronu

Ito Gi.

4.
Chuku, n’ulo-Gi k'ayi neche

Ihe-Gi n'iru I

Ayi ji ekwesigh-ekwesi

Newetara Gi

Obi, n’uche, n'aka n'olu,

N’abu-ayi a'lke

Kasi nma

5.
Nnasopuru, otuto n'ike

Gabu nke-I mgbe

Nna, na Okpara, na Mo Nso

Ato nim'Otu

Ihe kasi mma nk'I nyere,

Uwa n’igwé

Nenye Gi.

title: CHINEKE OKPARA
first_line: Aha Jisus di ok’uto  Na nti Onye kwere,  Q nakasi ya n’ahuhu,  Nachupu egwu-ya.
subtitle: Aha ahu nke kariri aha nile o bula elu
english_hint: Ndi Filipai 2. 9. How sweet the name of Jesus sounds.
lyrics:
1.
Aha Jisus di ok’uto

Na nti Onye kwere,

Q nakasi ya n’ahuhu,

Nachupu egwu-ya.

2.
O nagwo Qria nkpur'obi,

Najur’obi nsogbu;

O bu nri nke Onye-agu,

Nenye izu-ike.

3.
Nkume ebei m’wuru ulom,

Qtam n’Ebe-ngbabam;

Ulo-akum di mgbe nile,

Juputa n'amara.

4.
Jisus, Eyim, Onye nazum,

Ezem, Ony'ozizim,

Onye-nwem, na Ndum na Uzom,

Nar'otuto m'ji bia.

5.
Obim jiker'ike adigh,

Echichem jur'oyi;

Ma mgbe m’gahu Gi k'I si di,

Aghaghm itbzui Gi.

6.
Ka m'kwusa ihu-n'anya-Gi.

Site n’ikem nile;

K'Aha-Gi nke tokar'uto

Nye obim ndu n'onwu.   Amen.

title: CHINEKE OKPARA
first_line: N’Aha nke Kraist Jisus  K'ora gb'ikpere,  Ire dum kwuputa  Eze nk’otuto;  O nate Nna uto  K'ayi kpo Y'Onye-nw'ayi,  Onye site na mbu  Bur’Okwu d’ike.
subtitle: N'Aha. Jisus ka ikpere nile we abue n'ala.
english_hint: Ndi Filipei 2. 10. At the name of Jesus.
lyrics:
1.
N’Aha nke Kraist Jisus

K'ora gb'ikpere,

Ire dum kwuputa

Eze nk’otuto;

O nate Nna uto

K'ayi kpo Y'Onye-nw'ayi,

Onye site na mbu

Bur’Okwu d’ike.

2.
O si n’igwé we bia

K’O we nwe Aha

N’onu ndi-njo nile,

Ndi nke O biara.

O bur’Aha ahu

Nke nenwegh ntupo,

Weta Ya na nmeri

N’ilugbu onwu.

3.
Umu-nnem, tue Y’aha

Nim’ihu-n’anya,

Ma me ya n’it’egwu,

N’obi di'um'ala;

O b’Onye-nzoputa,

Jisus Onye-nw’ayi

Ony’ora ganefe

Nenye nsopuru.

4.
Me Ya Eze n'obi;

Kwe ka O chupu

Ihe dum nadigh nso.

Na ihe b’ugha;

Me Ya Onye-isi

N’oge onwunwa;

K’uche-Ya dur’unu

N’ike na ihé.

5.
Umu-nnem, Jisus a

Gabia kwa ozo

N'otuto nke Nna-Ya,

N’usu ndi-m'ozi;

Okpu-eze nile

Ha gabu nke-Ya;

Obi-ayi gakpo Ya;

Eze nk’ptuto. Amen.

title: CHINEKE NNA.
first_line: Gi bu Uzo-O bu na Gi  K’ayi nagbanari njo;  Onye o bu1a gacho Nna,  Gacho Ya nime Gi.
subtitle: Aha ahu nke kariri aha nile o bula elu
english_hint: Ndi Filipai 2. 9. How sweet the name of Jesus sounds.
lyrics:
1.
Gi bu Uzo-O bu na Gi

K’ayi nagbanari njo;

Onye o bu1a gacho Nna,

Gacho Ya nime Gi.

2.
Gi b’Ezi-okwu-okwu-Gi

Nenye amam-ihe;

Gi nwer'ike inye uche,

Me k’obi di ocha.

3.
Gi b'ezi Ndu-nbilite-Gi

Nekwusa nmeri-Gi;

Ndi tukwasiri Gi obi

Gagbanari Qnwu.

4.
Gi b'Uzo, Ez'okwu, na Ndu;

K'ayi mar'Uzo ahu,

Jid'Ez'okwu, nwe Ndu ahu,

N'onu ebigh-ebi.   Amen.

title: CHINEKE OKPARA
first_line: Jisus, uwem di ebube  B'ez'omume n’obara-Gi;  Mgbe uwa nile gagb’oku,  Agamanuri  kwa onu
subtitle: Jehova bu ezi omume-ayi.
english_hint: Jer. 23. 6. Jesus, Thy blood and righteousness.
lyrics:
1.
Jisus, uwem di ebube

B'ez'omume n’obara-Gi;

Mgbe uwa nile gagb’oku,

Agamanuri  kwa onu

2.
Ndu na onwu enwegh ike

Imebi uw'ebube nkem;

Uwe oma Jisus nenye

Nadi ohu rue mgbe nile

3.
Mgbe m'si n’onwu, bilie ije

N'ulo omam di n’el’igwe;

Mgb’ahu, ngopum nile gabu:

Jisus di ndu, nwu kwa n’ihim.

4.
N'uboch’ahu m’gagh-at’ujo,

Onye pur'ibom ebubo?

Obara Jisus newepu

Nkpocha, n'ihere nke nmchiem.

5.
Ka ndi nwur’anwu nur’olu-I;

Jisus, gwa ndi nke-Gi nuria;

Obara-I n'ezi-omume-I

Bu uwe ebube nke ha.

6.
Chuku nk'ihu-n’anya n’ike,

Kwe k’uwa mara ebere-I

Ka okwu nke-Gi gbasa kwa.

Meri onwu na oku~mo. Amen.

youtube_options.title: 177 SDA Hymn - Jesus, Your Blood and Righteousness (Singing w/ Lyrics)

title: CHINEKE OKPARA
first_line: Jisus, Onye biri  n'igwé,  Ridatara gho madu nwua;  Nim°Akwukwo Nso k'ayi gahu  Aha madu oma O bu.
subtitle: Onye jeghariri nalu olu oma.
english_hint: Olu Ndi Ozi 10. 33. Jesus, who lived above the sky.
lyrics:
1.
Jisus, Onye biri  n'igwé,

Ridatara gho madu nwua;

Nim°Akwukwo Nso k'ayi gahu

Aha madu oma O bu.

2.
O nejeghari neme nma,

Nemeghe anya ndi-isi;

Ndi nari’oria na, ndi-ngwuro

O mekwa aru-ha d’ike.

3.
Nke kari nka O gwara ha

Ihe nke Chineke nacho;

O bu kwa  Onye-omiko,

O nege nti olu nwata.

4.
Ma O nwuru onwu ojo,

Akpogburu Ya n’osisi;

Aka-Ya O ji neme nma

Ka ha kpogidere n’obe.

5.
Ma Akwukwo Nso koro ayi

Ihe kpatara onwu-Ya;

O  biara gho  madu, ma nwua

K’ewe  gbaghara nmehie-ayi.

6.
Chuku gaghara ndi nario,

Nachos'ike  ipu na njo;

K’ayi choba  iru-Ya ngwa ngwa,

We ket’oké n’ebere-Ya; Amen.

title: CHINEKE OKPARA
first_line: Onye-ngbaputam di kwa ndu;  Okwu nka neny’ezi ohu!  O di ndu, Qnye nwururi;  Ezem mgb’ebigh-ebi di ndu.
subtitle: Mu onwem amawo na Onye-ngbaputam di ndu
english_hint: Job. 19. 25. I know that my Redeemer lives.

title: OMUMU JISUS
first_line: Ge nti! ndi-m'ozi nabu  Neto Ez’amur'ohu;  Udo di n'e1u' uwa,  Chuku na ndi-njo edo!  Nuria onu mba nile,  Soro n’onu nke igwé;  Igwe na ala nasi,  Ta k’amuru Jisus Kraist.
subtitle: N'ihi na amuworo ayi otu nwa, otu nwa-nwoke ka enyeworo ayi.
english_hint: Aisaia 9. 6. Hark! the herald angels sing.
lyrics:
1.
Ge nti! ndi-m'ozi nabu

Neto Ez’amur'ohu;

Udo di n'e1u' uwa,

Chuku na ndi-njo edo!

Nuria onu mba nile,

Soro n’onu nke igwé;

Igwe na ala nasi,

Ta k’amuru Jisus Kraist.

2.
Kraist, Onye nd'igwé Kraist.

Kraist, Eze  ebigh-ebi naja;

Na mgbe nke-Ya k'O biara,

Nwa nke Agbogho di nso.

Le, Chuku yiri aru;

To Onye ghoto madu;

O toro Y'igho madu;

Jisus Kraist, Immanuel.

3.
Kelenu Eze udo,

Kel'Onye-ez'omume;

Ihe na Ndu k’O ji bia,

Nagwo oria madu dum.

O rapur’ebube-Ya,

Bia ka madu ghar'inwu,

Ka madu nile bilie,

Ka amukwa ha ohu.

4.
Bia, Onye mba dum nacho.

Biri nime ayi nile;

Bilie, Nkpuru nke nwayi,

Chifia isi nke Agwo.

Hichap'onyinyo Adam.

Tiyechie onyinyo-Gi;

Nye madu dum Onwe-Gi,

Kpua Onwe-Gi n'obi-ayi.   Amen.

youtube_options.title: Hark! the Herald Angels Sing | Charles Wesley || DAY 89: Hymns of Worship (#100HOW)

title: ONWU JISUS
first_line: Ndi Kraist, teta, kel'utut'ona nka,  Mgbe amur'Onye-nzoputa nk'uwa;  Bilie, to ihu-n'anya Chineke,  Nke ndi-m’ozi si n'el'igwe neto;  Ha bu uzo zi ozi om'ahu;  Na Nwa Chineke ghoro Nwa madu.
subtitle: Le, amamezi unu ozi oma nke oke onu.
english_hint: Luk 2. 10. Christians, awake
lyrics:
1.
Ndi Kraist, teta, kel'utut'ona nka,

Mgbe amur'Onye-nzoputa nk'uwa;

Bilie, to ihu-n'anya Chineke,

Nke ndi-m’ozi si n'el'igwe neto;

Ha bu uzo zi ozi om'ahu;

Na Nwa Chineke ghoro Nwa madu.

2.
Mgbe anu ndi neche aturu-ha

Nur'olu otu m'ozi si h: "Le,

Ewetaram unu ozi oma

Na amur’unu Onye-nzoputa.

Chineke emezuwo nkwa-Ya ta

Ta k’amuru Onye-nzoputa, Kraist."

3.
O kwusia; ma, le, ndi-abu nk'igwe

Ji onu b’abu akanugh na mbu,

Neto ihu-n’anya nke Chineke,

Haleluya-ha juputa igwé;

Otuto Chineke bu abu-ha,

Udo di n'uwa n'etiti madu.

4.
Ndi-nch’aturu jere na Betlehem

Ihu ih'ebube Chuku mere;

Ha hu Josef, na Meri di ngozi,

Na Nwa o muru, bu Onye-nwe-ayi;

Ha we ko akuke ebube nka,

Buru nd'ozi mbu nke Nw'ohu ahu.

5.
O kwesir'ayi, dika ndi-nch'aturu,

Ij’ekele zisa oz'oma nka

Soro Jisus, b'Onye-ngbaputa-ayi,

Site n'omumu-Ya rue n'onwu-Ya;

Neso nzo-ukwu-Ya n’ike nke Ya,

Rue mgbe ayi genwe onodu n'igwe.

6.
Mgb'ahu n'etiti ndi bi n'el'igwe,

Ayi gabu abu onu ngbaputa

Onye amuru ta geme k'ayi hu

Ebube-Ya buruburu ayi dum;

Ayi gabu abu mgbe ebigh-ebi,

Neto Eze ndi-m’ozi na madu. Amen.

title: OMUMU JISUS
first_line: Bianu, nd'okwukwe,  N'onu nke di uku,  Bianu, bianu, k’ayi je rue Bethlehem;  L’Eze ndi-m'ozi,  Nke amuru n’uwa;  Bianu' k’ayi sopuru Ya,  Bianu, k’ayi sopuru Ya,  Bianu, kfayi sopuru Ya, bu Eze Kraist.
subtitle: Ka ayi je rue Betlehem ugbu a,
english_hint: Luk 2. 15. Oh come, all yé faithful, joyful and triumphant.
lyrics:
1.
Bianu, nd'okwukwe,

N'onu nke di uku,

Bianu, bianu, k’ayi je rue Bethlehem;

L’Eze ndi-m'ozi,

Nke amuru n’uwa;

Bianu' k’ayi sopuru Ya,

Bianu, k’ayi sopuru Ya,

Bianu, kfayi sopuru Ya, bu Eze Kraist.

2.
Chuku, Nwa Chuku,

Ihé ebigh-ebi,

Le, O leligh afo nke Nw'agbogho;

Ezi Chineke,

Nke anekégh éké;

Bianu, k’ayi sopuru Ya,

Bianu, k’ayi sopuru Ya,

Bianu, k’ay1 sqpuru Ya, bu Eze Kraist.

3.
Nd'abd ndi-m’ozi,

Buanu n’oke Qnu,

Buanu, unu ndi nile bi n'igwé;

Otuto diri

Chineke n’el’igwe;

Bianu, k’ayi sopuru Ya,

Bianu, k’ayi sopuru Ya,

Bianu, k'ayi sopuru Ya, bu Eze Kraist.

4.
Ayi Skele Gi,

Onye amuru ta;

Jisus, otuto nile diri Gi;

Okwu Chineke,

Onye ghoro madu;

Bianu, k’ayi sopuru Ya,

Biahu, k’ayi sqpuru Ya,

Biarm, k'ayi Sqpurp Ya, bu Eze Kraist.   Amen.

title: OMUMU JISUS
first_line: Onye no n'ulo anu,  Ndi-nche nada n'ukwu-Ya?
subtitle: Ejiwo eube na nsopuru kpube Ya n'isi dika okpu eze
english_hint: Ndi Hibru 2. 9. Who is He in yonder stall?
lyrics:
1.
Onye no n'ulo anu,

Ndi-nche nada n'ukwu-Ya?

2.
Onye no nim'ahuhu,

Nebu onu nim'ohia?

3.
Onye k'ora nagozi,

N'ihi- okwu oma-Ya?

4.
Onye ka ha kutere

Nd oria na ndi ner'uju?

5.
Onye guzo nakw’akwa

Na nso ili Lazarus?

6.
Onye k'ora nekele,
 
Neto Ya n’abu onu?

7.
Onye nekpere Chuku

N'ogige Getsemani?

8.
Onye no n'elu obe

Nanwu n'ok'ihe-nwuta?

9.
Onye si nime ili

Puta k'O yer'ayi aka?

10.
Onye n'och’eze-Ya,

Buru Eze uwa dum?   Amen.

title: ONWU JISUS
first_line: Dika nd’ochie ji onu  Hu kpakpando dura ha;  Wer'onu so ihé-ya,  Nk'o ji nedu ha n’uzo;  Kwe, Nn'ayi, ka esi otu a  Duru ayi biakute Gi.
subtitle: Mgbe ha huru kpakpando ahu ha we duria oke onu nke-uku.
english_hint: Metiu 2. 10. As with gladness men of old.
lyrics:
1.
Dika nd’ochie ji onu

Hu kpakpando dura ha;

Wer'onu so ihé-ya,

Nk'o ji nedu ha n’uzo;

Kwe, Nn'ayi, ka esi otu a

Duru ayi biakute Gi.

2.
Otu ha ji onu ga

We rue n’ebe Jisus no;

Gbue ikpere n'iru Ya,

Ony’igwe n'uwa neto;

Otu a me ka ukwu-ayi

Ga rue och’ebere-Gi.

3.
Otu ha nyer'onyinye

Nke di ok'onu-ahia;

Otu a k’ayi were onu,

Nke njo n’aghugho nadigh

Weta aku-ayi nile,

Nye Gi, Kraist, Eze nke-ayi.

4.
Jisus di nso, kw’ubochi

Deb’ayi n’uzo nkpagide;

Mgbe ihe uwa gafe,

Kpobat’obi-ayi n’ebe

Kpakpando agagh-edu,

Eb'ebube-Gi nenwu.

5.
N’obodo oma nk’igwé

Ha achogh ihe nk'uwa;

Gi b’lhe na Qnu-ya,

Gi Anwu namu mgbe dum;

N'eb'ahu ayi ganabu,

Neto Ez’ayi mgbe nile. Amen.

title: ONWU JISUS
first_line: Abali nso, nke di kwa ju!  Mgbe uwa no n’ura,  Meri na Josef no n’ulo anu  Neche Nwa ohu nk’ahuru n'anya,  No n’ura udo igwé,  No n’ura udo igwé.
subtitle: Ta n’obudo Devid ka amuru nye unu Onye-nzoputa.
english_hint: Luk 2. ll. Still the night, holy the night.
lyrics:
1.
Abali nso, nke di kwa ju!

Mgbe uwa no n’ura,

Meri na Josef no n’ulo anu

Neche Nwa ohu nk’ahuru n'anya,

No n’ura udo igwé,

No n’ura udo igwé.

2.
Abali nso, nke di kwa ju!

Ndi nazu aturu-ha

Huru ihé-oma n’igwé,

Nu Ka ndi-m’ozi nabu, si:-

"Onye-ngbaputa biara!

Onye-ngbaputa biara!"

3.
Abili nso, nke di kwa ju!

Nwa Chineke oma,

Iru-Gi negos'ihu-n’anya!

Nye ayi amara n’oge d’ugbu a,

Gi  Onye~nzoputa,

Gi Onye-nzoputa. Amen.

title: OMUMU JISUS
first_line: Unu ndi-m'ozi nke igwé,  Fesanu n’uwa nile;  Ndi kor’akuko okiké,  Kwusanu omumu Kraist:  Bianu, kele  Eze amuru ohu.
subtitle: Ka ndi mo-ozi nile nke Chineke kpo kwa isi ala nye Ya.
english_hint: Ndi Hibru 1. 6. Angela, from the realms of glory.
lyrics:
1.
Unu ndi-m'ozi nke igwé,

Fesanu n’uwa nile;

Ndi kor’akuko okiké,

Kwusanu omumu Kraist:

Bianu, kele

Eze amuru ohu.

2.
Ndi-nche-aturu no n’ohia,

Nech'aturu n’abali;

Chineke noyere madu,

Ihé Nwa ohu nenwu:

Bianu, kele

Eze amuru ohu.

3.
Ndi-amam-ihe bilienu,

Ihé nenwu  n'ir’unu;

Chonu Onye mba-dum-nacho,

Lenu kpakpando ahu:

Bianu, kele

Eze amuru ohu.

4.
Ndi nso neche n’iru Chuku

N’olile-anya n’egwu;

Na mberede Jisus abia,

Agahu Ya n’ulo-Ya;

Bianu, kele

Eze amuru ohu. Amen.

title: OMUMU JISUS
first_line: Gi rar’och’eze-I na okpu-eze-I  K’I biara n’uwa nka n’ihim;  Ma o digh ulo di na Betlehem  Ebe agamu Gi, Jisus.  Biko, bia nim'obim, Jisus!  Onodu diri Gi n'obim.
subtitle: O bu ezie na O bu ogaranya, ma O ghoro ogbaye n’ihi unu.
english_hint: 2 Ndi Korint 8. 9. Thou didst leave Thy throne.
lyrics:
1.
Gi rar’och’eze-I na okpu-eze-I

K’I biara n’uwa nka n’ihim;

Ma o digh ulo di na Betlehem

Ebe agamu Gi, Jisus.

Biko, bia nim'obim, Jisus!

Onodu diri Gi n'obim.

2.
Igwé dar’uda n'olu ndi-m'ozi

Nekwusa na Gi bu Eze;

Ma nway’ogbeye muru Gi n’uwa,

N’onodu d'ala k'I biara.

Biko, bia nim'obim, Jisus!

Qnodu diri Gi n'obim.

3.
Anu nez’ike, nnunu nwe akwu

Na ndo osisi ok'ohia;

M'ala b'ihe-ndina-Gi, Nwa Chuku,

N'ozara di na Galili.

Biko, bia nim'obim, Jisus!

Onodu diri Gi n'obim.

4.
Gi, Onye-nwe-ayi, ji Okwu ndu dia,

Nke gazoputa umu-Gi;

Ma n’ikwa-emo na okpu ogwu

K'eji duga I na Kalvari.

Biko, bia nim’obim, Jisus!

Onwu-Gi bu kwa nzoputa.

5.
Mgb'igwe dar'uda, ma ndu'abu-ya bua

N'obibia nke-Gi na nmeri

K’Olu-Gi kpom, si "Onodu di kwa-

Onodu diri  i n’akukum."

Onu geju obim, Jisus,

Mgbe I gabia ikporom la. Amen.

title: OMUMU JISUS
first_line: Onu juru obi-ayi ta;  Amuru Nwa Eze:  Usu ndi-m’ozi nanuri  N’ih'obibia-Ya ta.
subtitle: Ha gakpo kwa aha-Ya Immamuel.
english_hint: Matiu 1. 23. Joy fill our inmost heart to-day.
lyrics:
1.
Onu juru obi-ayi ta;

Amuru Nwa Eze:

Usu ndi-m’ozi nanuri

N’ih'obibia-Ya ta.

2.
Ayi negbu ikpere nye Ya

Neto, nasopuru,

Mgbe ayi huru Gi n’aka nne-I,

Gi Nwa nke Chineke.

3.
Gi Ihe anekegh eke,

Mukwas’ayi, Nwa di nso

K'ayi deb,ubochi-Qmumu-I,

Neté I n'obi-ocha.   Amen.

title: OMUMU JISUS
first_line: Otu mgbe n'obodo Devid  Otu ulo anu di  Eb'otu nwayi nyibere  Nwa-ya o muru ohu,  Meri bu nne om'ahu.  Jisus Kraist bu Nwa nke-ya.
subtitle: Jisus we naga n'iru n'amam-ihe na ogologo, naga, kwa, n'amara n’ebe Chineke na, madu no.
english_hint: Luk 2. 52. Once in royal David’s city.
lyrics:
1.
Otu mgbe n'obodo Devid

Otu ulo anu di

Eb'otu nwayi nyibere

Nwa-ya o muru ohu,

Meri bu nne om'ahu.

Jisus Kraist bu Nwa nke-ya.

2.
O si n'igwé rida n'uwa,

Onye bu Chineke-ayi;

Ulo anu zere Ya ndo,

O dina n’ebe ahu;

Nd'ogbeye ndi di ala

Ka Jisus~ayi biyere.

3.
Mgbe nile O di na nwata

O ji nsopuru nanu

Okwu nwayi nke-muru Ya,

Nke kuru Ya n'aka-ya;

Umu-nta Jisus geme

Ez'omume dika Ya.

4.
Ya bu Onye ayi genomi,

O toto dik'ayi si'eto,

O dichasi otu ayi di,

O mara akwa n’ochi;

Nwuta-ayi newuta Ya,

Onu-ayi bu kwa nke-Ya.

5.
M’emesia any'ayi gahu Ya,

Site n'ihu n'anya-Ya;

N'ihi na Nwata oma nka

Bu Eze-ayi n‘el'igwe;

O nedu umu nke-Ya

We rue n’eb’ahu O no. Amen.

title: OMUMU JISUS
first_line: Ezi ndi Kraist. nuria  N'olu na nkpur'obi!  Ge nti n’ihe ayi nekwu;  Ozi!  Ta k'amuru Jisus Kraist,  An'ulo da n'ukwu-Ya  O no n'ulo-anu ugbu a;  Ta k’amuru Kraist.
subtitle: Nna-ayi ezitewo Okpara-Ya ka O buru Onye-nzoputa nke uwa
english_hint: 1 Jon 4. 14. Good Christian men rejoice.
lyrics:
1.
Ezi ndi Kraist. nuria

N'olu na nkpur'obi!

Ge nti n’ihe ayi nekwu;

Ozi!

Ta k'amuru Jisus Kraist,

An'ulo da n'ukwu-Ya

O no n'ulo-anu ugbu a;

Ta k’amuru Kraist.

2.
Ezi ndi Kraist, nuria

N'olu na nkpur'obi!

Akuk’onu mgbe nile;

Onu!

Ya mere ka Kraist ji bia:

O meghew'uzo igwé,

Madu b’onye agoziri:

Ya mor'O ji bia.

3.
Ezi ndi Kraist, nuria

N’olu na nkpur'obi!

Uj’onwu adigh ozo:

Udo!

Jisus Kraist biar’izota,

Nakpo ayi n’otu n’otu

Ir’ulo ebigh-ebi-Ya!

O biar’izota. Amen.

title: ONWU JISUS
first_line: Mgbe m'nele anya n'osisi  Ebe Eze nke ndu nwuru,  Uru akum na nganga nken,  Agurum ha n’ihe-efu.
subtitle: Ma Chineke ekwela, ka m'nya isi, ma-obugh n'obe Onye-nwe-ayi Jisus Kraist
english_hint: Ndi Galetia 6. 14.. When I Survey the wonderous cross
lyrics:
1.
Mgbe m'nele anya n'osisi

Ebe Eze nke ndu nwuru,

Uru akum na nganga nken,

Agurum ha n’ihe-efu.

2.
Chuku, ekwelam nya isi

M,obugh n'onwu Kraist, Onye-nwem;

Ih’efu nke natom uto,

Arapuwom ha n’ihi Ya.

3.
Le, Site n’aru-Ya nile

Ihu-n'anya nerudata;

O di mgbe eji ogwu me

Okpu-eze di nma otu a?

4.
Ma uwa nile buru nkem,

O zugh inye Ya onyinye

Ihu-n'anya d’uku otu a

Kwesiri inwe ndum nile.   Amen.

title: ONWU JISUS
first_line: Ugwu di n’ebe di anya,  N’azu ot'obodo,  Ebe akpogburu Jisus,  Nke nwuru n'ihi ayi.
subtitle: Ha we dupu Ya ka ha kpogide Ya n'obe
english_hint: Mak 15. 20. There is a green hill far away.
lyrics:
1.
Ugwu di n’ebe di anya,

N’azu ot'obodo,

Ebe akpogburu Jisus,

Nke nwuru n'ihi ayi.

2.
Ayi apugh iko akuko

Ihe-nwuta nke-Ya;

Ayi kwere n’o bu n’ihi ayi

K’O huru ahuhu.

3.
O nwuru k'agbaghara ayi,

K’ayi we gho ndi oma,

K’ayi la n’igwé n’ikpe-azu,

N’ike obara-Ya.

4.
O digh onye ozo puru

Ikwu ugwo nke njo;

Nani Ya pur"imegh'uzo

Nke igwé, k’ayi bata;

5.
O huru ayi n’anya nk’uku;

Ayi gahu-kwa-ra Ya,

Tukwas’obi obara-Ya,

Nalu olu nke-Ya.   Amen.

youtube_options.title: 164 SDA Hymn - There Is A Green Hill Far Away (Singing w/ Lyrics)

title: ONWU JISUS
first_line: Ayi neto Onye nke nwuru  N’el’obe n’ihi ndi-nmehie:  Madu nakwa Jisus emo:  N’ihi nka ayi aju uwa.
subtitle: Okwu nke obe . . . buru ayi, bu ndi anazoputa, ihi nke Chineke.
english_hint: 1 Ndi Korint 1. 18. We sing the praise of Him who died.
lyrics:
1.
Ayi neto Onye nke nwuru

N’el’obe n’ihi ndi-nmehie:

Madu nakwa Jisus emo:

N’ihi nka ayi aju uwa.

2.
Onwu-Ya n'obe nezi ayi

K'ihi-n'anya Chineke ra:

O buru njo-ayi n'osisi,

O wedatar’ayi ebere.

3.
Onwu-Ya nebupu nmehie,

O netiye ndu n’obi-ayi;

O nenye olile-anya,

O neme k’ilu di uto.

4.
O newepu ujo n’obi,

Nagba ndi nadigh ik’ume;

O nachupu egwu ili,

Nye ihé n’ubochi onwu.

5.
Kraist, Onye j'ahuhu d'ilu

Wetara ndi-njo amara,

Ka ndi nil’agbaputara

Neto Gi rue mgb'ebigh-ebi. Amen.

title: ONWU JISUS
first_line: Nkume mgbe ebigh-ebi,  Kwe ka m’zoro nime Gi;  Ka miri na obara  Nke si n’akuku-I puta,  Buru ih'isacha njom,  Nzoputam n’ike nke-ya.
subtitle: M'getiye gi nime oghere nke oke nkume ahu
english_hint: Opupu 33. 22. Rock of Ages, cleft for me.
lyrics:
1.
Nkume mgbe ebigh-ebi,

Kwe ka m’zoro nime Gi;

Ka miri na obara

Nke si n’akuku-I puta,

Buru ih'isacha njom,

Nzoputam n’ike nke-ya.

2.
O bugh olu nke akam

Gemezu iwu nke-Gi;

M’jisiwod’ike mgbe dum,

Nakwa kw’akwa mgbe nile,

H’apugh iwepu nmehiem:

Nami Gi gazoputam.

3.
Agbam aka biakute I,

Amakurum obe-Gi;

Agbam oto nim’obim,

Nyem uwe, yerem aka;

Abiam n’is’iyi n’inyi;

Onye-nzoputam, sacham.

4.
Ebe m’nek’ume udu nka,

Mgbe m’mechir’anyam n'onwu,

Mgbe m’gala n’uwa ozo,

Hu Gi n’oche-ikpe-Gi,

Nkume uke ebigh-ebi,

Kwe ka m’zoro mime Gi. Amen.

title: ONWU JISUS
first_line: Anwurum n’ihi gi,  We wusi obaram,  K’ewe gbaputa gi,  K’i ba na ndu ohu.  Anwurum n’ihi gi;  Gini ka gi merem?
subtitle: Onye hurum n’anya. rara kwa Onwe-ya, nye n'ihim.
english_hint: Ndi, Galetia 2. 20. I gave my life for thee.
lyrics:
1.
Anwurum n’ihi gi,

We wusi obaram,

K’ewe gbaputa gi,

K’i ba na ndu ohu.

Anwurum n’ihi gi;

Gini ka gi merem?

2.
Ejim otut’aro,

N’ik’ogwugwu n’akwa,

Ime ka gi we nwe

Onu ebigh-ebi.

Enyerem arom dum;

Ole ka gi nyerem?

3.
Ulo ihé nke Nnam,

Och’ezem mara nma,

Ka M’rap’ru bia n’uwa

Ino n’ihe-nwuta.

M’rapuru ha n’ih’i;

Gini k’i rapuru?

4.
Ahuhu M’huru gi,

Ibu-obi d’ilu,

Ha nanaputa gi

N’onwu ebigh-ebi.

Ahuhu ka M'huru i;

I gahurum gini?

5.
Ewetaram nye gi;

Site n’ulom n'igwé,

Nzoputa na udo,

Na ihu-n’anya nkem.

Akum ka M’wetara i;

I wetaram gini?

6.
Onye-nwem, ka m'nye ndum,

Ka m’nye arom nile;

Ka m’topu agb’uwa

N'ihi Gi, Chinekem.

Gi nyerem Onwe-Gi;

Le, enyem I onwem. Amen.

title: ONWU JISUS
first_line: Ge nti! olu ihun'anya  Nke nada na Kalvari;  Le, o nagbawa kwa nkume,  Kwaghar'uwa, kpuch'igwé;  "O gwusiwo,"  Nur’ol’Onye-nzoputa.
subtitle: O gwuwo.
english_hint: Jon 19. 30. Hark! the voice of love and mercy.
lyrics:
1.
Ge nti! olu ihun'anya

Nke nada na Kalvari;

Le, o nagbawa kwa nkume,

Kwaghar'uwa, kpuch'igwé;

"O gwusiwo,"

Nur’ol’Onye-nzoputa.

2.
"O gwusiwo"  Le, ob'uto

Okw'ebube ndia nyere!

Ngozi igwe Kraist nerudata.

"O gwusiwo,"

Ka ndi-Ya chet'okwu nka.

3.
"O gwusiwo." onyinye dum

Bu nk'iwu mgb'ochie nwere;

Emezuwo nkwa Chineke;

Onw'apugh iy'egw'ozo.

"O qwusiwo."

Nsi-Ya nwe nkasi-obi.

4.
Ndi-m'ozi, chir'ubo-unu,

Tob'aba Immanuel.

Ndi bi n'uwa, ndi bi igwe,

Soronu n'abu nmeri.

Haleluya!

To Nw'aturu Chineke. Amen.

title: ONWU JISUS
first_line: Ge nti! akuko di ebube!  Ozi'oma n’ihi mu na gi:  Na Jisus wetar'ayi ngbagara,  O kwusia  ugwo-ayi n’obe.
subtitle: Onye ayi sitere n'obara-Ya nwe ngbaputa-ayi nime Ya
english_hint: Ndi Efesos 1. 7. Redemption! O wonderful story.
lyrics:
1.
Ge nti! akuko di ebube!

Ozi'oma n’ihi mu na gi:

Na Jisus wetar'ayi ngbagara,

O kwusia  ugwo-ayi n’obe.

2.
O zoput'ayi  n’onwu k’ayi di ndu,

O me k’ayi gho umu Chuku:

Otu nsacha di n’ihi ndi-njo:

Nsacha n’obara nke Jisus.

3.
Njo agagh-enwe ike ozo,

O bu ezie n’o  ganwa gi;

N'ihi na Kraist, site n’onwu-Ya,

Gemeb’ike nile nke njo.

4.
Ugbu a nara ebere Chuku,

Gba oso jeku Jisus ta:

O gakpopbata onye biara,

O digh enye O gachupu.   Amen.

title: ONWU JISUS
first_line: Ihu-n’anya Jisus jirim,  N'ihi ahuhu n’osisi,  K'O buru Onye-ngbaputam,  Madu apugh iko!
subtitle: O digh onye o bula nwere ihu-n’anya, kari nka uku.
english_hint: Jon 15. 13. The love that Jesus had for me.

1.
Ihu-n’anya Jisus jirim,

N'ihi ahuhu n’osisi,

K'O buru Onye-ngbaputam,

Madu apugh iko!

2.
O bur’ibu-obi d’ilu,

Le, okpu ogwu O kpuru,

Ka m’we kwa ndu mgbe nile,

Madu apugh iko!

3.
Udo m'nwere nim'Onye-nwem,

Onye nario n’iru Chuku,

Olu obara-Ya luru,

Madu apugh iko!

4.
Onu O Wetera ndi-Ya,

Iz’ike ayi nenwe na Ya,

title: ONWU JISUS
first_line: Naga! naga dika Eze!  "Hosanna!" k’ebo dum néti;  Onye-nzoputa, so uzo-Gi  Nk’atusar’igu-nkwu n’uwe.
subtitle: Igwé madu nile ndi naga, n'iru Ya, ndi neso kwa neti nkpu, si, Hosanna diri Nwa Devid.
english_hint: Matin 21. 9. Ride on, ride on in majesty!
lyrics:
1.
Naga! naga dika Eze!

"Hosanna!" k’ebo dum néti;

Onye-nzoputa, so uzo-Gi

Nk’atusar’igu-nkwu n’uwe.

2.
Naga! naga dika Eze!

N'idi-nwaye ga n'onwu-Gi;

Kraist, nmeri-Gi namalite

N'elu onwu na nmehie dum.

3.
Naga! mega dike Eze!

Usu ndi-m’ozi n'el'igwe

Wer'anya~nwuta lekwasi

Aja ahu nke agachu.

4.
Naga! naga dika Eze!

Ogu-Gi nk'ikp'azu di nso;

Nna, n'och'eze-Ya, nechére

Okpara etere manu.

5.
Naga! naga dika Eze!

N'idi-nWayQ ga n'onwu-Gi;

Ruber'ihe-ngb'uwa isi-I,

Wel'ike-Gi, Kraist, bur'Eze! Amen.

Kraist Ez'ayi biliri ta:	Haleluya!

Ka madu na m’ozi si			Haleluya!

Igwe na ala, kwenu.			Haleluya!

4.
N di-nche neche nche n'efu;	Haleluya!

Kraist emeghewo igwé.		Haleluya!

title: NBILITE-N'ONWU JISUS
first_line: Haleluya! Haleluya! Haleluya!  Okwu agwu; ogu ebie:  Jisus emeriwo onwu;  Bubanu abu Ok’onu:  Haleluya!
subtitle: Bukuenu Jehova abu ohu; n’ihi na O luwo olu di iche iche.
english_hint: Abu Oma 98. 1. The strife is o’er, the battle done.
lyrics:
1.
Haleluya! Haleluya! Haleluya!

Okwu agwu; ogu ebie:

Jisus emeriwo onwu;

Bubanu abu Ok’onu:

Haleluya!

2.
Onwu mere k’ike-ya ra,

Ma Kraist lugburu ya n'ogu;

K’ayi tisie nkpu onu ike:

Haleluya!

3.
Ubochi ato gabigara,

O si n’onwu bilie, di ndu;

Otuto nile diri Kraist!

Haleluya!

4.
O kujiri nkporo onwu;

O kwaghe uzo el'igwe;

K'ayi buara Ya abu nmeri:

Haleluya!

5.
Jisus, site n’onwu nke-Gi,

Zoputa ayi n'egwu onwu,

K’ayi di ndu, nabuku I abu

Haleluya! Amen.

title: NBILITE-N'ONWU JISUS
first_line: Jisus di ndu! gi, onwu,  I pugh ime k’ayi tua egwu;  Jisus di ndu! gi, ili,  I pugh ime k'ayi bur’oru.  Haleluya!
subtitle: Eloro onwu rue nmeri.
english_hint: 1 Ndi Korint 15. 54. Jesus Iives! thy terrors now.
lyrics:
1.
Jisus di ndu! gi, onwu,

I pugh ime k’ayi tua egwu;

Jisus di ndu! gi, ili,

I pugh ime k'ayi bur’oru.

Haleluya!

2.
Jisus di ndu! rue ugbu a

Onwu bu on'uzo nke ndu;

Nka gewepu egwu-ayi

Mgb’ayi gagabiga uzo-ya.

Haleluya!

3.
Jisus di ndu! O nwur'ayi:

K'ayi diri nani Jisus ndu

K’ayi biri n’obi ocha,

Neto Onye-nzoputa-ayi.

Haleluya!

4.
Jisus di ndu! ayi mara?
O digh ihe gekewap'ayi:
Ndu, Onwu na Ekwensu,
H’apugh map’ayi n'aka-Ya.
Haleluya!

5.
Jisus di ndu! ewere

Oche-eze niie nye Ya;

Ayi pur'iru éb'O no,

So Ya buru eze n’igwé.

Haleluya! Amen.

title: NBILITE-N'ONWU JISUS
first_line: Haleluya! Haleluya!  K’obi n’olu-ayi neto,  Nabuku Chuku ab’onu,  Nabu abu otuto.  Onye nwuru n’elu obe  N’ihi nzoputa nke-ayi,  Jisus Kraist, Eze otuto,  Si n’onwu bilie ozo.
subtitle: Emewo ka Kraist si na ndi nwuru anwu bilie.
english_hint: 1 Ndi Korint 15. 20. Hallelujah, Hallelujah!
lyrics:
1.
Haleluya! Haleluya!

K’obi n’olu-ayi neto,

Nabuku Chuku ab’onu,

Nabu abu otuto.

Onye nwuru n’elu obe

N’ihi nzoputa nke-ayi,

Jisus Kraist, Eze otuto,

Si n’onwu bilie ozo.

2.
Ugbu a etiwawo ili,

Kraist si n’onwu ba na ndu,

Ndu ebube nk'ebigh-ebi,

N'ututu ubochi ta;

Ayi gesoro Kraist we meri,

Site na ike nke-Ya;

So Ya ba na nd’ebigh-ebi,

Site na Nbilite-Ya.

3.
Kraist, Onye bu Nkpuru nke mbu

Mus’yi amara nk’igwé,

Ihu-n’anya dika ihé

Si n’iru Ya nenwupu:

K’ayi d’obi-ayi n’elu-igwe

Namiri Gi nkpur-oma,

Nke genye Gi otuto rue

Mgbe ayi gahu iru-Gi.

4.
Haleluya! Haleluya!

Otuto diri Chuku,

Diri Nna, n'Onye-nzoputa

Kraist, bu Onye nwe nmeri;

Otuto di-kwa-ra Mo Nso,

Is'iyi nk’ihu-n'anya;

Haleluya! Haleluya!

Diri Ato nim'Otu. Amen.

title: NBILITE-N'ONWU JISUS
first_line: Eme nkwa ekwere,  Olu nzoput'agwu;  Ikpé n'ebere di n'otu,  Nna akpote Nwa-Ya.
subtitle: N'ihi na umu ka nkwa nka diri.
english_hint: Oli Ndi Ozi 25. 39. The promise is fulfilled.
lyrics:
1.
Eme nkwa ekwere,

Olu nzoput'agwu;

Ikpé n'ebere di n'otu,

Nna akpote Nwa-Ya.

2.
Obim, tobe Jisus,

Onye kpopuru njo-i;

Onye nwur'anwu di kwa ndu,

O gagh'anwu ooo.

3.
Onwu-Ya genye i ndu,

Nbilite-Ya bu nke-i;

Kwe na Chinéke gasacha i

Nim'obara Jisus. Amen.

4.
Nriko di ngozi nnweko nke di nso!

Ayi nalu ogu, ha no n'otuto;

M'ayi b'otu nime Gi, ayi dum bu nke-I.

Aleluya!

5.
M'agha d'ufu, ogu alugide,

Nti nanu abu nmeri nk'el’igwe.

Obi tiwe ik'ozo, aka d'ike.

Aleluya!

6.
Anyanwu nenwu s'ike n'anyasi,

Nd'ogu ndi kwesiri gez'ike ngwa,

Ngozi nk'udo nke Paradais d'uto.

Aleluya!

7.
M’ubochi otuto ka mna gabo;

Ndi nso gebili n'uwe nmeri-ha,

Eze nk'otuto naga n'uzo-Ya!

Aleluya!

8.
Site n'ala, n'osimari nile,

Usu agutagh-onu nezuko,

Naburu Nna, n'Okpara, na Mo Nso.

Aleluya! Amen

title: OMUMU JISUS
first_line: O togboro n'ili-  Onye-nzoputam!  Nech'ubochi ahu-  Jisus Ezém!
subtitle: O nogh n'ebe a kama emere ka O si n'onwu bilie
english_hint: Luk 24. 6. Low in the grave He lay.
lyrics:
1.
O togboro n'ili-

Onye-nzoputam!

Nech'ubochi ahu-

Jisus Ezém!

2.
Ha nech’Ozu-I n’efu-

Onye-nzcputam!

Mech’ili-Gi n'efu-

Jisus Ezem!

3.
Onwu ejidegh Gi-

Qnye-nzoputam!

I tiw’ogba i1i-

Jisus Ezem!   Amen.

title: NRIGO N'ELU-IGWE JISUS
first_line: Lenu Jisus! kiribenu!  O si n'agha naputa;  O meriwo ndi-iro-Ya,  Ka ora da n'ukwu-Ya.
subtitle: O bu Onye-nwenu kachasi ndi-nwenu nile, na Eze kachasi ndi-eze nile.
english_hint: Nkpughe 17. 14. Look, ye Saints I the Sight is glorious.
lyrics:
1.
Lenu Jisus! kiribenu!

O si n'agha naputa;

O meriwo ndi-iro-Ya,

Ka ora da n'ukwu-Ya.

2.
Ndi-mo-ozi, me Ya Eze!

Le ok’ih’O lutara;

Dobe Ya n’och’eze elu,

Ka el’igwe nanuri.

3.
Ndi-njo kpube Ya okp'ogwu,

Me Y’eze n’ikwa emo;

Ndi-nso na ndi-m’ozi nile

Me Ya Eze ebube.

4.
Nu olu nke oke onu!

Ge nti n’ol’ubo nmeri!

N’ebe nke kachasi elu

Ka Jisus no ka Eze. Amen.

title: NRIGO N'ELU-IGWE JISUS
first_line: Isi nke kpururi ogwu  Nekpu otuto ta;  Okpu-eze di ebube  Jisus Dinkpa kpuru.
subtitle: I ji kwa nsopuru na, ima-nina kpube Ya n'isi dika okpu-eze.
english_hint: Abu Oma 8. 5. The Head that once was crowned with throne.
lyrics:
1.
Isi nke kpururi ogwu

Nekpu otuto ta;

Okpu-eze di ebube

Jisus Dinkpa kpuru.

2.
Oche nke kachasi elu

Bu oké-Ya n’ezie;

Eze nd’eze, Onye-nw'ora,

Ihé ebigh-ebi.

3.
Onu ndi nile bi n'igwe,

N’onu ndi bi n'uwa,

Ndi mara ihu-n'anya-Ya,

Ndi kwere n'aha-Ya.

4.
Ha kere oke n’ihere,

Na ngozi nke obe;

Aha-ha di mgb'ebigh-ebi.

Onu-ha bu nk’igwé.

5.
Ha, nahu ahuhu n’uwa,

Ha b’eze n'igwe;

Imar’ihu-n’anya-Ya, bu

Uru na onu-ha.

6.
Onwu ihere O nwuru

Nenye ndi nke-Ya ndu;

Obe-Ya bu olil'anya

Na otuto nke-ha.  Amen.

title: NRIGO N'ELU-IGWE JISUS
first_line: Ekele! Eze Galili,  Onye eledar'anya!  Jisus, Gi huru ahuhu,  Nye ayi nzoputa n'efu;  Ekele! Onye-nzoputa,  Onye nwuru n'ihi ayi;  N’olu-Gi ka ayi nwer'udo,  Ayi nwere ndu n’aha-Gi.
subtitle: Mgbe O sachasiri nmehie nile ayi, O we ndu n’aka-nke Idi-uku ahu di n’elu.
english_hint: Ndi Hibru 1. 3. Hail, Thou once despiséd Jesus!
lyrics:
1.
Ekele! Eze Galili,

Onye eledar'anya!

Jisus, Gi huru ahuhu,

Nye ayi nzoputa n'efu;

Ekele! Onye-nzoputa,

Onye nwuru n'ihi ayi;

N’olu-Gi ka ayi nwer'udo,

Ayi nwere ndu n’aha-Gi.

2.
Nw'aturu Chuku rotara

K'O buru nmehie-ayi dum;

Site n'ihu-n'anya uku

K'I ji kpuchi nmehie-ayi;

Ndi-Gi nile nwe ngbaghara

Site n'ik'obara-Gi;

On’uz'ama nk’igwe meghe,

Ayi na Chuhu di n’udo.

3.
Jisus, ekele diri Gi

N'och'ebub'ebigh-ebi!

Usu nile nke di n'igwe

Nasopur’I n’iru Nna-

N’ebe I narioro ndi-njo,

Nedozir’ayi onodu,

Narior’ayi mgbe ebigh-ebi,

Rue mgbe ayi genw'otuto.

4.
Gi nwe nsopuru na ike,

Gi nwe kwa ngozi nile;

Otuto mgbe ebigh-ebi

Kwesiri ka ayi nye Gi!

Unu ndi-m'ozi ye aka

Wer'abu oma nile,

Nako olu oma Jisus,

Neto Kraist Immanuel! Amen.

title: OMUMU JISUS
first_line: Anebuli on'uz'ama,  On'uzo gher'oghe;  Ez'ebube agabawo  Inoyere Nna-Ya.
subtitle: Onu-uzo-ama, bulienu isi-unu elu;... Eze ebube gabata kwa.
english_hint: Abu Oma 24. 9. The golden gates are lifted up.
lyrics:
1.
Anebuli on'uz'ama,

On'uzo gher'oghe;

Ez'ebube agabawo

Inoyere Nna-Ya.

2.
Kraist, I bur’ayi uzo rigo

ldozir’ayi ebe,

K'ayi we no n'eb'I no ugbu a,

Hu kwa iru Chuku.

3.
Ih'otuto nenwu mgbe dum

N'uzo-ayi nim'uwa;

Ihe din'azu igw'oji

Nke zoro Gi n'any'ayi.

4.
Bulite obi-ayi elu,

Nye ayi amara-Gi;

Ayi nawaghari n'uwa nka,

M'abu-ayi di n'igwe.

5.
Ka eb'I no, n'aka-nri Nna,

Olil'any'ayi gadi;

Nogide nime ayi, k'ayi we

Nogide kwa nime I.   Amen.

title: OMUMU JISUS
first_line: Le! O si n'igwé narida,  Ony’egburu n’ihi ayi;  Otutu ndi nso neso Ya  Nabu abil nke nmeri;  Haleluya!  Chuku abia ib'Eze.
subtitle: Le O mabia, Ya na igwe-oji; anya nile o bulu gahuzu kwa Ya
english_hint: Nkupughe 1. 7. Le! He come with clouds descending.
lyrics:
1.
Le! O si n'igwé narida,

Ony’egburu n’ihi ayi;

Otutu ndi nso neso Ya

Nabu abil nke nmeri;

Haleluya!

Chuku abia ib'Eze.

2.
Anya nile gahu kwa Ya

N'ebube-Ya di uku;

Ndi nke kpapuru Ya, re Ya,

Kpogide Ya n’osisi,

Geji akwa

Hu ezi Mesaia-ha.

3.
Ihe-ama nke onwu-Ya

Di kwa n’aru Qma-Ya;

Nka nakpatara ndi nke-Ya

Ohu di mgb’eigh-egbi;

Anya gini

K'ayi ji le apa-utu-Ya!

4.
Ngbaputa, nk'eler’anya-ya,

Aputawo n'ebube;

Ndi nsQ-Ya, ndi uwa juru,

e Geje zute Ya n’elu;

Haleluya!

Ubochi Chinek’abia.

5.
Amen! k’Qra madu to Gi,

N’elu oche-eze-Gi;

Were ike na ebube,

Nara ala-eze-Gi;

Biko, bi ngwa,

Chinek’ebigh-ebi, bia!   Amen.

title: OMUMU JISUS
first_line: N di-ozi Onye-nw’ayi,  Onye na olu-ya,  Necheta okwu O kwuru  Neche n’on’uzo-Ya.
subtitle: Ka eke unu ihe-okike n'ukwu,ka orioma-umu nenwu kwa
english_hint: Luk 12. 35. Ye servants of the Lord.
lyrics:
1.
N di-ozi Onye-nw’ayi,

Onye na olu-ya,

Necheta okwu O kwuru

Neche n’on’uzo-Ya.

2.
K'oku-unu nenwu,

Dozienu ya nk’oma:

Kenu ih’okike n’ukwu,

Aha-Ya di egwu.

3.
"Chenu nche! "b'iwu Nn'ayi;

O no kwa nso ugbu a;

Le ih'ama obibia-Ya,

Ka unu jikere.

4.
Ony'agahu na nche

Genwu ezi onu!

O geji onu hu Jisus,

Agasopuru ya.

5.
Kraist geji aka-Ya

We dozie oriri,

Welite ony'ozi ahu

N'iru ndi-m'ozi-Ya.   Amen.

title: OBIBIA JISUS
first_line: Nu uda onu! O nabia,  Bu Onye-nzoputa;  K'obi-ayi bur'och'eze-Ya,  K’olu-ayi bua abu.
subtitle: O letawo ndi-Ya, lu-kwa-ra ha olu ngbaputa.
english_hint: Luk 1. 68. Hark the glad sound! the Saviour comes.
lyrics:
1.
Nu uda onu! O nabia,

Bu Onye-nzoputa;

K'obi-ayi bur'och'eze-Ya,

K’olu-ayi bua abu.

2.
O nabia izoputa ndi

Ekwensu ker’agbu;

N’iru Ya uzo emeghe,

Agbu dum atpu.

3.
O nabia ikpocha obi

N'ochichiri nmehie

K'O tiye ihé el'igwe

N'anya onye-isi.

4.
O nabia ikasi obi,

Igwo ndi dara mba;

Iwer'aku-Ya m'ogbeye

K'o gbo ogaranya.

5.
Eze udo, Hosanna-ayi

K’ayi geji kele Gi;

Uda-aha-I, di ayi uto,

Gada n'igwé nile. Amen.

title: OBIBIA JISUS
first_line: Kraist nabia! K'ih'ekér'éké  Ghara is’udé ozo;  K’ayi wer'okwukwe sir’ike  Nele anya-Ya mgbe dum!  Kraist nabia kwa!  Bia, Ez'udo di ngozi.
subtitle: Ayi matara na ihe ekére éké nile nasuko ude Ndi.
english_hint: Ndi Rom 8. 22. Christ is coming! let creation.
lyrics:
1.
Kraist nabia! K'ih'ekér'éké

Ghara is’udé ozo;

K’ayi wer'okwukwe sir’ike

Nele anya-Ya mgbe dum!

Kraist nabia kwa!

Bia, Ez'udo di ngozi.

2.
Ugbu a anako akuko

Nke obe-Gi di ilu;

Ma agahu otuto-Gi

Mgb'I gabia ibu Eze.

Kraist nabia kwa!

Ka obi nile nuria.

3.
K’olil'anya nka di ngozi

Me k’ayi bua ab’otuto;

K’ayi welie olu-ayi elu,

Neto Eze nke nke nabia.

Kraist nabia kwa!

Bia, Jisus, biko bia ngwa! Amen.

4.
Nriko di ngozi nnweko nke di nso!

Ayi nalu ogu, ha no n'otuto;

M'ayi b'otu nime Gi, ayi dum bu nke-I.

Aleluya!

5.
M'agha d'ufu, ogu alugide,

Nti nanu abu nmeri nk'el’igwe.

Obi tiwe ik'ozo, aka d'ike.

Aleluya!

6.
Anyanwu nenwu s'ike n'anyasi,

Nd'ogu ndi kwesiri gez'ike ngwa,

Ngozi nk'udo nke Paradais d'uto.

Aleluya!

7.
M’ubochi otuto ka mna gabo;

Ndi nso gebili n'uwe nmeri-ha,

Eze nk'otuto naga n'uzo-Ya!

Aleluya!

8.
Site n'ala, n'osimari nile,

Usu agutagh-onu nezuko,

Naburu Nna, n'Okpara, na Mo Nso.

Aleluya! Amen

title: OBIBIA JISUS
first_line: Onye-nzoputam biara Betlehem, Amuru Ya n’ulo anumanu; O bu ih’ebube-Onye-ngozi! O bu mu k’O nacho.
subtitle: Onye ahu ka Chineke were aka-nri-Ya welle elu ibu Onye-ndu na Onye-nzoputa.
english_hint: Olu Ndi Ozi 5. 31.
lyrics:
1.
Onye-nzoputam biara Betlehem,
Amuru Ya n’ulo anumanu;
O bu ih’ebube-Onye-ngozi!
O bu mu k’O nacho.

2.
N’obe ka Jisus, Onye-nzoputam,

Kwur’ugwom dum, gbaputa nkpur'obm;

O bu ih'ebube-Onye-ngozi!

Nwuru onwu n'ihim.

3.
Onye-nzoputam di k'O di na mbu;

Mgbe m'rapuru uzo nefughari,

O ji nwayo nario nkpuru-obim,

Nakpom oku! nakpom!

4.
Onye-nzoputa ha gesi n'elu bia-

Nkwa di uto k'aro nagabiga!

Agamahu Ya k'O nariadata!

Mgb’O gabia iwerem!

5.
O gabia iwerem!

O gabia iwerem!

Agamahu Ya k'O naridata,

Mgb'O gabia iwerem! Amen.

title: OMUMU JISUS
first_line: Ma jisus bia ile ndi-Ya olu,  N’ehihie m’ob’aba1i,  O gahu ayi ezi ndi-Ya na nche,  Jide oku-ayi nenwu?
subtitle: Ya mere, neohenu nche: n’ihi na unu amatagh ubochi Onye-nwe-unu gabia.
english_hint: Matiu 24. 42. When Jesus comes to reward His servants.
lyrics:
1.
Ma jisus bia ile ndi-Ya olu,

N’ehihie m’ob’aba1i,

O gahu ayi ezi ndi-Ya na nche,

Jide oku-ayi nenwu?

2.
Ma o buru na isi-ututu,

Ka O gakpo mu na gi,

Ka ayi gosi Ya olu ayi luru,

O gasi, “I mere nk’oma?”

3.
A mezuru ihe O si ayi me,

Neme otu ik'ayi ra?

Ma obi-ayi adigh-am’ayi ikpe,

Ayi gez’ike n’otuto.

4.
Ngozi diri ndi O gahu na nche,

Ha geket'ebube-Ya:

M'O bia n’ututu m’obu n’abali,

O gahu k’ayi neche nche?   Amen.

title: OMUMU JISUS
first_line: Mo Nso, ezi Onye-ndu!  Nano nso onye nke Kraist;  Wer’aka-I dur’a nwayo,  Nd’ike gwuru nahuri,  Nanu ol’utQ nke~Gi  Si, “Onye fur’uzo, bia,  Sorom, agamedula il"
subtitle: Mem ka m'zo ijo n'ezi-okwu-Gi zikwam ihe
english_hint: Abu Oma 25. 5. Holy Spirit faithful Guide!
lyrics:
1.
Mo Nso, ezi Onye-ndu!

Nano nso onye nke Kraist;

Wer’aka-I dur’a nwayo,

Nd’ike gwuru nahuri,

Nanu ol’utQ nke~Gi

Si, “Onye fur’uzo, bia,

Sorom, agamedula il"

2.
Eyi kasi nma no nso

Iyer’ayi aka mgbe dum;

Arapukwal’ayi n’egwu,

Naso isi n'ochichi.

Mgbe ok'ifufe nefe,

Ike n’olil’any’agwu,

Si, “Onye fur'uzo, bia,

Sorum, agamedula i!”

3.
Mgb’uboch'olu-ayi gagwu,

Mgbe ayi neche iz’ike,

Mgbe ekpere na igwé,

Nani ha foduru ayi;

Mgb’ayi gaf’osimir’onwu,

Natukwasi Kraist obi,

Si, “Onye fur'uzo, bia,

Sorum, agamedula i!"   Amen.

title: CHINEKE MO NSO
first_line: Mo nk'amara, biyerem!  Agameju n’amara,  Gosi kwa ndu-Gi nimem  Site n’okwu iye-aka;  Nekwur’Onye-nzoputam  N'idi nwayo na ike.
subtitle: Ya na unu nanogide, O gano kwa nime unu.
english_hint: Jon 14. 17. Gracious Spirit, dwell with me!
lyrics:
1.
Mo nk'amara, biyerem!

Agameju n’amara,

Gosi kwa ndu-Gi nimem

Site n’okwu iye-aka;

Nekwur’Onye-nzoputam

N'idi nwayo na ike.

2.
Mo nk'ez'okwu, bivrem!

M'gabu ony’ezi-okwu,

Wer'amam-ihe di nma.

Mo ka ndu-I puta nimem;

Ka m’wer’omume nwa-nne

Ko idi-nma nk’Onye-nwem.

3.
Mo di nwayo, biyerem!

Agamadi kwa nwayo;

Mechibido obi nkem

N’ajo oge onwunwa;

M’anwu wa meghere ya,

We gos'ihu-n’anya-Ya.

4.
Nriko di ngozi nnweko nke di nso!

Ayi nalu ogu, ha no n'otuto;

M'ayi b'otu nime Gi, ayi dum bu nke-I.

Aleluya!

5.
Mo di ike, biyerem!

Agamab'onye d’ike,

Ka m’we bur'onye-nmeri

Mgbe nd’ozo aghagh ida;

Site n’olil’any'ike

Naga n'iru mgbe nile.

6.
Mo nke di nso, biyerem!

Mu onwem gadi kwa nso;

Si nime nmehie puta,

Chob-ihe di nma nile,

K'ihe o bula m'gabu,

M'genye Onye nyerem Gi. Amen.

7.
M’ubochi otuto ka mna gabo;

Ndi nso gebili n'uwe nmeri-ha,

Eze nk'otuto naga n'uzo-Ya!

Aleluya!

8.
Site n'ala, n'osimari nile,

Usu agutagh-onu nezuko,

Naburu Nna, n'Okpara, na Mo Nso.

Aleluya! Amen

title: UBOCHI ONYE-NWE-AYI
first_line: Kuyem ume, Chuku:  Mejuem na ndu ohu,  Ka m'we hu ihe-Gi n’anya,  Neme kwa uche-Gi.
subtitle: O kusa ha ume, si ha. Naramu Mo Nso.
english_hint: Jon 20. 28. Breathe on we, Breath of God.
lyrics:
1.
Kuyem ume, Chuku:

Mejuem na ndu ohu,

Ka m'we hu ihe-Gi n’anya,

Neme kwa uche-Gi.

2.
Kuyem ume, Chuku,

Rue mgb’obim di ocha,

M’we nacho ihe I nacho,

Nogide nime ya.

3.
Kuyem ume, Chuku,

Rue mgbe m’gabu nke-Gi

Anu-arum nka we nenwu

Ka ihé nk’el’igwe.

4.
Kuyem ume, Chuku,

Ka m'ghar’inwu anwu,

Ma soro I'di ndu zur'oké

Nke mgb'ebigh-ebi-Gi. Amen.

title: CHINEKE MO NSO
first_line: Mo Nso, noyer'ekpere nk’ayi,  Me ulo nka ulo-I;  Ridata n'ike amara-I,  Bia, Mo Nso uku, bia!
subtitle: Mgbe ha riosiri aririo, ewe me ka nzuko me nkpatu; ha, nile we juputa ha Mo Nso
english_hint: Olu Ndi Ozi 4. 31. Spirit divine, attend our prayers.
lyrics:
1.
Mo Nso, noyer'ekpere nk’ayi,

Me ulo nka ulo-I;

Ridata n'ike amara-I,

Bia, Mo Nso uku, bia!

2.
Bia dik’ihé, we gosi ayi

N’ayi kwesir'eberei;

K’I duru ayi ba n’uzo ndu

Nd’ez’omume naga.

3.
Bia k’oku, nucha obi-ayi,

Dik'oku nchu-aja;

K'obi-ayi dum buru aja

Nye Onye-ngbaput-ayi.

4.
Bia dik'igirigi, gozie

Mgbe nka edoro nso;

K'ozara nuria n’I puru

Ime k’o mia nkpuru.

5.
Bia dika-nduru, gbasa nku-I

Nk’ihu-n’anya n’udo;

Gozie nzuko-Gi n'uwa nka,

Dika nke di n'igwé.

6.
Bia dik’ok’ifufe nye ayi

Onyiny’amara-Gi;

Ka ndi nile nwayi muru

Hu otuto iru-I.

7.
Mo-Nso, noyer'ekpere nk’ayi,

Me uwa nka ulo-I;

Ridata n’ike amara-I,

Bia, Mo Nso uku, bia! Amen.

title: CHINKEKE MO NSO
first_line: Were ihé-I di ngozi  Bia nim’ochichiri-ayi,  Mo Nso di ebigh-ebi,  Chuk’onye-nkasi.
subtitle: otu ahu Mo Nso neye-kwa-ra adigh-ike-ayi aka.
english_hint: Ndi Rom 8. 26. Come to our dark nature’s night.
lyrics:
1.
Were ihé-I di ngozi

Bia nim’ochichiri-ayi,

Mo Nso di ebigh-ebi,

Chuk’onye-nkasi.

2.
Ayi di njo-Gi sacha ayi;

Nim'oria-nye ayi, ike-I;

Ayi fur-efu-Gi chot'ayi;

Chuk’Onye-nkasi.

3.
Obi-ayi bu ogbeye;

Si n'ihwé nye ayi onu

Okwukwe n'ihu-n’auya,

Chuk'Onye-nkasi.

4.
K'udo-I da k'igirigi,

Weda aj'ochicho nk'ayi,

Gosi ayi ihe nke Kraist,

Chuk’Onye-nkasi.

5.
Obia di nso, di nwayo,

K’obi-ayi bur’ulo-nso-I

Ebe I gachi k’Eze,

Chuk'Onye-nkasi.

6.
Narior'ayi nim'obi-ayi,

Nas'udé nke ananugh,

Nario nkpa-ayi anekwugh

Chuk’Onye-nkasi.

7.
Nakpo "Abba, Nna" nim'ayi,

Ih'ama onu nk’igwé

Na nke ndu ebigh-ebi,

Chuk’Onye-nkasi.

8.
Chor’ayi omimi Chuku,

Buru ayi n’uzo ihé,

Me ka k’ayi rigorue n’ulo-I,

Chuk’Onye-nkasi. Amen.

title: UBOCHI ONYE-NWE-AYI
first_line: Mo Nso, Ony'obi-oma  Nim’oyinye amara-I,  I zir’ayi k’ayi cho kari  Ihu-n’any’igwé.
subtitle: Ma ugbn a ka okwukwe, olile-anya, ihu-n'anya ihe ato ndia nanogide: ma nke kachasi n'ihe ndia bu ihu-n'anya.
english_hint: 1 Ndi Korint 13. 13. Gracious Spirit, Holy Ghost.
lyrics:
1.
Mo Nso, Ony'obi-oma

Nim’oyinye amara-I,

I zir’ayi k’ayi cho kari

Ihu-n’any’igwé.

2.
Okwukwe nebup'ugwu,

Omuma-ihe nile,

Abagh n’ihe m’ayi enwegh

Ihu-n’any’igwé.

3.
Inw'onwu n'ih'olu-Gi,

Iwer'ego ny'ogbeye,

B’efu m’ihu-n’any’adigh;

Ny’ayi ihu-n’anya.

4.
Ihu-n’anya neme nma,

Natach'obi, di nwayo;

O kari onwu n’ike;

Ny’ayi ihu-n’anya.

5.
Ibu-amuma gagwu,

Ihe-omuma gafe;

Ma ihu-n’anya gadi;

Ny’ayi ihu-n’anya.

6.
Ageloda okwukwe,

Olil’anya nwe nmezu,

M’ihu-n’anya ganenwu;

Ny’ayi ihu-n’anya.

7.
Okwukwe, n’olil’anya,

N'ihu-n’anya nogide;

Ma nke kasi n’ato ndia

Bu ihu-n’anya. Amen.

title: OMUMU JISUS
first_line: Bia, Mo Nso, Nduru nke igwe  N’ike ndu-Gi nile;  Muye oku ihu-n’anya  N’obi-ayi jur’oyi.
subtitle: O nyewo ayi ufodu nime Mo nke Ya
english_hint: 1 Jon 4. 13. Come, Holy Spirit, heavenly Dove.
lyrics:
1.
Bia, Mo Nso, Nduru nke igwe

N’ike ndu-Gi nile;

Muye oku ihu-n’anya

N’obi-ayi jur’oyi.

2.
Ayi nabu abu-ayi n’efu.

Ike nbili adigh;

Otuto-ayi naju oyi,

Ekpere nanyi ayi.

3.
Chineké, ayi gadigide

N’ume-ngwu di otu a?

Ihu-n’any'ayi ajuk’oyi,

Ma nke-I ekpok’oku!

4.
Bia, Mo Nso, Nduru nke igwe,

N'ike ndu-Gi nile;

Musa oku ihu-n’anya-I

Nke gafunwu nke-ayl.   Amen.

title: OMUMU JISUS
first_line: I Mo Nso, kuye ayi ume-Gi,  Dube ayi mgb’ayi, nekp'ekpere;  Is’iyi nke ndu ohu-ayi,  Ez’ihé nk’ubochi ohu
subtitle: O genye kwe, unu Onye-nkasi-obi ozo, ka O noyere unu rue mgbe ebigh-ebi
english_hint: Jon 14. 16. O Breath of God, breathe on us now.
lyrics:
1.
I Mo Nso, kuye ayi ume-Gi,

Dube ayi mgb’ayi, nekp'ekpere;

Is’iyi nke ndu ohu-ayi,

Ez’ihé nk’ubochi ohu

2.
Onye-nw'ayi, I noyere ayi,

M'adigh amazu k’I si bia;

Na uso k’z1yi ganu olu-Gi,

Mo-Gi gabokwu n'obi-ayi

3.
Kraist b'onu-nekwur'ayi n'elu,

Gi b’Onye mario nime ayi;

Biko, kpeputa eziokwu,

Zaghachi okwu nmehie dum

4.
A! Obim nenwegh okwukwe!

Mu mar-uzo, mar'Onye-ndum;

Gbagharam, Eyim, Chineke,

N'otutu oge m'fur'efu

5.
Noyerem mgb'ey'ozo nadigh

Gamata. ihe-ngbu nk'obim

Mgb'ih’egwu di, k'amata Gi

N'aha ka mma - Onye nkasi!   Amen.

title: CHINEKE MO NSO
first_line: Mo Nso, nur'olu-ayi  Mg'ayi nabu abu,  Kuye ume nso-Gi  N'ab’otuto-ayi.
subtitle: N'ihi na ka ha ra, bu ndi Mo Chuku nedia, ndi aka bu umu-ndikom Chuku
english_hint: Ndi Rom 8. 14. Holy Spirit, hear me.
lyrics:
1.
Mo Nso, nur'olu-ayi

Mg'ayi nabu abu,

Kuye ume nso-Gi

N'ab’otuto-ayi.

2.
Mo Nso, noyere ayi

Mgb'ayi nekp’ekpere

Bia nso kari, zi ayi

Ihe ayi gekwu.

3.
Mo Nso, musa ihé

N’akwukw’ayi nagu

K’ayi we hu nime ya

Ihé nk’ayi nacho.

4.
Mo Nso, nye ayi nile

Obi um'ala;

Me k’ayi di ka Jisus

N’obi-oma Ya.

5.
Mo Nso, me ka olu

Nk’ayi nalu di nfe;

Ekwela ka nzuzu

Mebie egwu-ayi.

6.
Mo Nso, kwa-ubochi

Yere ayi aka

Imeri ih’ojo,

N’ime ih’oma. Amen.

title: AKWUKWO NSO
first_line: Okwu Nke ghoro madu,  Amam-ihe nk’igwé,  Ez'okwu nenwegh ngbanwe  Ih'ayi n’ochichi;  Ayi to Gi n’ihi ihé  Si n’Okwu nso-I puta;  Oku diri ukwu-ayi,  Nenwu mgb'ebigh-ebi.
subtitle: Ndi anahu unu n’etiti ha dika ndi nenye ihé n’uwa neche okwu nke ndu n’iru nada.
english_hint: Ndi Filipai 2. 15-16. O Word of God incarnate.
lyrics:
1.
Okwu Nke ghoro madu,

Amam-ihe nk’igwé,

Ez'okwu nenwegh ngbanwe

Ih'ayi n’ochichi;

Ayi to Gi n’ihi ihé

Si n’Okwu nso-I puta;

Oku diri ukwu-ayi,

Nenwu mgb'ebigh-ebi.

2.
Nzuko nka Kraist natara

Okwu Chuku ahu;

O bulir-ihé ahu

K'O mukwasi uwa

O bu igbe nke aku

Juru n’Ezi-okwu;

O bu ezi onyinyo

Nke Kraist, bu Okwu Ndu.

3.
O di ka okoloto

N’iru nd’agha Chuku;

O bu oku nagb’ama

N’ochichiri uwa;

O b'ihé negos’uzo

N'osimiri ndu nka,

Nime ihe ize-ndu

Dur'ayi biakute Kraist.

4.
Jisus, me ka Nzuko-Gi

Di k’oku nenw’enwu,

Nke gegosi mba nile

Ihé-I k’O di ha mbu;

Zi ndi-ije-Gi nile

Ka ha soro Ihé a,

Rue mgb'ochichiri gebi,

Ha hu iru-I n'onu. Amen.

title: AKWUKWO NSO
first_line: Chineke, okwu,-I di  Iduzi ukwu-ayi;  Onye kwer’okwu-ya  Nwere ihé o'onu.
subtitle: Okwu-Gi bu oriona, diri ukwum o bu kwa ihe diri okporo-uzom.
english_hint: Abu Oma 119. 105. Lord, Thy word abideth.
lyrics:
1.
Chineke, okwu,-I di

Iduzi ukwu-ayi;

Onye kwer’okwu-ya

Nwere ihé o'onu.

2.
Mgbe nd'iro no nso ayi,

Okwu-I nag'b'ayi ume;

Okwu nkasi-obi,

Ozi nke nzoputa.

3.
Mgb'ochichi, nagbachi,

Igw'oji kpuchie ayi,

Ihe-ya nedu ayi,

Nechebr'ayi-nzo.

4.
Onye mara onu,

Pur'iguko aku,

Nke okwu-Gi nenye

Obi di um'ala?

5.
Okw'ebere, nenye

Ndi di ndu, amara;

Okwu nke ndu, nenye

Ndi nanwu nkas'obi!

6.
Chuku, kwe k'ayi chota,

Ihe-mmuta nso-ya;

K’ayi pu kwa Gi n'anya,

Nakpa nso I mgbe nile. Amen.

title: OMUMU JISUS
first_line: Akwukwo Nso Chineke,  Gi b'akum di ok'onu;  Nkem, igwam ebe m'si bia;  Nkem, izi kwam ihe m'bu.
subtitle: Le ka m'is ko iwu-Gi n'anya
english_hint: Abu Oma 119. 97. Holy Bible, book divine.
lyrics:
1.
Akwukwo Nso Chineke,

Gi b'akum di ok'onu;

Nkem, igwam ebe m'si bia;

Nkem, izi kwam ihe m'bu.

2.
Nkemm, ibam nba ma n'kpafue,

Gosi kwa ihu-n'anya;

Nkem k'i bu idu ukwum,

Mam ikpe, kpepuutakwam.

3.
Nkem, ikasim n’ahuhu,

Ma Mo Nso weta ngozi;

Nkem, igosi okwukwe

Madu ji meri onwu.

4.
Nkem, ikow’onu nabia,

Ihe, ndu, m'onwu gasia;

Akwukwo nso Chineke,

Gi b’ékum di ok'onu! Amen

title: AKWUKWO NSO
first_line: Nyawaram achicha  Nke; ndu, Chuku,  Dika I si ke nri  N'uso miri.  M'nacho Gi, Onye-nwem,  N’Akwukwo nso;  Agu Gi nagu mom,  Okwu di ndu.
subtitle: Mu onwem bunri nenye ndu; onye nabiakuteru aku agaghagu ya ma-oli
english_hint: Break Thou the bread of Life
lyrics:
1.
Nyawaram achicha

Nke; ndu, Chuku,

Dika I si ke nri

N'uso miri.

M'nacho Gi, Onye-nwem,

N’Akwukwo nso;

Agu Gi nagu mom,

Okwu di ndu.

2.
Gi bu nri nenve ndu,

Gi Onye-nwen;

Ezi-okwu nso-Gi

Nazoputam.

Nyem ka m’rie we di ndu

Soro I n’elu;

Zim ka m'hu ez'okwu-I

N’anya, Jisus.

3.
Biko, Nna, ziterem

Mo Nso-I ugbu a,

K'O met‘aka’ n'anyam

Ka m'huw'uzo.

Gusim ih'ezoro

Nime Okwu-I,

Ka m'hu k'Akwukwo nso

Kpughere Gi.

4.
Gozie Okw’om’ahu

N'ebe mu no,

K'I si we gozie nri

Na Galili.

Ino n’oru gebi,

Qgba tijie;

Agamahu  udo,

G'Ihem nile! Amen.

first_line: Bia n’etiti ayi, Chineke;  Jiker’ayi inu okwu-Gi,  Do nti-ayi n’inu olu-Gi,  Nye ayi okwukwe k’ayi we nu.
subtitle: N'ihi na ebe madu abua ma-obu ato zukoworo n'aham, n'ebe ahu ka M'no n'etiti ha
english_hint: Matiu 18. 20. Thy presence. gracious Lord, afford.
lyrics:
1.
Bia n’etiti ayi, Chineke;

Jiker’ayi inu okwu-Gi,

Do nti-ayi n’inu olu-Gi,

Nye ayi okwukwe k’ayi we nu.

2.
Wepuru ayi uche abua,

Tukwasi obi-ayi  n’elu;

Nye ayi nri sitere n’igwé,

Me k’afo nri nke ndu ju ayi.

3.
Wer’ike nke Mo Nso nke-Gi,

Kua okwu nke-Gi n’obi-ayi,

K’ayi wer'okwukwe na egwu

Neme otu ayi nur’ugbu

title: AKWUKWO NSO
first_line: Kwue, mgb’oge dajuru,  Mgbe m’no neche Gi;  Me k’obim nana nti,  Neche okwu-Gi.
subtitle: Kwue; n’ihi na oru-Gi nanu.
english_hint: 1 Samuel 3. 10. Speak, Lord, in the stillness.
lyrics:
1.
Kwue, mgb’oge dajuru,

Mgbe m’no neche Gi;

Me k’obim nana nti,

Neche okwu-Gi.

2.
Kwue, O Nna di ngozi

N'oge a dajuru;

Ka m’hu iru-Gi, Nna,

Mara ike-Gi.

3.
N'ih'okwu nk'I nekwu,

"Ha bu ndu" n'ezie;

Nri nk'igwé nenye ndu,

Zuba mom ugbu a!

4.
Ihe dum m'rapuru,

Enweghkwam onwem;

Onu ka m'ji nye Gi

Ihe nile nkem.

5.
Kwue, Nna, n’oru-I nanu!

Agbala nkiti;

Nkpur'obim neche Gi,

Okwu nenye ndu!

6.
Mejuem n'amam-ihe

Nk’uch’ebube-Gi;

K’ih’uto I nacho

Zur’oké nimem.

7.
Dika "ala oma"

Nke nasu miri

Nesi isi oma,

Ka m’no n'ru Gi! Amen.

title: AKWUKWO NSO
first_line: Bu-kwa-ram abu ndia ozo,  Okw'ebube nke Ndu!  Ka, m'hu kari nma-ha ra,  Okw’ebube nke Ndu!  Okwu nke ndu di nma,  Zim okwukwe n’olu!
subtitle: Okwu nke Mu onwem gwaworo unu, ha bu mo, buru kwa ndu.
english_hint: Jon 6. 63. Sing them over again to me.
lyrics:
1.
Bu-kwa-ram abu ndia ozo,

Okw'ebube nke Ndu!

Ka, m'hu kari nma-ha ra,

Okw’ebube nke Ndu!

Okwu nke ndu di nma,

Zim okwukwe n’olu!

2.
Koros:-Okwu oma! d’itu-n’anya!

Okw’ebube nke Ndu!

3.
Kraist, Onye-ngozi, neny’ayi dum

Okw'ebube nke Ndu!

Ndi-njo, genu nti oku'ahu,

Okw'ebube nke Ndu!

Enyer'ora n’efu,

Nakpo ayi bia n'igwé!

4.
Ol'uto nk'Ozi'oma nakpo,

Okw'ebube nke Ndu!

Neny'ora ngbaghara n'udo,

Okw'ebube nke Ndu!

Kraist, Onye-nzoputa,

Do ayi nso mgbe nile. Amen.

5.
M'agha d'ufu, ogu alugide,

Nti nanu abu nmeri nk'el’igwe.

Obi tiwe ik'ozo, aka d'ike.

Aleluya!

6.
Anyanwu nenwu s'ike n'anyasi,

Nd'ogu ndi kwesiri gez'ike ngwa,

Ngozi nk'udo nke Paradais d'uto.

Aleluya!

7.
M’ubochi otuto ka mna gabo;

Ndi nso gebili n'uwe nmeri-ha,

Eze nk'otuto naga n'uzo-Ya!

Aleluya!

8.
Site n'ala, n'osimari nile,

Usu agutagh-onu nezuko,

Naburu Nna, n'Okpara, na Mo Nso.

Aleluya! Amen

title: AKWUKWO NSO
first_line: Mo Nso kekuye okw’ume,  Ezi’okwu  weputa;  Ozizi na nkwa nenye ayi  Ihé nedo ayi nso.
subtitle: Nkpughepu okwu-Gi nile nenye ihe.
english_hint: Abu Oma 119. 130. The Spirit breathes upon the word.
lyrics:
1.
Mo Nso kekuye okw’ume,

Ezi’okwu  weputa;

Ozizi na nkwa nenye ayi

Ihé nedo ayi nso.

2.
Ututo, dika nke anwu,

Neme k’okwu nso nwue;

Nenye ogbo nile ihé:

Ihé-ya zur’ezu.

3.
Aka nyere' ya nenye kwa

Ihé n’oku nk’obi;

Ezi’okwu-ya nawaliri

Ndi-mba: o gagh-ada.

4.
K’ekele diri Gi mgbe dum

N’ihi’okwu di otu a,

Neme k’ihé nk’igwé nwuba

Nim'uwa nk’ ochichi.

5.
O nato obim ijeso

Onye m'huru n’anya,

Rue mgb’otuto genwukwasim

N’al’eze nk’el’igwe. Amen.

title: AKWUKWO NSO
first_line: Oriona diri nkwu-ayi,  Negosi ayi uzo;  Is’iyi nk’esi n'amara  Nk’el’igwe nye nd’ije.
subtitle: Nara-kwa nu ... mma-agha nke Mo Nso nke bu okwu Chineke.
english_hint: Ndi Efesos 6. 17. Lamp of our fect.
lyrics:
1.
Oriona diri nkwu-ayi,

Negosi ayi uzo;

Is’iyi nk’esi n'amara

Nk’el’igwe nye nd’ije.

2.
Nri nke nazi nkpur’obi-ayi,

Ezi nri si n’elu;

Ihe-ndu, ebe ayi nagu

Bayere el’igwé.

3.
Ogidi-oku n’abali,

Igw’oji n’ehihie;

Mgbe ifufe nefegid'ayi,

Ebe-ngbaba d’ike.

4.
Okwu Chuku ebigh-ebi,

Uche Qkpara-Ya;

I nedu nzo;-ukwu n’uwa,

Nezi uzo nk'igwe.

5.
Chuku, kwe k’ayi muta nk’oma

Amam-ihe nke-ya;

Natughari ozizi-ya

N'okwukwe nke nwata. Amen.

title: NZUKO KRAIST N'ELU-UWA
first_line: Nzuko-Kraist nw'otu nt’ala-  Jisus b’Onye-nwe-ya;  O ji miri na okwu  Ké ya okik’onu;  O si n’igwé bia cho ya Ibu nwunye-nso-Ya;  O ji obara gba ya,  We nwua n’ihi ndu-ya.
subtitle: Kraist-ayi bu kwa, isi nzuko-Ya
english_hint: Ndi Efesos 5. 23. The Church’s one foundation.
lyrics:
1.
Nzuko-Kraist nw'otu nt’ala-

Jisus b’Onye-nwe-ya;

O ji miri na okwu

Ké ya okik’onu;

O si n’igwé bia cho ya
Ibu nwunye-nso-Ya;

O ji obara gba ya,

We nwua n’ihi ndu-ya.

2.
Nroputa nke mba nile,

O b’otu nim'uwa;

Isi’okwu nzoputa-ya

Otu Nn'ot'okwukwe;

Nagozi otu aha,

Neri otu nri-nso,

Nagbas'ot'olil’anya,

Eyikwas’amara.

3.
Itu-n'anya na nleda

K’eji hu nmegbu-ya;

Nkewa n'ozizi-ugha

Nzkpagbu ya n'ezie.

Ma ndi nso neche kwa nche

Akwé-ha-" Ole mgbe?";

Anyasi nke ikw’akwa

Gagho utut'onu.

4.
Nim’ahuhu na ndogbu

N'uzu nke agha-ya,

O neche nmezu nile

Nk’udo ebigh-ebi;

Rue mgbe ohu otuto

K'eji gozi'anya-ya;

Nzuko uku gemeri,

Nwe kwa iz’ike-ya.

5.
N'uwa ya na Nna b’otu,

Chuk’Ato nim’Otu;

Neso kwa ndi nez’ike

Na nnweko di uto.

Ndi nso ndi no kwa n’onu!

Jisus, ny’ayi amara

K'ayi yiri ha, ndi nwayo.

We biyere I n'elu! Amen.

title: NZUKO KRAIST N'ELU-UWA
first_line: Jisus, noyere Nzuko-I,  Bur'Eze-Y n'Onye-ndu,  N'uwa nko nim'onwunwa  Biko nu olu-ayi.
subtitle: Ka Ya onwe-ya we ehe nzuko ahu n’iru Onwe-ya dika.
english_hint: Ndi Efesos 5. 27. Jesus, with Thy Church abide.
lyrics:
1.
Jisus, noyere Nzuko-I,

Bur'Eze-Y n'Onye-ndu,

N'uwa nko nim'onwunwa

Biko nu olu-ayi.

2.
Makua ya n'ihu-n'anya,

Zegidere ya nd’iro,

Gugua ya nim’ahuhu:

Biko nur’olu-ayi.

3.
Me k’ozizi na ndu-ya

Di nma, nye ya ntach'obi

K’O tukwas’obi na nkwa-I:

Biko nur'olu-ayi.

4.
Noyere ya mgbe nile

K'O ze njehie, k’O nacho

Otuto-I mgb’ebigh-ebi:

Biko nur’olu-ayi.

5.
Me k’olu-ya da s’ike,

Nekwu n’ikpe-Gi di nso,

Kwuput'Onye-nzoputa:

Biko nur’olu-ayi.

6.
Topu agbu-ya nile,

Me k'ekworo dum kwusi

Nye udo nk'elu-igwe:

Biko nur’olu-ayi.

7.
K’o bur'otu n'ozizi,

Otu nim'ihu-n'anya;

Neme k’ora kwere Gi;

Biko nur’olu-ayi.

8.
K'o chota ndi fur'efu,

Dur'ogbeye na nd'si,

Gwo ndi etiwar’obi:

Biko nur’olu-ayi.

9.
K’oku nk’ezi-okwu-ya

Nenwuwa, nenye ihé

Nime ochichiri-njo:

Biko nur’olu-ayi.

10.
Ekwel'obi-ya j’oyi,

Me ka ndi-nche-ya d’ike,

Gbara ndi nke-I ogige

Biko nur’olu-ayi.

11.
Ka nd’uko-ya zua ndi nke-I,

Ndi-nche-aturu nke-Gi

Jiker’idur’umu-Gi:

Biko nur’olu-ayi.

12.
Sachapu njo-ya nile,

Tinyua ujo o natu,

Wet’onu nmeri-ya ngwa:

Biko, nur’olu-ayi.

13.
K'o nwe otuto nile,

Di ocha pua na nmehie.

kwesi ibiakute I:

Biko nur’olu-ayi.

14.
Me k’o keta onu-Gi,

N'eb'ahu I doziri,

K'o nwe ngoz'ebigh-ebi:

Biko nur'olu-ayi.

15.
K'amar'Onye-nzoputa,

Na ihu-n'anya nke Nna,

Na nnweko Mo Nso noye;

Biko nur’olu-ayi. Amen.

title: UBOCHI ONYE-NWE-AYI
first_line: K'ala-eze-Gi bia,  Kraist, malite ichi;  Were nkpa n'aka-Gi  Tiwa ike nke njo.
subtitle: Ka ala-eze-Gi bia
english_hint: Matiu 6. 10.
lyrics:
1.
K'ala-eze-Gi bia,

Kraist, malite ichi;

Were nkpa n'aka-Gi

Tiwa ike nke njo.

2.
Ole udo-nke-Gi?

Ole ihe-n'anya?

Ole mgbe ikp'asi

Gebi, dika n'igwe?

3.
Ole mgb'ekwere nkwa

N'agha agagh-adi,

Agu njo na nmegbu

Gagbapu n'iru Gi?

4.
Nna, ayi nario I, bilie,

Wer'ik’uko-Gi bia;

Tute anya-nche-ayi,

Nke nele anya Gi.

5.
Madu neled’aha-I,

Anu negbu ndi nke-I;

Olu njo negosi

Na ihu-n’any’adigh.

6.
Nim'ala-ayi nile

Ochichi gbachiri:

Kpakpando ututu

Tie, k’I ghara ada! Amen.

title: UBOCHI ONYE-NWE-AYI
first_line: Jisus gachi n'ebe nile  Anyanwu naga ije-ya;  Al’eze-Ya ganugbasa  Rue mgbe onwu nagagh-adi.
subtitle: Ala-eze nke uwa aghqwo ala-eze nke Onye-nwe-ayi na nke Kraiet-Ya.
english_hint: Nkpughe 11. 15. Jesus shall reign where'er the sun.
lyrics:
1.
Jisus gachi n'ebe nile

Anyanwu naga ije-ya;

Al’eze-Ya ganugbasa

Rue mgbe onwu nagagh-adi.

2.
Agekpere Ya ekpere,

Kpube Ya okpu otuto;

Aha-Ya di k'isi uto

Nk’aja ekpere ututu.

3.
Ndi nasu asusu nile

Gabu ihu-n'anya nke-Ya;

Ol’umu-nta gabekwusa

Ngozi-ha n'elu aha-Ya.

4.
Ngozi nadi n’al’eze-Ya;

Ndi-nkporo nwere nmeghepu,

Nd’ike gwuru nezu ike,

Anagozi ndi nkpa nakpa.

5.
K’ora nile bilie weta

Ihe isopur’Eze-ayi;

Ndi-ozi ji abu rida,

Ndi bi n’uwa zanu. Amen.

title: NZOKU KRAIST N'ELU-UWA
first_line: Chineke, okwu-Gi  K'ochichiri nuru  We gbalaga.  Biko, nur’olu-ayi,  N’ebe nile n’uwa  Ozi-oma-I akerugh,  Me k’ihé di!
subtitle: Chineke we si, Ka ihé di: ihé we-di.
english_hint: Jenesis 1. 3. Thou whose Almighty Word.
lyrics:
1.
Chineke, okwu-Gi

K'ochichiri nuru

We gbalaga.

Biko, nur’olu-ayi,

N’ebe nile n’uwa

Ozi-oma-I akerugh,

Me k’ihé di!

2.
Jisus, I wetara

Na nku ngbaputa-Gi

Ndu n'ih'uzo;

Nagwo nd'oria n’obi,

Nasagh'anya nd’isi;

N’aru madu nile

Me k’ihé di!

3.
Mo Nso nk’ihu-n'anya

Nduru nso nenye ndu,

Nefe s'ike;

Neru n'elu miri,

Neb'oku amara,

N'ochichiri nk’uwa

Me k'ihe di!

4.
Ato nke di ngozi,

Triniti d’otuto,

Juputara

N'amam-ihe n'ike,

N'ihu-n’anya nile;

Eb’uwa soturu

Me k'ihé di. Amen.

title: AKWUKWO NSO
first_line: Nn’ayi, tute olu-Gi,  Setipu aka-Gi;  Me ka ndi-Gi nuru olu  Nakpote ndi nwuru.
subtitle: Jehova, tute olu-Gi.
english_hint: Habakuk 3. 2. Revive Thy work, O Lord.
lyrics:
1.
Nn’ayi, tute olu-Gi,

Setipu aka-Gi;

Me ka ndi-Gi nuru olu

Nakpote ndi nwuru.

2.
Nn’ayi, tute olu-Gi,

Ka nri ndu nagu ayi;

Kakpiri miri ndu nakpo

Nkpur’obi-ayi mgbe dum.

3.
Nn’ayi, tute olu-Gi,

Welite aha-Gi;

Me k'ihu-n’any’ayi di oku

Site na Mo Nso-Gi.

4.
Nn’ayi, tute olu-Gi,

Welite aha-Gi;

Me k'ihu-n’any’ayi di oku

Site na Mo Nso-Gi.

5.
Nn’ayi; tute olu-Gi,
  
Nye Okwu-Gi ike;

Kwe  k’ewer’okwukwe di ndu

Nur'Ozi-oma-Gi.

6.
Nn'ayi, tute olu-Gi,

Zosa ayi miri ndu;

Otuto-ya gabu nke-Gi,

Ngozi, gabu nke-ayi. Amen.

title: NZUKO KRAIST N'ELU-UWA.
first_line: Eze Zaion gachi na nmeri,  Uwa dum gekwere Ya;  Al’eze-Ya di otuto,  O gachi mgb’ebigh-ebi.
subtitle: O gabu kwa eze rue mgbe nile ebigh-ebi
english_hint: Nkpuche 11. 15. Zion's King shall reign victorious.
lyrics:
1.
Eze Zaion gachi na nmeri,

Uwa dum gekwere Ya;

Al’eze-Ya di otuto,

O gachi mgb’ebigh-ebi.

2.
Mba ezonariri Chuku

Gahu ihé otuto;

Abali gagho ehihie,

Igwé nuria n’ihu ya.

3.
Nd’Israel gbasara ger’uju

Cho Chuku, Onye-nwe-ha,

Le Y’anya, Ony’amapuru,

Tikue Ony'akpogburu.

4.
Ez’uku, setipu aka-I,

Kwagide   ol’otuto-I;

Wetara mba dum iye-aka,

Zo ha, ha gefebe Gi! Amen.

title: NZUKO KRAIST N'ELU-UWA
first_line: Onye etere manu,  Okpara nso Devid!  Ekele, na mgb'akara  K’O malite ichi!  O biar'iwepu nmegbu,  Itopu ndi-nkporo,  K’O kpochapu kwa, mmehie,  B'Eze n'eze'omume.
subtitle: Eze nile gakpo isi ala nye ya: Mba nile gefé ofufé.
english_hint: Abu Oma 72. ll. Hail to the Lord's Anointed.
lyrics:
1.
Onye etere manu,

Okpara nso Devid!

Ekele, na mgb'akara

K’O malite ichi!

O biar'iwepu nmegbu,

Itopu ndi-nkporo,

K’O kpochapu kwa, mmehie,

B'Eze n'eze'omume.

2.
Dik'igirigiri ngozi

K'O biara n'el'uwa;

Onu na ihu-n'anya

Nepute n'uzo-Ya.

Udo ka agekwusa

N'iru Ya n'el'ugwu;

Ez'omume geru kwa

Dik’iju n'uwa duru.

3.
O ji omuko leta

Ndi amemekp'aru,

Yere nd'ogbeye aka,

Gba nd'ike gwur'ume;

Is'ude-ha gho ihe;

Mo-ha nk'amara ikpe;

Di'ok'onun'anya-Ya,

4.
Nd'eze ga da n'iru Ya,

Weta ih'onyinye,

Mba nile ganefe Ya,

Nako otutu-Ya;

Mgbe dum k'agekpere Ya,

Neme nkwa kw'ubochi;

Al'eze-Ya bar'uba

Al'eze'ebigh-ebi.

5.
O ganadu n'och'eze

Nemeri nd'iro dum;

Otutu-Ya nagbasa,

Ngozi-Ya dir'ora.

Ogbugba-ndu-Ya nadi

We rue mgb'ebigh-ebi;

Aha-Ya enwegh ngbanwe,

Aha ihu-n'anya. Amen.

title: NZUKO KRAIST N'ELU-UWA
first_line: Nna, k’ala-eze-Gi bia,  K’O nabia n’ike di ndu;  Kwue okwu ikp'azu-Gi,  Webata oge nmeri.
subtitle: Nna. Ka edo aha-Gi nso. Ka ala-eze-Gi bia
english_hint: Luk 11. 2. Father, let Thy kingdom come.
lyrics:
1.
Nna, k’ala-eze-Gi bia,

K’O nabia n’ike di ndu;

Kwue okwu ikp'azu-Gi,

Webata oge nmeri.

2.
Dik'o biara na mgb’ochie

Nim'al'obi nke madu,

Mgbe ndi oma nwuru Gi-

Chineke, k'o bia ozo!

3.
Wep'och'eze nk’Ekwensu

Kpop’arusi n’obe-ha;

Chiba ochichi ka nma,

Kpube okpu-eze-Gi.

4.
Otut’aro gar'aga

K’I zir’ayi ekpere nka;

Anya nile neche nche

Ihu ihé-Gi nenwu.

5.
Ka chi nke Chineke bo!

Obi-ayi we nuri’onu;

Obi’uto n'abu di nso

Gekele obubo-ya.

6.
K’och’eze na mba nile

Buru ndi Chineke nwe;

Nim’obi nke madu dum,

Nna, k'ala-eze-Gi bia! Amen.

title: UBOCHI ONYE-NWE-AYI
first_line: Chuku nk'igwe, nur'abu-ayi,  Ayi bu nani umu-nta;  Biko, Nna, ayi biakute Gi  Nebut’aririo uku.
subtitle: Ka eme ihe I nacho, dika esi eme ya n’elu-igwe ka eme kwa, otu ahu n'uwa.
english_hint: Matiu 6. 10. God in heaven, hear our singing.
lyrics:
1.
Chuku nk'igwe, nur'abu-ayi,

Ayi bu nani umu-nta;

Biko, Nna, ayi biakute Gi

Nebut’aririo uku.

2.
Ayi nario I k'al'eze-Gi bia,

K’uwa zur'ike na Gi.

Ka ndi mara I na ndi kwere I

Hu Gi n’anya, neto Gi.

3.
K'akuko uto nke onu

Nke ihu-n'anya Jisus,

Bur'abu otuto n’uwa,

Yie nke ndi-m'ozin'igwe.

4.
Zite ike nke Mo Nso-Gi,

Kpota nd'uwa n'iru Gi,

N'ihi n'al'eze bu nke-Gi,

N'ike n'otutu mgbe dum. Amen.

title: UBOCHI ONYE-NWE-AYI
first_line: N'ihi ndi nso, ndi nez'ike n'olu,  Ndi ji okwukwe kwusa Gi n'uwa,  K'Aha-Gi, Jisus, bur'aha ngozi.  Aleluya!
subtitle: Ayi nweré oke igwé ndi-ama di otu a ndi gbara ayi buruburu dika igwe-oji.
english_hint: Ndi Hibru 12. 1. For all the saints, who from their labours rest.
lyrics:
1.
N'ihi ndi nso, ndi nez'ike n'olu,

Ndi ji okwukwe kwusa Gi n'uwa,

K'Aha-Gi, Jisus, bur'aha ngozi.

Aleluya!

2.
Gi b'ebe-ngbaba, nkume, n'ike-ha;

Gi b'Ochi-agba n'agha-ha nile;

Gi nim'ohichiri b'ez'ihé-ha.

Aleluya!

3.
Ka ndi-agha oma-Gi, ndi d'ike,

Lua ogu-ha ka ndi nso nke mgb’ochie

Soro ha nweta okpu nke nmeri.

Aleluya!

4.
Nriko di ngozi nnweko nke di nso!

Ayi nalu ogu, ha no n'otuto;

M'ayi b'otu nime Gi, ayi dum bu nke-I.

Aleluya!

5.
M'agha d'ufu, ogu alugide,

Nti nanu abu nmeri nk'el’igwe.

Obi tiwe ik'ozo, aka d'ike.

Aleluya!

6.
Anyanwu nenwu s'ike n'anyasi,

Nd'ogu ndi kwesiri gez'ike ngwa,

Ngozi nk'udo nke Paradais d'uto.

Aleluya!

7.
M’ubochi otuto ka mna gabo;

Ndi nso gebili n'uwe nmeri-ha,

Eze nk'otuto naga n'uzo-Ya!

Aleluya!

8.
Site n'ala, n'osimari nile,

Usu agutagh-onu nezuko,

Naburu Nna, n'Okpara, na Mo Nso.

Aleluya! Amen

title: UBOCHI ONYE-NWE-AYI
first_line: Nka b'ubohi Chuku doro,  O kpo y'oge nke-Ya;  K'igwé n’ala nuria n'otu,  Neto Ya n’och'eze.
subtitle: Nka bu ubochi Jehova meworo; ayi geteghari egwu onu nuri kwa onu nime Ya
english_hint: Abu Oma 118. 24. This is the day the Lord hath made.
lyrics:
1.
Nka b'ubohi Chuku doro,

O kpo y'oge nke-Ya;

K'igwé n’ala nuria n'otu,

Neto Ya n’och'eze.

2.
Ta  k'O si n’onwu bilite,

Ik’Ekweusu ada;

Ta ka ndi nso to nmeri-Ya,

Nekwusa ike-Ya.

3.
Hosanna diri Eze-ayi,

Okpara nso Devid!

Yer’ayi aka, si n’oche-Gi

Wetar’ayi nzoputa.

4.
Ngozi diri Ony’ahu ji

Ozi nk’amara bia;

Nke nabia n’aha Chineke

K'O zoputa  ndi-njo.

5.
Hosanna! otuto kasi

Nzuko nk’uwa genye;

Elu-igwe, eb'O nachi,

Geto Ya kari nka. Amen.

Responsorial Psalm for Easter Sunday| Year C | This is the day the Lord has made

title: UBOCHI ONYE NWE-AYI
first_line: Ta b’ubochi ihé,  Me ka ihé di ta;  Jisus, bia n'ochichiri-ayi,  Chupu ngbachi-ya dum.
subtitle: Debe ubochi-izu-ike, ido ya nso
english_hint: Deut. 5. 12. This is the day of light.
lyrics:
1.
Ta b’ubochi ihé,

Me ka ihé di ta;

Jisus, bia n'ochichiri-ayi,

Chupu ngbachi-ya dum.

2.
Ta b'uboch'iz'ike,

Nye ayi ike onu;

Nim'uche n’ob’ike gwuru

Tuye ike ndu-Gi.

3.
Ta b’ubochi-udo,

Mejue ayi n'udo-Gi;

Wepu adigh-n'otu nile,

Chupu ise-okwu.

4.
Ta b’uboch’ekpere,

K’uwa n’igwé bia nso;

Welie obi-ayi icho Gi,

Bia zute ayi n’ebe a.

5.
Ta b’ubochi nke-nbu;

Zipu ume ndu-Gi,

Kpote ndi-njo ka ha to Gi,

Onye-nmeri onwu. Amen.

title: UBOCHI ONYE-NWE-AYI
first_line: Ulo-I n’igwé mara nma,  N’al’ihé n’ihu-n’anya;  Ulo-I n’uwa mara nma,  N'ala njo n'ahuhu nka.  Agu nagu nkpur’obim  Inwe nmeko ndi nso-Gi,  Ihu onwunwu iru-I,  N’izu-oké amara-I.
subtitle: Le ka ebe-obibi-Gi nile si buru ebe ahuru n'anya nke-uku, Jehova, nke usu nile nke neli.
english_hint: Abu Oma 84. 1. Pleasant are Thy courts above.
lyrics:
1.
Ulo-I n’igwé mara nma,

N’al’ihé n’ihu-n’anya;

Ulo-I n’uwa mara nma,

N'ala njo n'ahuhu nka.

Agu nagu nkpur’obim

Inwe nmeko ndi nso-Gi,

Ihu onwunwu iru-I,

N’izu-oké amara-I.

2.
Nnunu nabu ab’onu

N’ebe-ichu-aja-Gi;

Obi onu nez’ike

N'obi Nna nk’elu-igwe!

Dika nduru fur’uzo

Nahugh ebe-iz’ike,

Ha gala n'ugbo nke-ha,

Nodu n’onu mgbe nile.

3.
Ndi no n'onu neto Gi

Obuna nim'uwa nka;

Miri nasu n'ozara,

Nri si n’igwé nazu ha,

Ha naga n’i1°u 1i’ike

We rue n’oche-eze-Gi;

Nada n’ukwu-Gi neto

Onye duru ha n’udo.

4.
Nna, ka m’gbat'ih'ozo nka!

Durum ga n’aj’uwa nka;

Wor’amara-Gi debem,

Nyem onodu n'ulo-Gi.

Anyanwu n’Ota k’I bu,

Dur-obi-nfughari nkem;

Gi nw’otuto n’amara,

Ka ha dirim, Onye-nwem! Amen.

title: Back</divUBOCHI ONYE-NWE-AYI
first_line: Ubochi ta, n'Okwu nke-Gi  Ka ekere uwa n’ihé;  Chineke, mukwasi ayi ta,  Mejue obi-ayi n’ihé-Gi.
subtitle: Ubochi Onye-nwe-ayi.
english_hint: Nkpughe 1. 10. This day, at Thy creating word.
lyrics:
1.
Ubochi ta, n'Okwu nke-Gi

Ka ekere uwa n’ihé;

Chineke, mukwasi ayi ta,

Mejue obi-ayi n’ihé-Gi.

2.
Ta ka Jisus, Onye nwuru,

Biliri n’ike nke nmeri;

Jisus, me k’ayi si n’onwu njo

Soro Gi bilie, di kwa ndu.

3.
Ubochi ta Mo Nso biara

N'ire-oku nke wasara;

Mo Nso, mejue obi-ayi ta

N'amara-Gi ikp’ekpere.

4.
Uboch'amara, ndu, n’ihé!

Nk’iz'ike si n’olu nk’uwa!

Oge nso-Gi nk'ihu-n'anya,

Chineke, ayi nyeghachiri I.

5.
Otuto nile diri Nna,

N’Okpara amuru n’anya,

Na Mo Nso Onye ayi neto

Rue mgbe nile ebigh-ebi. Amen.

title: UBOCHI ONYE-NWE-AYI
first_line: Agajem ulo-I, Chuku,  Ikpo isi’ala natom,  Mgbe n'gezute n’ulo nso-I  Kraist, n’ir’och’ebere-Ya.
subtitle: Anurirm onu mgbe ha nasim Ka ayi je je n'ulo Jehova.
english_hint: To thy temple I repair. This is the day the Lord hath made.
lyrics:
1.
Agajem ulo-I, Chuku,

Ikpo isi’ala natom,

Mgbe n'gezute n’ulo nso-I

Kraist, n’ir’och’ebere-Ya.

2.
Ya mere k’ayi di n’otu;

Ya mere ka m’gho nwa-Gi,

Abba, Nna, nyem amara

Icbo iru-I n’ulo-Gi.

3.
Mgb’anabu ab’otuto-I,

Biko, topu ire nkem;

K’obim wer’onu gozie

Gi, bu ezi-omumem.

4.
Mgbe ndi nso nekp’ekpere,

Chuk'ihu-anya, nurum!

Nuru, Mo nke-Gi nario;

Nuru, Jisus nario kwa.

5.
Mgbe ndi-ozi-Gi nezi

Ngbaghara n’udo n’aha-I;

Me ka m’site n’olu-ha

Nu Okwu-Gi si n’igwé.

6.
Mgbe m’si n’ulo-Gi lata,

K’obim nekp’oku nimem;

Ma m’anyasi me ka m’si,

Mu na Chuku akpa ta! Amen.

title: UBOCHI ONYE-NWE-AYI
first_line: Chuku, ayi abia ugbu a,  N’ukwu-I k'ayi gbur-ikpere;  Akpapula aririo,  Ayi garioro Gi n’efu?
subtitle: O geru kwa na, tutu ha akpo, Mu onwem gaza: mgbe ha onwe-ha no nekwu okwu, Mu onwem ganu.
english_hint: Aisaia 65. 24. Lords we come before Thee now.
lyrics:
1.
Chuku, ayi abia ugbu a,

N’ukwu-I k'ayi gbur-ikpere;

Akpapula aririo,

Ayi garioro Gi n’efu?

2.
Gi k'ayi tukwasir'obi,

Wer'ebere ridata;

Meju’obi-ayi n’amara,

Me k'onu-ayi neto Gi.

3.
N’uzo nke I doziri

Ayi biara ichota Gi;

Chuku, ezipula ayi,

Ghara inye ayi ngozi.

4.
Site n’ozi-oma-Gi

Zite okw’udo n’onu;

Ka Mo-Gi ny’obi nile
Nzoputa-Gi zur’oké.

5.
Kasie obi ner'uju,

K'oge onu laghachi;

Palie ndi-Gi dar'ada,

Nye ha okwukwe d'ike.

6.
Kwe k’ayi nile choputa

Gi, bu Onye-ebere:

Gwo ndi-oria nile nk'ayi,

Zilag'ayi n'onu nke-Gi.   Amen.

title: UBOCHI ONYE-NWE-AYI
first_line: I Nna, ayi zukot'ozo n’aha Jisus,  Kpo isi ala nye I na ncheghari;  Ayi we1i’ozo olu nadigh nké;  Nario ebere, nabu ututo-I.
subtitle: M'gebili jekuru nnam, m’gasi kwa ya, Nna, emehlewom megide elu-igwe, na n’iru gi.
english_hint: Luk 15. 18 Father, again in Jesus name we meet.
lyrics:
1.
I Nna, ayi zukot'ozo n’aha Jisus,

Kpo isi ala nye I na ncheghari;

Ayi we1i’ozo olu nadigh nké;

Nario ebere, nabu ututo-I.

2.
Ayi gagozi ncheb’ebigh-ebi-Gi,

Nekwuputa olu-Gi kw’ubochi;

Ejigh ebere-I nekpube ndu-ayi?

O bugh aka-I gbar’ayi buruburu?

3.
Ewo! ayi ekwesigh ihu-n’anya-I;

Otutu mgbe k’ukwu-ayi fur’efu!

M’ugbu a, n’ih’o1u-Gi nagb’ayi ume,

Ayi ndi-njo lata n’ulo-Gi ka Nna.

4.
N’ih’Aha nk’ozuzu bi nime Ya,

Site n'ihu-n’anya nke kachasi,

N’Obara nk’awusiri n’ihi njo,

Meghe uzo ebere kpobat'ayi! Amen.

title: UBOCHI ONYE-NWE-AYI
first_line: Nna, were ngozi-I zila'ayi,  Mejue ayi n'onu n’udo;  K'ayi nile nwe ihu-n'anya-I,  Nanuri na nzoputa-I.  Nagb'ayi ume,  Nd’ije n’Qhia uwa nka.
subtitle: Nadinu n'udo: Chineke nke ihu-n'anya na udo ganoye-kwa-ra unu
english_hint: Lord dismiss us with Thy blessing.
lyrics:
1.
Nna, were ngozi-I zila'ayi,

Mejue ayi n'onu n’udo;

K'ayi nile nwe ihu-n'anya-I,

Nanuri na nzoputa-I.

Nagb'ayi ume,

Nd’ije n’Qhia uwa nka.

2.
N'ihi olu Ozi-oma
  
Ayi nekele, neto Gi;

K’amia nkpuru nzoputa-Gi

Nim'obi-ayi na ndu-ayi.

Ka iru-Gi

Noyeré ayi mgbe nile.

3.
Mgb'agamu olu nke opi,

Ayi gesi n’uwa bilie;

Were nku m'ozi la n'igwe,

Neji onu za oku,

Mgb'ebigh-ebi

K’ayi na Kraist buko Eze.   Amen.

youtube_options.title: 064 SDA Hymn - Lord Dismiss Us With Thy Blessing (Singing w/ Lyrics)

title: BAPTISM.
first_line: Mo Nso, si n'e1u ridata,  Gi Onye nasach’obi-ayi;  Ka akéré nke amara,  Ji miri nka gb’ama ugbu a.
subtitle: Neme ha baptism ba n’aha nke Nna., na nke Okpara, na nke Mo Nso.
english_hint: Matiu 28. 19. Come, Holy Ghost, descend from high.
lyrics:
1.
Mo Nso, si n'e1u ridata,

Gi Onye nasach’obi-ayi;

Ka akéré nke amara,

Ji miri nka gb’ama ugbu a.

2.
Wusa ike-I ka Chineke

Fesa obara nke Jisus

Ka Nna, n’Okpara, na Mo Nso.

Do umu ndia umu Chuku.   Amen.

youtube_options.title: Abu 102- Mọ Nsọ, si n'elu ridata.Come, Holy Ghost…

title: UBOCHI ONYE-NWE-AYI
first_line: Chuku, Ike n’Olil’any'ayi,  Onye nkwa-I adigh-ada,  Nar'umu ndia mgb'ebigh-ebi  N’otu nd’I j’obara gba.
subtitle: Mu onwem gakpobuta kwa unu, buru kwa unu Nna, unu onwe-unu gabu-kwa-ram umu-ndikom na umu-ndinyem.
english_hint: 2 Ndi Koriot 6. 17-18. O God, our strength our hope, our work.
lyrics:
1.
Chuku, Ike n’Olil’any'ayi,

Onye nkwa-I adigh-ada,

Nar'umu ndia mgb'ebigh-ebi

N’otu nd’I j’obara gba.

2.
Ayi ewer'Ah'ato-nso-Gi

Ka h'akara na miri;

Nario I k’I nye ha onodu

N’etiti-umu nke-Gi.

3.
Ayi kara obe-I n’iru-ha,

Ih’ama nk’ahuhu-Gi;

Ka nkwa ha kwer'ugbu a buru

Nkwuputa ndu-ha mile.

4.
Ekwela, Nna, ka ndu n’onwu

Kewapu ha n’eb'I no;

Ka ha kwesi ntukwas’obi,

Buru nke-I mgb’ebigh-ebi.   Amen.

title: UBOCHI ONYE-NWE-AYI
first_line: K'i ghar’it’ujo ib’onye  Nke Kraist akpogburu,  Ayi aka obe-Ya n’iru-i,  Me gi nani nke-Ya.
subtitle: Ya mere ka ihere ama nke Onye-nwe-ayi ghara imo gi
english_hint: 2 Timoti 1. 8. In token that thou shalt not fear.
lyrics:
1.
K'i ghar’it’ujo ib’onye

Nke Kraist akpogburu,

Ayi aka obe-Ya n’iru-i,

Me gi nani nke-Ya.

2.
K’ihere ghara ime gi

Ito aha nso-Ya,

Ayi me k’aput’ihé n’iru-i

Nleda n’otuto-Ya.

3.
K’i ghar’ilaghachi azu

N’iluru Kraist ogu,

N'okpuru okoloto-Ya

Jis’ike ka nwoke.

4.
K’i mara na i ghagh iso

Uzo nk’O gafere,

Buru obe, lel’ihere,

Nodu ala n’igwé.

5.
Ayi si otu a n’iru ora

Ka gi nke-Ya n’ezie;

K’iru nke nebu obe-Ya

Keta okp’eze-Ya! Amen.

title: UBOCHI ONYE-NWE-AYI
first_line: Chukum, nara nkpur’obim ta,  K'O buru nke-I mgbe dum;  Ka m’ghar’irapu Gi kpafue,  Ghar’idaghchi'azu.
subtitle: Obim nile ka m’wereworo eho Gi; Ekwela ka, m'si n’ihe mile I nyere n’iwu jehie.
english_hint: Abu Oma 119. 19. My God, accept my heart this day.
lyrics:
1.
Chukum, nara nkpur’obim ta,

K'O buru nke-I mgbe dum;

Ka m’ghar’irapu Gi kpafue,

Ghar’idaghchi'azu.

2.
N'iru obe nk’Onye nwuru,

Le, ka m’gbur’ikpere;

Kwe k’akpogbue nmehie nile,

Ka Kraist bur’ihe dum.

3.
Tem manu amara nk'igwé,

Me kwa ka m’buru nke-I;

Ka m'hu iru otuto-Gi,

Fe Gi n’och'eze-Gi.

4.
K’echiche, n’o1u n’okwu dum

Buru nke-Gi mgbe dum;

Jisus, ka m’were ndum fe Gi,

Onwu gab'uz'igwe!   Amen.

title: INYE-IKE.
first_line: Nke-I mgbe dum! Chuku oma,  Si n'igwé nur’olu~ayi;  K’ayi buru nke-Gi mgbe dum,  Ugbu a na mgb’ebigh-ebi.
subtitle: Mu onwem nenye kwa ha ndu ebigh-abi, ha apagh ala kwa n’iyi ma-oli rue mgbe ebigh-ebi
english_hint: Jon 10. 28. Thine for ever! God of love.
lyrics:
1.
Nke-I mgbe dum! Chuku oma,

Si n'igwé nur’olu~ayi;

K’ayi buru nke-Gi mgbe dum,

Ugbu a na mgb’ebigh-ebi.

2.
Nke-I mgbe dum! Onye-nwe ndu,

Cheb’ayi n’ogu nk’uwa nka;

Gi b’Uzo, Ndu, ni’Ezi’okwu;

Dur’ayi la n’ala ihé.

3.
Nke-I mgbe dum! ha di ngozi,

Ndi nwer’iz’ike na Gi;

Onye-nzotam n’Onye-nchem,

Lur’ayi ogu mgbe nile.

4.
Nke-I mgbe dum! Jisus, cheb’ayi,

B’umu-aturu nke-Gi;

Ayi di ndu nani na Gi,

K’ayi keta ih'oma-Gi,

5.
Nke-I mgbe dum! Onye-ndu-ayi,

Nkp’ayi nile ka Gi negbo;

I gagbaghara njo-ayi,

Si n’uwa dul'ayi n'igwé.   Amen.

youtube_options.title: EKPERE na Abu: Nke’I mgbe Dum CHUKWU oma- Thine forever God of love- organist: Johanan Onuoha

title: INYE-IKE.
first_line: Jisus, dik’Okwu-Gi si di,  N’obi ume-ala,  Nka ka m’geme, Onye nwuru,  Agamecheta Gi.
subtitle: Nemeru nka ka unu we nechetam
english_hint: Luk 22. 19. According so Thy gracious word.
lyrics:
1.
Jisus, dik’Okwu-Gi si di,

N’obi ume-ala,

Nka ka m’geme, Onye nwuru,

Agamecheta Gi.

2.
Aru-Gi anyawara nyem,

Gabu nrim si n’igwé;

Agamahu n’iko ngozi-I,

Were ya cheta Gi.

3.
M’ganechefu Getsemane?

M’gahu igba-ngba-Gi,

N’osus’obara n’ahuhu-I,

Ghara icheta Gi?

4.
Mgbe m’chere iru n’obe-Gi,

Lekwasi Kalvari:

Nw’aturu Chuku, Aja nkem,

Aghaghm-icheta Gi;

5.
Cheta Gi, n'ihe-ngbu-Gi dum,

N'ihu-n'anya-I n'arum;

Ebe ume-ndu foduru,

Agamecheta Gi.

6.
Ma mgbe Onum kpuchitara,

M'akpa-uchem lara,

Mgbe I gabia n'al'eze-Gi,

jisus, biko, chetam. Amen.

title: ORIRI NSO.
first_line: Bia n'okwukwe nar'aru Onye-nwe-i,  Nua obara-nso-Ya nko wusiri.
subtitle: Iko nke ngozi ahu nke ayi nagozi o bugh nnweko Kraist? Achicha ahu nke ayi nanyawa, o bugh nnweko aru Kraist?
english_hint: 1 Ndi Korint 10. 16. Draw nigh and take the Body of the Lord.
lyrics:
1.
Bia n'okwukwe nar'aru Onye-nwe-i,

Nua obara-nso-Ya nko wusiri.

2.
Aru n'obara-Ya zoputar’ayi,

Obi di ndu k’ayi ji kele Chuku

3.
Kraist, Nwa Chineke, Onye-nzoputa

Site n'onwu-Ya n’obe nwe nmeri.

4.
Achuru Ya n'ihi madu nile,

Ya b’Onye-nchu-aja, n’anu aja.

5.
Iw’ochie ji anu achu aja,

Nenomi ihe-omimi nk’igwé.

6.
Jisus, Onye-ngbaputa na Ihé,

Ji amara yere ndi nso aka.

7.
Werenu obi ezi-okwu bia,

Nar’ihe-mbe nke nzoputa n’ebe a.

8.
Onye nechebe ndi nso-Ya n'uwa,

Nenye ndi kwere ndu ebigh-ebi.

9.
Nri nk’igwé k’O nenye bdi-agu,

Nye obi nke nacho miri nke, ndu.

10.
Ony'ikpe uwa, Onye-nzoputa'ayi,

N’oriri ihu-n'anya-I noyer'ayi!   Amen.
