title: ORIRI NSO.
first_line: N'abai'ahu k’arara Ya  Nye n’aka iwe nd’iro dum,  Ka Onye-nzoputa uwa  Ji nara ogbe achicha.
subtitle: Nka bu arum, nke aneny, n'ihi unu bu ogbugba-ndu ohu nime obaram.
english_hint: 1 Ndi Korint 11. 24-35. Twas on that night when doomed to know
lyrics:
1.
N'abai'ahu k’arara Ya

Nye n’aka iwe nd’iro dum,

Ka Onye-nzoputa uwa

Ji nara ogbe achicha.

2.
Mgb’O nyesiri Ya ekele,

Bu Onye nwe uwa n’igwé.

Q nyaw’ih’atu nk’aru-Ya,

Nye ndi nes’uzo-Ya, nasi:-

3.
"Arum nke anyawara nye

N’ih’unu, nara, rie, di ndu:

Mgbe nile unu geme ya,

Necheta ihu-n’anya nkem."

4.
O nara iko n’aka-Ya,

Nye Chuku otuto ozo;

K’omiko nenwu n’obi-Ya,

Nzoputa si n’onu-Ya bia.

5.
"Obara nkem k’awusiri

K’o sacha obi nke nmehie;

Ogbugba-ndu nka gosiri

Amar'ebigh-ebi nk'igwe.

6.
Ihu-n’anya jur'iko nka,

K'ora nua manya nso ahu;

Nanunu ya n'ogbo nile,

Necheta oge onwu nkem."   Amen.

title: ORIRI NSO.
first_line: Jisus, dut'ayi n’oriri-I,  Wer’ezi nri nenye ndu  Nazu nkpur’obi nile.
subtitle: Ha gelegide Onye ahu Nke ha mapuru amapu
english_hint: Jon 19. 37. Jesus, to Thy table led.
lyrics:
1.
Jisus, dut'ayi n’oriri-I,

Wer’ezi nri nenye ndu

Nazu nkpur’obi nile.

2.
Mgb’ayi gbur'ikpere nwayo,

Me k’ayi mar’ir'uto-Gi,

Gosi ayi ihu-n’anya.

3.
Mgb’ayi nelekwas'obe-Gi,

Nakwar’uzo-nmehie-ayi,

Me k'uju-ayi gho onu.

4.
Mgb’ayi nahu manya di nso,

Ih’ama nk'obara-Gi,

Nye ayi ihu-n’anya-Gi.

5.
Dor’ayi bia n'akuku-Gi

Miri-ngwopu si eru,

Zobe nmehi’ayi n’eb’ahu.

6.
Topu ayi n'agbu nke njo,

K’okwukwe-nt’ayi ba uba,

Nwat’ru Chuku, ny’ayi udo.

7.
Wer'aka-I amapuru

Dur'ayi ga n’ir’och’eze-I,

N'ala ihé nke ka uma.   Amen

title: INYE-IKE.
first_line: Icheta ihu-n’anya Kraist,  Ayi nwer’oriri nso,  Ebe obi di um’a la  Nwere nkpobata-ya.
subtitle: Nemenu nka ka unu we nechatam
english_hint: 1 Ndi Korint 11. 24. In memory of the Saviour’s love.
lyrics:
1.
Icheta ihu-n’anya Kraist,

Ayi nwer’oriri nso,

Ebe obi di um’a la

Nwere nkpobata-ya.

2.
N'bkwukwe ayi ji nri nke ndu

Nazu nkpur’obi-ayi;

Iko negosi Obara

Nk’awusiriri ayi.

3.
Ebube nk’ihu-n’anya-Ya

Bu abu-ayi ugbu a;

N’okwukwe k’ayi nele anya

Oriri nk’el’igwé.   Amen.

title: INYE-IKE.
first_line: Chineke, wedat'onwe-Gi,  Nuru ekpere Nzuko-Gi,  N’ihi gekwus’okwu-Gi,  Ndi jikere ije ozi-I.
subtitle: Ndi ha guzoro n'iru ndi-ozi: Mgbe ha kpasiri ekpere, ha we bikwasi ha aka n'isi
english_hint: Olu Ndi Ozi 6. 6. Bow down Thine ear, Almighty Lord.
lyrics:
1.
Chineke, wedat'onwe-Gi,

Nuru ekpere Nzuko-Gi,

N’ihi gekwus’okwu-Gi,

Ndi jikere ije ozi-I.

2.
Nna, were ebere-I kuye

Ume ndu Mo Nso-Gi n’aru

Ndi akpor’izu aturu

Nke Kraist ji onwu-Ya gbata

3.
Kraist, si n'aka-I amapuru,

Wukwasi ha onyinye-Gi;

Ka ndi guzoro n'iru Gi

Neme uche-I n’ihu-n'anya.

4.
Mo di ngozi, biyere ha,

Nye amara ikp'ekpere;

K’ebe ha nedu aturu-I,

Ha we naga n’uzo di nkpa.

5.
Chuku, zitere ha ike-I,

Chebe ha ka ha pua na njo;

Ka ha nogide nime Gi,

Nat'okpu nke ndu m'emesia.   Amen

title: INYE-IKE.
first_line: Otu m’di ibu nke-I, Onye  Hurum n’anya, Ey’umu-nta,  Ka m’do onwem nso, ma nye Gi,   O Jisus Kraist-Abiam.
subtitle: Ya me ka unu zue oke n'ezi ihe nile o bula ime ihe O nacho neme nime ayi ihe nato ezi uto n'iru Ya, site n'aka Jisus Kraist.
english_hint: Ndi Hibru 13. 21. Just as I am, Thine own to be.
lyrics:
1.
Otu m’di ibu nke-I, Onye

Hurum n’anya, Ey’umu-nta,

Ka m’do onwem nso, ma nye Gi,
 
O Jisus Kraist-Abiam.

2.
N’ututu onu nk’ubochim

Ka m'nye Gi ndum, mezu nkwa nkem,

Me ngwa, newezugagh ihe,

Wer’obim nile bia.

3.
Kraist, si n'aka-I amapuru,

Wukwasi ha onyinye-Gi;

Ka ndi guzoro n'iru Gi

Neme uche-I n’ihu-n'anya.

4.
Agamebi n’ihe mgbe dum,

M’galuru ih'oma olu,

Were ikem nile fe Gi,

Ya mere ka m’ji bia.

5.
Otu m’di, nwata, di ike,

Ibu ezi’onye k’ikem ra,

N ’ihi ezi’omume na Gi,

Onye-nwe-ndum-Abiam.

6.
N’ihi Gi ka m’luzue olum,

We nata kwa okpu'nmeri

Bia togbo ya n'ukwu nke-Gi,

Onye-nzotam-Abiam.   Amen.

title: INYE-IKE.
first_line: Gi Ihu-n’anya, kachas'uche madu,  N’ekpere k’ayi nada n'och’eze-Gi,  Ka ha nwe ihu-n’anya nadigide,  Bu ndi I jikoro ebigh-ebi.
subtitle: Jehova mem otu a, mekwamihe ozo otu a, mgbe ihe nabugh onwu onwe-ya gekewa mu na gi
english_hint: Rut 1. 17. O perfect Love, all humans thought transcending.
lyrics:
1.
Gi Ihu-n’anya, kachas'uche madu,

N’ekpere k’ayi nada n'och’eze-Gi,

Ka ha nwe ihu-n’anya nadigide,

Bu ndi I jikoro ebigh-ebi.

2.
Gi Ndu zur’ezu, nye ha nghota nke-Gi,

Nk'obi~oma n’okwukwe sir’ike,

Nk’olil’anya, n’ezi nkasi-obi,

Na ntukwasi-obi nenwegh egwu.

3.
Nye ha ohu neme k’ahuhu di nfe,

N ’udo neme k’og’uwa nka dajua;

Nye ubochi ndu-ha echi mara nma,

Mgbe chi gabo n’ihu-n’anya na ndu.   Amen

title: INYE-IKE.
first_line: N’ebe a k’ayi nenwe nsogbu,  N’ebe a nzuko nwenkewa,  Nkewa adigh n’igwé.
subtitle: Obi-uto na onu ka ha gabiarute: iru-uju na ize-ume ewe gbalaga.
english_hint: Aisai 35. 10. Here we suffer grief and pain;
lyrics:
1.
N’ebe a k’ayi nenwe nsogbu,

N’ebe a nzuko nwenkewa,

Nkewa adigh n’igwé.

2.
Ndi huru Jisus n'anya

Galakuru Ya n’igwé,

Soro ndi nso n’ehi.

3.
Umu-nta gebi n’igwé,

Ndi choro Nn’ayi n’ekpere

N’ulo-Ya n’uwa nka.

4.
Nd’ozizi-ayi gezu kwa,

Na ndi ayi huru n’anya,

Ghar’ikeWa ozo.

5.
Ohu-ayi gadi uku,

N’ihi n’ayi gahu Jisus

K’O no n’och’eze-Ya.

6.
Ayi nile geji onu

Neto Kraist, bu Onye-nw'ayi.

Rue mgbe ebigh-ebi.   Amen.

title: ILI OZU.
first_line: Ndi nwuru nwe ngozi  Nez’ike na Jisus,  Ndi tukwasir’isi  N'obi-Ya mgbe nile.
subtitle: Chineke gehichapu kwa anya-miri nile o bula n'anya-ha.
english_hint: Nkpughe 7. 17. Hush! blessed are the dead.
lyrics:
1.
Ndi nwuru nwe ngozi

Nez’ike na Jisus,

Ndi tukwasir’isi

N'obi-Ya mgbe nile.

2.
Ohu nke di ngozi,

Nenwegh ochichiri!

Ha hu Ihé nk’Ihé,

Nke ha huru n’anya.

3.
H’agafewo uwa,

Ya na ahuhu~Ya;

Ih’egwu nk’abali,

N'anwu nekpo oku.

4.
Jisus geduru ha

N'eb’ifufe adigh;

Eb’ahihia neto

Na nso is’iyi ndu.

5.
Nani ayi, ndi no nso

Ili, bu ndi kwara

Ih’oge gar’aga,

N’onyinyo foduru.

6.
Olu-ha n’iru-ha,

Ihu-n'anya ha ji-

Na mgbe-ya foduru,

Uwa amagh kwa ha.

7.
Ndi nwer’obi-oma,

Nche ikp'azu agwu!

Ayi nakwa n’ih’unu,

Atal'ayi. Kraist kwara!

8.
Ngwa ngwa mgbe chi gabo,

Olu oku Jisus

Nke ka onwu n‘ike

Gasi, Bilie, nuria!   Amen.

title: ILI OZU.
first_line: Mgbe ayi ruru n’ahuhu,  Mgbe anya-miri nagb’ayi,  Mgb’ayi nakwa ndi-ayi lara,  Jisus, Nwa Devid, nuru.
subtitle: N'ezie oria nile nke ayi ka onwe-ya bupuworo, ihe-ngbu nile nke ayi kwa, o buworo ha.
english_hint: Aisaia 53. 4. When our heads are bowed with woe.
lyrics:
1.
Mgbe ayi ruru n’ahuhu,

Mgbe anya-miri nagb’ayi,

Mgb’ayi nakwa ndi-ayi lara,

Jisus, Nwa Devid, nuru.

2.
I yir’anu-aru-ayi,

I buru ihe-ngbu-ayi;

I gbapur'anya-miri,

Jisus, Nwa Devid, nuru.

3.
I rubew'isi-I n’onwu,

I wusiw’obara-ndu;

Adobar’ozu-I n'ili,

Jisus, Nwa Devid, nuru.

4.
Mgbe obi neru uju,

Neche nmehie-ya nile;

Mgbe mo-ayi natu ogwu,

Jisus, Nwa Devid, nuru.

5.
Mgbe atan onwu naku

N'ihi obi-ayi nala;

Mgb'uboch’ikpe-ayi di nso,

Jisus, Nwa Devid, nuru.

6.
I mar’ihere na ngbu

N’ihi njo nabugh nke-Gi;

Ma I kwerew ibu ha,

Jisus, Nwa Devid, nuru.

7.
I gabigara n’onwu,

I sachapuru njo-ayi;

I no n’aka-nri Chuku,

Okpara Chuku, nuru. Amen.

title: ELU-IGWE
first_line: Abum obia n'ebe a,  Igwé b'ulom;  Nani onye-ije,  Igwe b’ulom.  Ih'egwu n'ahuhu  Gharam buruburu;  Igwe bu ala-Nnam,  Igwe b’ulom.
subtitle: N'ihi na ala-ayi di n'elu-igwe ugbu a.
english_hint: Ndi Filipai 3. 20. I'm but a stranger here.
lyrics:
1.
Abum obia n'ebe a,

Igwé b'ulom;

Nani onye-ije,

Igwe b’ulom.

Ih'egwu n'ahuhu

Gharam buruburu;

Igwe bu ala-Nnam,

Igwe b’ulom.

2.
Ifufe fes'ike,

Igwe b'ulom;

Ije nkem di nkpunkpu,

Igwe b’ulom.

Ma mgbe nsogbu uwa

Geme ngwa gabiga,

Agamano n’udo,

Igwe b’ulom.

3.
N’ékuku Onye-nwem,

Igwe b'ulom;

Agenyem otuto,

Igwe b’ulom.

Ebe ndi nso Chuku

Nebi ebigh-ebi

Ka ha jesiri ije,

Igwe b’ulom.

4.
Agaghm-atamu kwa.

Igwe b'ulom;

Otu uwa dirim,

Igwe b’ulom.

N’ezie mu geguzo

N'aka-nri Onye-nwem;

El'igwe b'ala-Nnam,

Igwe b’ulom. Amen.

title: ELU-IGWE
first_line: Abal’adigh n’igwé; N’uwa-ngozi ahu Olu agagh-agwu ike, Olu b’ihu-n’anya.
subtitle: Onwu agagh-adi kwa ozo; iru uju ma-obu ikwa akwa ma-obu aru agagh-adi kwa ozo; ihe madu nile agabigawo.
english_hint: Nkpughe 21. 4. There is no might in heaven.
lyrics:
1.
Abal’adigh n’igwé;
N’uwa-ngozi ahu
Olu agagh-agwu ike,
Olu b’ihu-n’anya.

2.
Akwa adigh n’igwe,

N’ihi na ndu b’onu;

Akwa b’otu nim'ihe mbu

Nke gabigasiri.

3.
Nmehie adigh n’igwe,

N’etiti ndi-ngozi;

Uwe ocha-ha dizu nso,

Abu-ha di kwa nso.

4.
Onwu adigh n’igwe;

Ndi ruru n’eb’ahu

Eritawo anwugh-anwu,

H’agagh-anwu ozo.

5.
Jisus, bur’Onye-ndu!

K’ayi gafe abali,

Akwa, nmehie nile, n’onwu,

Ayi we rue n’el’igwe. Amen.

title: OTUTO
first_line: Madu nile ndi bi n’uwa,  Tobenu Chineke n'onu;  Werenu egwu fébe Ya,  Unu bia n'iru Ya n’onu!
subtitle: Tikusienu Jehova nkpu onu ike, uwa nile
english_hint: Abu Oma 100. 1. All people that on earth do dwell.
lyrics:
1.
Madu nile ndi bi n’uwa,

Tobenu Chineke n'onu;

Werenu egwu fébe Ya,

Unu bia n'iru Ya n’onu!

2.
Onye-nw’ayi bu Chuku n’ezie,

O bu nani Ya kpuru ayi;

O si n’aya bu aturu-Ya,

O bu Onye nenye ayi nri.

3.
Wer’otuto ba n’ulo-Ya,

Wer’onu ba n'ogige-Ya;

Neto aha-Ya mgbe nile,

O kwesiri ime otu a.

4.
N’ihi na Chineke di nma,

Ebere-Ya adigh-agwu;

Okwu-Ya neguzos'ike,

O gadigide mgbe nile.

5.
To Chineke, Onye-ngozi!

To Ya, ihe nile n‘uwa!

To Ya, usu nke di n'igwe!

To Nna, n'Okpara, na Mo Nso! Amen.

title: OTUTO
first_line: Otuto diri Chuku n'ih'O luru!  O hur’uwa n’ar1ya, nye Okpara-Ya,  Nke togboro ndu-Ya ikpuchi nmenie,  Mehepu uzo ndu k’ora we bata.
subtitle: Nyenu Jehova nsopuru aha-Ya.
english_hint: Abu Oma 29. 2. To God be the glory, great things He hath done.
lyrics:
1.
Otuto diri Chuku n'ih'O luru!

O hur’uwa n’ar1ya, nye Okpara-Ya,

Nke togboro ndu-Ya ikpuchi nmenie,

Mehepu uzo ndu k’ora we bata.

2.
To Chuku! To Chuku! Ka madu

dum nuria!

Biko, biakute Nna site na Jisus;

Nye ya otuto n’ok'ihe O luru!

3.
Ezi ngbaputa nk'eji obara go!

Onye kwere ka nkwa Chineke diri;

Onye kachasi njo nke kwere n'ezie,

Jisus gagbaghara nmehie-ya ugbu a.

4.
Ok'ihe O zir’ayi, ok'ili'O luru,

Ok’ohu k’ayi nwere site na Jisus;

M'ayi ganahuri onu nke kachasi,

Neti nkpu n’ebube mgbé ayi gahu Ya. Amen.

title: OTUTO
first_line: To Jisus, Onye-ngbaputa nke di ngozi!  K’uwa nabu ok’ihu-n’anya-Ya;  Kele Ya, nd,isi-m’ozi nke bi n’otuto,  K'ike na nsopuru dir’aha-Ya!  Jisus geche umu-Ya dik’aturu,  Kw’ubochi k’O neku ha n’aka-Ya.
subtitle: Gi, Onye-nwe-ayi na Chineke-ayi, I kwesiri imeta otuto na nsopuru nile na ike nile.
english_hint: Nkpughe 4. 11. Praise Him! Praise Him! Jesus, our blessed Redeemer!
lyrics:
1.
To Jisus, Onye-ngbaputa nke di ngozi!

K’uwa nabu ok’ihu-n’anya-Ya;

Kele Ya, nd,isi-m’ozi nke bi n’otuto,

K'ike na nsopuru dir’aha-Ya!

Jisus geche umu-Ya dik’aturu,

Kw’ubochi k’O neku ha n’aka-Ya.

2.
To Jisus, Onye-ngbaputa nke di ngozi

O nwuru n’ihi mehie-ayi nile;

Ya bu nkume nzoputa ebigh-ebi-ayi,

Kele Jisus, Onye akpogburu!

Nye Y’otuto, Onye hur’ayi ahuhu;

Ihu-n’anya nke nenwegh ih'atu!

3.
To Jisus, Onye-ngbaputa nke di ngozi!

Hosanna nakpotu nim’el’igwe.

Jisus Kraist gabu eze mgbc ebigh-ebi

Me Ya Eze, ndi-nzuko-Ya nile!

O nabia dik’Onye-nmeri n'el’uwa,

Ike' n’otuto diri Onye-nw’ayi! Amen.

title: OTUTO
first_line: Nuria onu nim Onye-nw’ayi,  Unu ndi obi-ha di nma;  Unu ndi rota-kwa-Ya  Si nwuta na r’uju la!
subtitle: Ma ka ndi omume nuria; ka obi to ba uto a'iru Chineke.
english_hint: Abu Oma 68. 3. Be glad in the Lord, and rejoice.
lyrics:
1.
Nuria onu nim Onye-nw’ayi,

Unu ndi obi-ha di nma;

Unu ndi rota-kwa-Ya

Si nwuta na r’uju la!

2.
Nuria n’ihi n’O bu Eze,

Nachi n’uwa na n’el’igwe;

O ji okwu-Ya ké ihe,

O b'Onye-ngbaputa d’ike.

3.
N’ezie o foduru nwanti

Ka nd’iro-unu nwe nmeri;

Ma ndi-agha Chuku zor’ezo

Kariri ndi nemegide.

4.
Ma ehihie gba ochichi,

Abali kpuch’iru-igwé,

K’uche ghara iché unu,

Tukwasi obi na Chuku!

5.
Nuria onu nim’Onye-nw’ayi,

Weren’ubo, n’olu, n’obi

Netonu Ya n’ibu abu,

K’aleluya nada uda! Amen.

first_line: Ka ndi nile bi n’el’uwa  Nye Ony’okiké otuto; Aleluya!  K'asusu dum n’ala nile  Bua aha Onye-ngbaputa. Aleluya.
subtitle: Tonu Jehova, una mba nile; Janu Ya, unu ndi nile di iche iche.
english_hint: Abu Oma 117. 1. Trom all that dwell below the skies.
lyrics:
1.
Ka ndi nile bi n’el’uwa

Nye Ony’okiké otuto; Aleluya!

K'asusu dum n’ala nile

Bua aha Onye-ngbaputa. Aleluya.

2.
Nna, ebere-I di mgbe nile,

Ezi'okwu-I di ebigh-ebi; Aleluya!

Otuto-I geru nsot’uwa,

Rue mgbe anwu nagagh-adi. Aleluya! Amen.

title: OTUTO
first_line: Mu, di njo, nacho ngozi,  Nacho ka m’puta n'oru,  Nechere izu-ike:  Chuku, merem ebere.
subtitle: Chineke, ka obi-Gi juru n'ebe mu, bu onye-nmehie no.
english_hint: Luk 18. 13. Sinful, sighing to be bleat
lyrics:
1.
Mu, di njo, nacho ngozi,

Nacho ka m’puta n'oru,

Nechere izu-ike:

Chuku, merem ebere.

2.
Enweghm ezi agugo,

Nmehie di n’olum nile,

Nani nkpam ka m’nebute:

Chuku, merem ebere.

3.
Obi-ntiwa n’ihere

Ekweghm iweli anyam,

Ma Gi mar’udé m’nasu:

Chuku, merem ebere.

4.
Site n’obi-nmehie nka

Ka m'gbakuru nani Gi;

Abugh nkem, kama nke-Gi:

Chuku, merem ebere.

5.
Onye no ns’och’eze-Gi

Ka m'tukwasiri obim;

Enweghm iye’aka ozo:

Chuku, merem ebere.

6.
Ya ganekwurum onum,

Ya gasughari okwum;

Ya bu nkem, na n’ihi Ya,

Chuku, merem ebere. Amen.

title: NCHEGHARI
first_line: Onye-nwem, Gi ka m’kpokuru,  Aghaghm inwu m’I yeghm aka;  Werute nzoputa-Gi nso,  Werem otu m’si di!
subtitle: N'ihi na mgbe ayi no nadigh ike, mgbe oge-Ya ma Kraist nwueu n'ihi ndi nadigh-asopuru Chineke
english_hint: Ndi Rom, 5. 6. Jesus, my Lord, to Thee I Cry.
lyrics:
1.
Onye-nwem, Gi ka m’kpokuru,

Aghaghm inwu m’I yeghm aka;

Werute nzoputa-Gi nso,

Werem otu m’si di!

2.
Ike adigh, ikpe maram,

Ma I wusirim obara-I,

I pur’imem ka I si cho;

Werem otu m’si di!

3.
Apughm ijikere onwem,

Ezi nzubem ka m'mebiri,

Ma zoputam n’ihi aha-I;

Werem otu m’si di!

4.
Onye-nzotam, lem n’ukwu-Gi,

Mesom ka o si di Gi uma,

Malite olu-I, lusia ya;

Werem otu m’si di! Amen.

title: NCHEGHARI
first_line: Jisus, Onye nwayo,  Nwa nke Chineke,  Nur'akwa umu-Gi,  Onye-nzoputa.
subtitle: Onye-nwe-ayi, zoputam.
english_hint: Matiu 14. 30. Jesu, meek and gentle,
lyrics:
1.
Jisus, Onye nwayo,

Nwa nke Chineke,

Nur'akwa umu-Gi,

Onye-nzoputa.

2.
Gbaghara nmehie-ayi,

Topu ayi n’agbu,

Tikpo arusi dum

Nke nejide ayi.

3.
Me k’ayi pua n’oru njo,

K’ayi hu Gi n’anya;

Dor’ayi, Jisus di nso,

Rue n’ebe-I n’elu.

4.
Onye-ndli n’ije-ayi,

Gi bur'ayi uzo

Si n’ochichi nk’uwa

Rue n’ihé nk’igwé.

5.
Jisus, Onye nwayo,

Nwa nke Chineke,

Nur'akwa umu-Gi,

Onye-nzoputa. Amen.

1.
Natukwasi Ya obi-i,

Ma, ogu nan’odu;

I gabu onye-nmeri,

Chuku galiuru gi.

2.
Natukwasi Ya obi~i,

Ok’onwunwa di nso;

N’elu miri ize-ndu

O ganya ugbo-gi.

3.
Chuku pur’izoput’ayi,

O bu ezi Eyi:

Natukwasi Ya obi-i

We rue n’ikp’azu ndu. Amen.

title: OKWUKWE
first_line: Mgb’udo, dik'osimiri, neru n’uzom,  Mgbe nsogbu biara k’ebili;  N’onodum o bula I meworm ka m’si,  "O di nma, o diri obim nma."
subtitle: O gbaputawo nkpuru-obim, me ka oba n'udo
english_hint: Abu Oma 55. 18. When peace, like a river, attendeth my way.
lyrics:
1.
Mgb’udo, dik'osimiri, neru n’uzom,

Mgbe nsogbu biara k’ebili;

N’onodum o bula I meworm ka m’si,

"O di nma, o diri obim nma."

2.
Ekwensu gesogbu, onwunwa gabia;

Ka m’tukwasi obim na nka:

Na Kraist amatawo na ike adighm,

We wusi obara-Ya n’ihim.

3.
Nmehiem-echiche nka nanyem ok’onu?

Nmehiem-ha nile, ka ha ra,

Di n’obe Jisus, ebughkwam ha ozo:

To Chuku! to Chuku, nkpur'obim!

4.
N’ebe m’no idi ndu bu Kraist mgbe nile!

O'buru na onwu abia,

O gagh-ewutam; n’onwu dika na ndu,

I genye nkpur'obim udo-Gi.

5.
Jisus, o b'obibia-Gi k'ayi nechere;

Ili agagh-ab’ulo-ayi:

Opi nkei mo-ozi!  olu nke Chuku!

Olil'anya, n’iz’ike obim! Amen.

title: OKWUKWE
first_line: O gabu na m’gerit’uru  N’obara Onye-nzoputam?  O nwururum; onye mere  K'O nwe ihe-ngbu, ga n’onwu!  Ihu n’anya! o gadi’aha  Na Gi, Chinekem, ganwurum?
subtitle: Onye-nwe-ayi Jisus Kraist, Onye nwaru n'ihi ayi ka o gabu ka ayi we so Ya diko ndu.
english_hint: 1 Ndi Tesalonia 5. 9-10. And can it be that I should gain.
lyrics:
1.
O gabu na m’gerit’uru

N’obara Onye-nzoputam?

O nwururum; onye mere

K'O nwe ihe-ngbu, ga n’onwu!

Ihu n’anya! o gadi’aha

Na Gi, Chinekem, ganwurum?

2.
Ih'omimi! Okpar'anwua!

Onye gamata nzube-Ya?

N’efu ka ndi-m'ozi nanwa

Iiu omim’ihu-n’anya.

Ebere! K‘uwa sopuru!

Ndi-m’ozi, ajula ozo!

3.
O rapuru och’eze Nna-

Amara-Ya nenwegh nsotu-

O mer'onwe-Ya ih’efu,

Gba obara n’ihi ndi-njo.

Ebere! enyere n’efu;

Chinekem, o choputaram!

4.
N'oge mbu mom eker’agbu

Togboro na njo n’ochichi;

Ihé-I nwubara, m’we teta;

Ola-nkporo juru n’ihe;

Nkporom dapuru, m'nwer'onwem,

Ebilirim, pua, soro Gi.

5.
Atugham egwu ikp-omuma;

Jisus, n'ihe-Ya dum, bu nkem!

Adim du mime Ya: Isim;

Ezi'omume di nso b’uwem.

N'ob’ike m'biarue ns'och'eze,

Nat'okpu-eze n’aka Kraist. Amen.

title: OKWUKWE
first_line: Chinekem, Nnam, me ka m’dike,  Mgbe olu nke ndu sir’ike,  Ikele ya n’abu-nmeri:-  K’eme uche-I!
subtitle: Ka eme ihe I nacho.
english_hint: Matiu 26. 42. My God, my Father, make me strong.
lyrics:
1.
Chinekem, Nnam, me ka m’dike,

Mgbe olu nke ndu sir’ike,

Ikele ya n’abu-nmeri:-

K’eme uche-I!

2.
Dopu n’anyam ihe-nkpuchi

Ka m’hu, eb’ik’uwa nada,

N’ihu-n’anya-Gi gemeri:

K’eme uche-I!

3.
N'obi di um’ala m’gahu

Inwe-onwem n’ije-ozi,

Nekp’ekpere nim’olu dum:

K’eme uche-I!

4.
M’geme ihe kachas’ike;

Ikp’oku n’iye’aka bu nke-I;

Uche-Gi gedozi uzo:

K’eme uche-I!

5.
Ihe nile bu nkem ugbu a;

M’geguzos’ike nime nkwam,

Ebe o bugh mu, kama Gi:

K’eme uche-I!

6.
Olil'anya nelefé njo;

Okwukwe neti nkpu onu;

Ihu-n’any’agagh imeri:

K’eme uche-I! Amen.

title: OKWUKWE
first_line: O Jisus, abum nke-l, anuwom olu-I,  O korom ihu-n'anya-I;  M'anamcho ka m’site n’okwukwe  Nabiaru uso Gi kari.
subtitle: Ka ayi were obi ezi-okwu biarue nso nime nkewu nke okwukwe.
english_hint: Ndi Hibru 10. 22. I am Thine, O Lord, I have heard Thy voice.
lyrics:
1.
O Jisus, abum nke-l, anuwom olu-I,

O korom ihu-n'anya-I;

M'anamcho ka m’site n’okwukwe

Nabiaru uso Gi kari.

2.
Me ka m’di nso ka nalu olu-Gi,

Site n'amara nso-Gi;

K'obim wer'olil'anya le n'elu,

K'ochicho-Gi burn nkem.

3.
Og'ahu juru n'onu zur'oke,

Mgbe m'no n'iru och'eze-I;

Mgbe m'kpo is ala n'ekpere, Chukum,

We gwa I okwu dik Eyim.

4.
Omimi ihu-n’anya-Gi di kwa

Nke m’napugh ima n’ebe a;

Oke onu di nke m'napugh inwe,

Rue mgbe m'gez’ike na Gi. Amen.

title: ITO N'AMARA
first_line: Achoporom ka m'yie Jisus,  N’obi ume-ala;  O digh aj'okwu o bula  Si n’onu-Ya puta.
subtitle: Muta-kwa-nu ihe n'onum; n’ihi na abum Onve nwuyo na Onye wedataru Onwe-ya ala n'obi
english_hint: Matiu ll. 29. I want to be like Jesus.
lyrics:
1.
Achoporom ka m'yie Jisus,

N’obi ume-ala;

O digh aj'okwu o bula

Si n’onu-Ya puta.

2.
Achorom ka m’yie Jisus,

N’ekpere mgbe nile;

Nani Ya nano n’el'ugwu

Zute Nna n'eb’ahu.

3.
Achorom ka m'yie Jisus;

O digh oge m’huru

N’O rapuru obi’oma-Ya

Mgbe anesogbu Ya.

4.
Achorom ka m’yie Jisus,

Neme uma mgbe nile;

Ka ewe kwue bayerem, si,

"O mere ike-ya!"

5.
Achorom ka m'yie Jisus,

Nke gwara ora, si,

“Kwenu k’umu-nta biakutem!"-

Agameje za Ya.

6.
Ma eyighm Jisus ma-oli,

K’ony’o bula gahu!

Jisus, ziterem amara-I,

We mem ka m’di ka Gi! Amen.

title: ITO N'AMARA
first_line: Anuwom bayere ngozi  Nk'I nenye ora n’efu;  Miri-ngozi netute ndu-  Biko, kwe k’o zokwasim,  Zokwasim!
subtitle: Obu nani otu ngozi ka i nwere, nnam! goziem, obuna mu onwem, nnam.
english_hint: Jenesis 27. 38. Lord, I hear of showers of blessing.
lyrics:
1.
Anuwom bayere ngozi

Nk'I nenye ora n’efu;

Miri-ngozi netute ndu-

Biko, kwe k’o zokwasim,

Zokwasim!

2.
Agabigalam, Nn’amara!

N’ezie nmehie di n’obim;

I pur’irapum, ma kama

K’ebere-gi biakwasim,

Biakwasim!

3.
Onye-nwem, agabigalam!

Ka m’jide, ma Hu I n’anya;

Anamacho amara-Gi,

N’obibia-Gi kpom oku,

Kpom oku!

4.
Agabigalam, Mo d’ike!

Gi nagwo ndi kpur’isi;

Ony’ama olu nke Jisus,

Wer’ike-Gi gwam okwu,

Gwam okwu!

5.
Ihu-n'anya nenwegh ngbanwe!

Obara di ok’onu!

Amara di n’ebe nile!

Nimem, biko, bulie ha,

Bulie ha! Amen.

title: ITO N'AMARA
first_line: Jisus, echiche bayere I  Nenye uto n'obi;  Ma ihu iru-I ka uto,  N’iz’ike na nso Gi.
subtitle: Jisus Kraist; Onye unu huru n'anya o bu ezie na unu ahugh Ya anya; Onye unu kwere na Ya... obi we nato uto nke-uku
english_hint: 1 Pita 1. 8. Jesu, the very thought of Thee.
lyrics:
1.
Jisus, echiche bayere I

Nenye uto n'obi;

Ma ihu iru-I ka uto,

N’iz’ike na nso Gi.

2.
O nwegh onu nke pur'iko.

Echiche amagh kwa,

Aha kariri nke-I n’uto,

Onye-nzoput’uwa!

3.
Olil’anya ndi nakwa njo!

Onu, ndi di nwayo!

Ndi dar’ada nenwe nzota

Ndi nacho I nwe ngozi.

4.
Ma ndi chotara Ya? madu

Apugh ikowa ya!

Ihu-n’anya-Ya, ih’o bu

Nani ndi-Ya mara.

5.
Jisus, nani onu nke-ayi!

I gabu ugw’olu;

Bur’inya-isi-ayi ugbu a,

Na mgbe ebigh-ebi! Amen.

title: ITO N'AMARA
first_line: Nedum, Gi jehova uku,  Ony'ije n’ozara nka;  Ike adighm, Gi di ike,  Wer'aka-I d’ike jidem!  Nri nke igwé,  Nazum rue mgb'afo gejum!
subtitle: N'ihi na Nka bu Chineke, bu Chineke-ayi, rue mgbe nile ebigh-ebi; Ya onwe-ya ganedu ayi rue n'inwu-onwu
english_hint: Abu Oma 48. 14. Guide me, O Thou great Jehovah.
lyrics:
1.
Nedum, Gi jehova uku,

Ony'ije n’ozara nka;

Ike adighm, Gi di ike,

Wer'aka-I d’ike jidem!

Nri nke igwé,

Nazum rue mgb'afo gejum!

2.
Meghe is'iyi di ocha

Miri-ngwopu si eru;

K'igw'oji n'ogidi-oku

Dugidem n’ijem nile.

Onye-nzota,

Bur'ikem n'otam mgbe dum!

3.
Mgbe m'gazo ukwu na Jodan

Chupu egwu nke m'natu;

Ka m’gafe onwu n'oku-mo,

Rue ala Kenean n'udo.

Ab’otuto

M'gabaku I mgb'ebigh-ebi! Amen.

title: ITO N'AMARA
first_line: Jisus, nedum n’uzo ndu,  Ka m’we ghara ikpafu;  Anom n’udo n’akuku-I,  Ka m’biri n’ihu-n’anya-I.
subtitle: O neweghachi nkpuru-obim: Onedum n'uzo nile nke ezi omume n'ihi aha-Ya
english_hint: Abu Oma 23. 3. Saviour, lead me lest I stray.
lyrics:
1.
Jisus, nedum n’uzo ndu,

Ka m’we ghara ikpafu;

Anom n’udo n’akuku-I,

Ka m’biri n’ihu-n’anya-I.

2.
Gi, Ebe-ngbagé nk’obim!

Mgb’ifufe nefes’ike,

Anom n’udo m’I no nso,

Gi bu ntukwasi-obim.

3.
Nedum, k’ebili-miri

Nke ndum we gabigasia;

Agameru al’ihé

Eb'anya-miri nadigh. Amen.

title: ITO N'AMARA
first_line: Ngozi dir’obi ndi nahu  Ogbeye n’adigh-ike-ha;  Ha nwer’:aku nke amara,  N’okpu-eze nk’onu n’igwé.
subtitle: Ngozi nadiru ndi bu ogbeye nime mo-ka: n'ihi na ala-eze nke elu-igwe bu nke ndi ahu
english_hint: Matiu 5. 3. Blest are the humble souls that see.
lyrics:
1.
Ngozi dir’obi ndi nahu

Ogbeye n’adigh-ike-ha;

Ha nwer’:aku nke amara,

N’okpu-eze nk’onu n’igwé.

2.
Ngozi diri ndi’obi-ntiwa,

Ndi ner’uju. n’ihi nmehie;

Obara Kraist' di nso neru,

Ih’ogwugwo nk’oria-ha dum.

3.
Ngozi diri ndi-amara,

Nk’agu ezi’omume nagu;

Ha geri nri nke nenye ndu,

Miri nke ndu ka ha ganu.

4.
Ngozi diri ndi di ocha,

Ndi puru na nmeru nke njo;

Ha geji ok’ohu nahu

Chineke nke dizu ocha.

5.
Ngozi diri ndi-ahuhu,

Ndi no na ngbu n’ihi Jisus;

Ha ganuri nim’Onye-nw'ayi,

Otuto gab'ugw'olu-ha. Amen.

title: ISO KRAIST
first_line: Mgb’ebili-miri nke ndu namaghari i,  Mgb’i neché n’ihe nile emebiwo;  Guk’otutu ngozi-gi n’otu n’otu,  Olu Chineke luru geju i anya!
subtitle: Onye were ngozi nile o bula nke Mo Nso gorie ayi n'ele di n'elu-igwe nime Kraist.
english_hint: Ndi Efesos 1. 3. When upon life’s billows you are tempest tossed.
lyrics:
1.
Mgb’ebili-miri nke ndu namaghari i,

Mgb’i neché n’ihe nile emebiwo;

Guk’otutu ngozi-gi n’otu n’otu,

Olu Chineke luru geju i anya!

2.
O di mgbe ibu-obi nanyigbu gi?

Ob’enyere i k’i buru, o di aro?

Guk’otutu ngozi-i, ich’uche gala,

I ganabu abu ka ubochi ra!

3.
Mgbe i huru aku n’ala ndi ozo,

Cheta n’ekwere i aku nk’igwé na nkwa;

Guko ngozi-i; ego apugh izuta

Ugw’olu-gi n’ulo-gi nke di n’igwé.

4.
Otu a n’etiti ogu nke uwa nka,

Ike agwula gi, Chineke b’eze!

Guk’otutu ngozi-i; ndi-m’ozi no nso,

Ha geyere i aka rue mgb’ije gagwu. Amen.

title: ISO KRAIST
first_line: Onye-Kraist, achol’ura,  Nur’olu Onye-nzota-i;  I no n’etiti nd’iro:  "Che nche, kpe."
subtitle: Nechenu nche nekpe-kwa-nu ekpere, ka unu we ghara iba n'onwunwu
english_hint: Matiu 26. 41. Christian, seek not yet repose.
lyrics:
1.
Onye-Kraist, achol’ura,

Nur’olu Onye-nzota-i;

I no n’etiti nd’iro:

"Che nche, kpe."

2.
Nd’isi na nd’ike na njo

Nachiko ndi-agha-ha,

Nechére mgb’i nogh na nche:

“Che nche, kpe.”

3.
Ke ihe-agha-i nk’igwé,

Neyi ya oge nile;

Ekwensu nech anwu:

"Che nche, kpe."

4.
Ge nti olu ndi-nmeri;

Ha nele ayi n’ogu-ayi;

Ha ji otu olu si,

“Che nche, kpe.”

5.
Nke kasi, nur'olu Kraist;

Onye i huru n’anya;

Zobe okwu-Ya n’obi-i:

“Che nche, kpe."

6.
Che, dika na nani ya

Genye i nmeri n’ogu-gi;

Kpe, k’ezidat’iye’aka;

“Che nche, kpe." Amen.

title: ILUSO NMEHIE OGU
first_line: Chineke bu Ota-i,  N’oke ugw’olu-gi;  Ike-Ya akawo:  Ike-i di nime Ya.
subtitle: Mu onwem bu ota diri gi ugwo olu-gi riri nne nke-uku.
english_hint: Jenesia 15. 1. Fear not! God is thy Shield
lyrics:
1.
Chineke bu Ota-i,

N’oke ugw’olu-gi;

Ike-Ya akawo:

Ike-i di nime Ya.

2.
Gi atula egwu!

O nuwo akwa-gi;

Miri nke okwu-Ya

Gatute nkpur’obi-i.

3.
Gi atula egwu!

O ganqyere gi

Iyere gi aka;

O geme k’i d'ike.

4.
Ndi-Ya, atul’egwu!

Onye-nw'unu nabia

K’O kpughe otuto,

Kur’unu la n'igwe. Amen.

title: ILUSO NMEHIE OGU
first_line: Egwu natu gi n’ony’iro gemeri?  Ochichiri gbachiri nime, n’ezi?  Meghe ngbachi window, meghepu uzo,  K’ihé ngozi nwubata.
subtitle: O bu Chineke, Onye siri, Ihe gesi nime ochichiri nwuputa, bu Onye nwubara nime obi-ayi.
english_hint: 2 Ndi Korint 4. 6. Do you fear the foe will in the conflict win?
lyrics:
1.
Egwu natu gi n’ony’iro gemeri?

Ochichiri gbachiri nime, n’ezi?

Meghe ngbachi window, meghepu uzo,

K’ihé ngozi nwubata.

2.
Okwukwe-i n’uzo nke Kraist naju oyi?

Chineke no n’elu azagh ekpere-i?

Meghe ngbachi window, meghepu uzo,

K’ihé ngozi nwubata.

3.
I geji onu naga n’uzo nk’igwé?

Narap’ochichiri, nebi nim’ihé?

Meghe ngbachi window, meghepu uzo,

K’ihé ngozi nwubata. Amen.

title: IGBARA KRAIST AMA.
first_line: Jisus! o gabu n’ihere-I  Pur’ime onye-njo nk’uwa?  Gi, Onye ndi-ozi neto,  Nk’ebube-Ya nenwu mgbe dum?
subtitle: Ihere ozi oma  ahu adigh-emem: n’ihi na o hu ike nke Chineke rue nzoputu nye onye o bula nke kwere
english_hint: Ndi Rom. 1. 16. Jesus, and shall it ever be
lyrics:
1.
Jisus! o gabu n’ihere-I

Pur’ime onye-njo nk’uwa?

Gi, Onye ndi-ozi neto,

Nk’ebube-Ya nenwu mgbe dum?

2.
Ihere Jisus mem? Eyim

Nke nenyem olil’any’igwé?

E-e! iherem gabu nka,

N’adighm asopur’aha-Ya!

3.
Ihere Jisus mem? Ehe,

Ma m’nwegh njo nacho nsachapu!

M'obu akwa, n'egwu, na nkpa,

M’ob'obi nacho nzoputa!

4.
Rue og’ahu inya-isim

Gabu n’Onye-nzotam nwurum!

Ka nka burn ebube nkem,

N’iherem emegh Onye-nwem! Amen.

title: IGBARA KRAIST AMA.
first_line: Gab’olu! gab’olu! ayi bu ndi Chineke;  K’ayi sor’uzo nke Onye-nw’ayi zoro ukwu.  Ndum-odu-Ya gabu ihe nagb’ayi ume;  K’ayi jis’ike n’ilu olu nk’O si ayi lua!
subtitle: Gini kwesiri ka ayi me,ka ayi we luaolu Chineke nile
english_hint: Jon 6. 28. To the work! to the work! we are servants of God

title: IGBARA KRAIST AMA.
first_line: Jisus si k'ayi wer’ez’ihé nenwu,  Dik’oriona nenwu nim’abali.  N'uwa ochichi nka ayi aghagh inwu,  Gi no n'akuku-gi, mu no na nkem!
subtitle: Otu a menu ka ihe-unu nenwu n'iru madu, ka ha we hu olu oma nile unu, we to Nna-unu Nke bi n'elu-igwe.
english_hint: Matiu 5. 16. Jesus bids us shine.
lyrics:
1.
Jisus si k'ayi wer’ez’ihé nenwu,

Dik’oriona nenwu nim’abali.

N'uwa ochichi nka ayi aghagh inwu,

Gi no n'akuku-gi, mu no na nkem!

2.
Jisus si k'ayi  bur’uzo nwuru Ya;

O nahu, mata kwa, m’oku-ayi nanyu.

O si n'igwé nele, k’O hu ayi nenwu:

Gi no n'akuku-gi, mu no na nkem!

3.
Jisus si k'ayi nenwu buruburu;

Ochichi d'ich'ich nagba n'uwa nka-

Njo, na nkpa, n'ahuhu; ayi aghagh inwu.

Gi no n'akuku-gi, mu no na nkem! Amen.

title: IGBARA KRAIST AMA.
first_line: Bianu iche, zuru ike nw’oge;  Amaram ik’ogwugw’unu nile;  Hicha osuso ndogbu-n’ol’unu,  D’ike ozo site n’ike-nwayom.
subtitle: O we si ha, Unu onwe-unu bia iche n'ebe bu ohia ka unu zuru ike nke-nta.
english_hint: Mak 6. 31. Come ye yourselve apart and rest achile.
lyrics:
1.
Bianu iche, zuru ike nw’oge;

Amaram ik’ogwugw’unu nile;

Hicha osuso ndogbu-n’ol’unu,

D’ike ozo site n’ike-nwayom.

2.
Bianu iche site n’uto nk’uwa,

Ikparita uka uwa namagh;

Noyere nani Mu na Nnam n’ebe a;

Udo di n’ebe Mu na Nnam nano.

3.
Bianu, gwam ihe dum unu mere:

Nmeri, n’odida, n’oli1’any’unu.

Amawom n’ikpota madu d’ike:

Anya-miri b’oke ndi-ozi nkem.

4.
Bianu zur’ike: ije di uku;

Unu gada mba n’akuku uzo;

Nri nke ndu di n’ebe a nk’unu geri,

Na many’ihu-n'anya nk’unu ganu.

5.
Je kwa n’ike Onye-nw’unu nenye,

Lua olu rue mgbe anyanwu gada;

Emebigh oge unu ji muta

Ihe nk’Onye-nw’unu, n’iz'ike'-Ya! Amen.

title: IJERE KRAIST OZI
first_line: Nna, Nke si n'ulo-aku-Gi  Nawukwasi ayi onyinye,  Nye ayi ike k’ayi we were  Onyinye-Gi n’uz’oma.
subtitle: Ihe nile o bula unu neme kwa, n'okwu ma-obu n'olu, nemenu ha nile n'ala Onye-nwe-ayi Jisus
english_hint: Ndi Kolosi 3. I7. Father, who on man dost shower.
lyrics:
1.
Nna, Nke si n'ulo-aku-Gi

Nawukwasi ayi onyinye,

Nye ayi ike k’ayi we were

Onyinye-Gi n’uz’oma.

2.
K’oge iz’ike di ocha,

K’ayi jide onw’ayi na mgb’onu;

K’ayi nwe aku n’uzo di nso,

Aru n’obi zur’oké.

3.
Wepu, na mba nka na mba dum,

Ihe nakpata odida;

Tinyua oku nke onwunwa;

Chughachi nd’iro-I azu.

4.
Noyer’ayi, neny’ayi ike-Gi,

K’ayi wer’ike nadigh-anwu

Logide nd'iro nke madu,

Guzos’ike nim'ogu.

5.
Ochi-agha-ayi mgbe nile,

Nedu ayi k’ayi nalus’ike;

Ka Nzuko-Gi zoput'uwa;

Ny’ayi ike n’amam-ihe.

6.
Nna, Nke choro we choput’ayi;

Okpara, Nke hur’ayi n’anya;

Mo Nso, Nke bi nim’obi-ayi;

Ato nime'otu, nuru. Amen.

title: IGBARA KRAIST AMA.
first_line: Anya di nke nra natugh  N’abali o bula;  Nti di kwa nke nadigh-echi  Mgb'anyanwu dasiri.
subtitle: N’ihi na anya abua nke Onye-nwe-ayi di n’aru ezi omume. Nti-Ya abua di kwa n'ebe aririo-hu
english_hint: l Pita 3. 12. There is an eye that never sleeps.
lyrics:
1.
Anya di nke nra natugh

N’abali o bula;

Nti di kwa nke nadigh-echi

Mgb'anyanwu dasiri.

2.
Aka di nke ike nagwugh

Mgb’ike madu gwuru;

Ihu-n’anya nadigide

Mgbe nk'uwa jur'oyi.

3.
Any’ahu nele ndi-m’ozi,

Aka nejid'igwé;

Ihu-n’anya nwer’och’eze,

Nti nanu abu nso.

4.
Ike di nke madu geji

Mbg’ike uwa b’efu;

O geru nti, n’anya, n’aka,

Na ihu-n’any’ahu.

5.
Ik’ahu b’ekpere; nke si

Na Kraist rue och’eze.

Name k'aka nke Chineke

Zidata nzoputa! Amen.

title: IGBARA KRAIST AMA.
first_line: Jisus, zi ayi ikp’ekpere  N'egwu na nsopuru;  M’ayi bu'ntu n’aja n’iru Gi,  Ayi aghagh ibia nso.
subtitle: Onye-nwe-ayi, zi ayi ikpe ekpere
english_hint: Luk 11. 12. Lord, teach us how to pray aright
lyrics:
1.
Jisus, zi ayi ikp’ekpere

N'egwu na nsopuru;

M’ayi bu'ntu n’aja n’iru Gi,

Ayi aghagh ibia nso.

2.
Mgb'ayi nekpegh ayi nala n’iyi:

Nye ayi ike kpere!

M’ayi jikere ibiakuite I,

Jisus, zut'ayi n’uzo.

3.
Nye nwuta nso n’ihi nmehie,

Nye obi um’ala,

N’ochicho sir’ike inu

Olu-Gi, we di ndu.

4.
Okwukwe n’Aja nke nani

Ya pur'ikpuchi njo;

K'ayi wer'any'ayi, n'olil any'ayi

Le nani Kraisi ingbe dum.

5.
K’ayi were ntacl'obi neche;

M’ebere-Gi n’odu;

Nye obi nada, mb'ayi ike

Itukwasi I obi.

6.
Nye ndia, k'ewe me uche-Gi;

Site n'ike-Gi du n,

K'ayi si n'Okpara na Mo Nso

Kpere Gi k'I si cho! Amen.

title: EKPERE.
first_line: “Miri-ozuzo nke ngozi"  Nka bu nkwa ihu-n’anya;  Onye-nzoputa no n‘elu  Gezite oge ntute.

Gezite oge ntute.

"Miri-ozuzo nke ngqzi!"

Ntute-obi nke di nma;

N'ugwu’na n’ebe di ala,

Uda otutu miri.

3.
“Miri-ozuzo nke ngozi!”

Nye ayi ntute-obi ugbu a;

Bia, sopuru okwu-Gi!

4.
"Miri-ozuzo nke ngozi!”

Me k’o zo ubochi ta,

Mgb'ayi nekwuputa nye Chuku,

Mgbe ayi nakpoku Jisus! Amen.

title: EKPERE.
first_line: I jekuru Jisus n’ih’ike nsacha?  Asawo i n’obara Nw'aturu?  I natukwasi obi n'amara-Ya?  Asawo i n'obara. Nw'aturu?

I jekuru Jisus n’ih’ike nsacha?

Asawo i n’obara Nw'aturu?

I natukwasi obi n'amara-Ya?

Asawo i n'obara. Nw'aturu?

2.

Asawo i n’obara Nw’aturu?

I nezu ike n’Onye akpogburu?

Asawo i n’obara Nw’aturu?

3.
Mgbe Jisus gabia, uwe-gi ganenwu

Nk'oma nim'obara Nw'aturu?

Obi-gi jiker’iba n’ulo Nw’aturu?

Asawo i n'obara Nw’aturu?

4.
Wezuga uwe-i nke nmehie meruru,

Kwe k’asa i n’obara Nw'aturu!

Is’iyi neru n’ihi nkpur'obi-njo;

Kwe k'asa i n'obara Nw'aturu! Amen.

Were ihé ututu

Mukwasi ochichi-ayi;

K’ihé-Gi chupu ngbachi
Nk’abali.

2.
Dik’igirigi nada

N’elu ih’okuku dum,

K’amara'n’ike Mo-Gi

Tuye ndu nim’obi-ayi;

Ka mir’ozuzo ngozi

Zokwas’ayi.

3.
Dika oku nk’anyanwu,

K’onwunwu ihu-n’anya-I

Chupu iju-oyi-ayi,

Nye inu-oku-n’obi;

K’ayi wer’onu nefe Gi

Mgbe nile,

4.
Olil’anya n’Onye-ndu!

Arapul’ayi mgb’o bula;

Nedeb’ayi n’akuku-Gi

Rue na ndu ebigh-ebi,

Nagakur’ugwu Zaion,

B’ulo-ayi.

5.
Nedu ayi ubochi dum

N’uzo-Gi di warara;

Gafe nsogbu nk’uwa nka

We rue n’al’ahu ka nma

Ebe ndi-Gi nez’ike

Na ngozi. Amen.

title: UTUTU
first_line: Biakutem, Kraist, mgbe m'tetara,  Mgbé anw’ututu nawata;  K’ezie’echiche batam n'isi    Dik’igirigi si n’igwé.
subtitle: Ole mgbe I gabiakute?
english_hint: Abu 0ma 101. 2. Come to me, Lord, when first I wake.
lyrics:
1.
Biakutem, Kraist, mgbe m'tetara,

Mgbé anw’ututu nawata;

K’ezie’echiche batam n'isi
  
Dik’igirigi si n’igwé.

2.
Biakutem n’oke ehihie,

Ka nsogbu nile di n'uwa

Ghar’ikpuch’ihé iru-Gi,

We me k’ubochim gbachita.

3.
Biakutem na mgbe anyasi;

Asi na obim kpafuru,

Kpolata ya, ma mukwasim

Iru-oma-I ka kpakpando.

4.
Biakutem nime abali

Mgbe ura gefepu n’anyam;

Ka nkpur’obim hu iz’ike,

Ka Jon si hu, n’obi Jisus.

5.
Biakutem n’uzo ndu nile;

Mgbe obim kubiri ume,

Ka m'lakuru I, Onye-nzotam,

Ka nwa-I noyere Gi n’igwé. Amen.

title: UTUTU
first_line: Bia n’ekper’ututu,  Bia k’ayi gbue ikperé;  Ekpere b’ike ony’ije  Ji eso Chineke.
subtitle: Anyasi, na ututu, na etiti-ehihie ka m'gatughari uche
english_hint: Abu Oma 55 17. God will take care of you.
lyrics:
1.
Bia n’ekper’ututu,

Bia k’ayi gbue ikperé;

Ekpere b’ike ony’ije

Ji eso Chineke.

2.
N’ehihie, zur’ike

N’okpuru Nkume-ayi;

Ndo-Ya bu ihe di uto

Mgbe anyanwu nacha.

3.
N’anyasi, mechi’uzo,

Kpe nime ulo-gi;

I gahu n’o b'ulo Chuku,

On'uzo el’igwé. Amen.

title: ANYASI
first_line: Noyerem: o rubewo anyasi;  Ochichi nagba: Jisus, noyerem;  Mgb’iye-aka na nkasi gwusiri,  Gi, Iye-aka nkem, bia noyerem.
subtitle: Noyere ayi: n’ihi na o rubewo anyasi, ubochi agamiwo kwa ugbu a.
english_hint: Luk 24. 29. Abide with me: fast falls the eventide.
lyrics:
1.
Noyerem: o rubewo anyasi;

Ochichi nagba: Jisus, noyerem;

Mgb’iye-aka na nkasi gwusiri,

Gi, Iye-aka nkem, bia noyerem.

2.
Ubochi ndu-ayi nagafe ngwa ngwa,

Onu n’otuto nk’uwa nka nete;

Ngbanwe n’uré di n’akuku nile:

Gi, Onye nenwegh ngbanwe, noyerem.

3.
Abiala n’egwu, dik’Eze nk'igwe;

Kama, bia n’obi’oma igw’oria dum;

Gi, Onye-nkasi-obi n’ahuhu,

Eyi nke ndi-nmehie, bia noyerem.

4.
O dim nkpa k’I noyerem mgbe nile,

Nani amara-I ganyi Ekwensu;

Onye dika Gi gabu Onye-ndum?

N’udu-miri n’okochi, noyerem.

5.
M'I noyerem m'gagh-at’ujo nd'iro;

Nsogbu n’anya-miri adigh ilu;

Onwu, ole ebe nmeri-gi di?

Anom nemeri ma Gi noyerem.

6.
Gosim obe-I mgbe m’gekpuchi anyam,

Nenwu na ngbachi, zim uzo nk'igwe

Ch'igwé nabo, onyinyo uw’aga:

Na ndu, n’onwu, Onye-nwem, noyerem. Amen

youtube_options.title: Abu 306- Nonyerem o rube wo anyasi (Abide with me, fast falls the eventide)

title: ARO OHU
first_line: Jisus, nye ngozi anyasi  Tutu ayi ezu ike;  Njo na nkpa k’ayi nekwuputa:  Gi nazopu, Gi nagwo.
subtitle: Obuna ochichiri adigh-aghachiri Gi; Ma abali nenye ihé dika ehihie.
english_hint: Abu Oma 139. 12. Saviour, breathe an evening blessing.
lyrics:
1.
Jisus, nye ngozi anyasi

Tutu ayi ezu ike;

Njo na nkpa k’ayi nekwuputa:

Gi nazopu, Gi nagwo.

2.
Ma nbibi di n’akuku-ayi,

Aku efeghari ayi,

Ndi-m’ozi-Gi nechebe ayi;

Ayi no n'udo m’I no nso.

3.
M’abali gba ochichiri,

O gagh-ezo iru-Gi;

Ik'adigh-agwu Gi, Onye

Nechebe umu-Gi dum. Amen.

4.
Iguzoro nenwegh eyi?

Chineke gechebe i;

O geme k’obi-gi d’ike:

Chineke gechebe i.

5.
Nime onwunwa o bula,

Chineke gechebe i;

Ony'ume-ngwu, kwere na Ya!

Chineke gechebe i! Amen.

049 SDA Hymn - Savior, Breathe an Evening Blessing (Singing w/ Lyrics)
049 Savior, Breathe an Evening Blessing || SDA Hymnal || The Hymns Channel

title: ARO OHU
first_line: Jisus, chi ejiwo;  Noyer’ayi, zur’ike;  Nkpur’obi-ayi nachos'ike  Ilezi Gi Obia.
subtitle: N'ihi na anyanwu na ota, ka Jehova, bu Chineke bu.
english_hint: Abu Oma 84. ll. The day, O Lord, is spent.
lyrics:
1.
Jisus, chi ejiwo;

Noyer’ayi, zur’ike;

Nkpur’obi-ayi nachos'ike

Ilezi Gi Obia.

2.
Ayi akerugh n'ala

Ala onu ahu

Ebe ndi-m’ozi-I neguzo,

Anwu y’adigh-ada.

3.
Anwu nke-ayi nada,

Ubochi-ayi nagwu;

Gi Anwu nk’ezi-omume,

Mukwasi ayi mgbe dum. Amen

first_line: N'ih ebere-I-n'amara-I  N’aro gafere ugbu a,  Nuru abu ekele,  Jisus, Onye-ngbaput'ayi.
subtitle: Nani idi-uma na ebere gagbasom ubochi nile nke ndum.
english_hint: Abu Oma 23. 6. For Thy mercy and Thy grace.
lyrics:
1.
N'ih ebere-I-n'amara-I

N’aro gafere ugbu a,

Nuru abu ekele,

Jisus, Onye-ngbaput'ayi.

2.
Ayi amagh odi-n’iru;

Dur’ayi, Kpakpand’ututu;

Agha na nd’iro d’ike:

Jisus, lu-kwa-r’ayi ogu.

3.
N'ahuhu n’adigh-ike

Buru Nkume d'ike-ayi;

Nime nfughari nk’uwa

Bur'ezi Uzo ndu-ayi.

4.
Onye gagbaso uzo

Nk’onwu nime aro nka,

Ka ndele na nkpa-n’aka-I

Nenye ya nkasi-obi.

5.
K’ayi di ocha, zue oké,

K'ayi buru nke-Gi mgbe dum;

Yer'ayi aka k’ayi kwesi

Inata okpu-eze. Amen.

youtube_options.title: FOR THY MERCY AND THY GRACE (Culbach) -- Cathedral Church of Christ, Marina, Lagos, Nigeria

first_line: Nn'ayi, gozie ar’ohu nka  Nye ndi nile no n’ebe a;  Nye Okwu-I ike di nso  K’ayi kwere ibu ndi-Gi.
subtitle: Onye ilu ezi olu nime umu galuzu ya rue ubochi Jisus Kraist.
english_hint: Ndi Filipei 1. 6. Bless, O Lord, the opening year.
lyrics:
1.
Nn'ayi, gozie ar’ohu nka

Nye ndi nile no n’ebe a;

Nye Okwu-I ike di nso

K’ayi kwere ibu ndi-Gi.

2.
Onye-nche aturu-Gi,

K’obi-etili kwa njo;

Me ka nd’isi nah’uzo

We le nani Gi anya.

3.
Gozie nwata n’okenye,

K’onu nile neto Gi;

Ka nzuko nka nwaputa

Ike-I na ihu-n’anya-I. Amen.

youtube_options.title: Bless, O Lord, This Evening Hour - David McGregor

title: ARO OHU
first_line: Ar’ohu namalite;  Onye-nw’ayi, k’o buru,  N’olu m’obu n’iche-nche,  Aro nke diri Gi.
subtitle: Mo nke Onye-nwe-ayi di n’arum . . . Ikwusa aro mgbe Onye-nwe-ayi nanara madu nke-oma
english_hint: Luk 4. 18-19. Another year is dawning.
lyrics:
1.
Ar’ohu namalite;

Onye-nw’ayi, k’o buru,

N’olu m’obu n’iche-nche,

Aro nke diri Gi.

2.
Aro ntukwasi-obi,

Nk’ebere n’amara;

Ar’ohu nk’ezi onu

Nk’iru-I gamukwasi.

3.
Aro nke iga-n’iru,

Aro nke otuto;

Ar’ohu nke nnwaputa

Nnoyere-Gi mgbe dum.

4.
Aro nke ije-ozi,

N’ama ihu-n’anya-I;

Ar’ohu nke njikere

Ilu olu n’igwé.

5.
Ar’ohu namalite:

Onye-nw'ayi, k’o buru,

Nim’uwa m’obu n’igwé,

Aro nke diri Gi. Amen.

6.
Nime onwunwa o bula,

Chineke gechebe i;

Ony'ume-ngwu, kwere na Ya!

Chineke gechebe i! Amen.

title: ARO OHU
first_line: Atul'egwu ih'o bula;  Chineke gechebe i;  Nodu nim’ihu-n’anya-Ya;  Chineke gechebe i.
subtitle: Jehova gozie gi,debe gi: Jehova. me iru-Ya ka o mukwasi gi.
english_hint: Onu-Ogugu 6. 24-25. God will take care of you.
lyrics:
1.
Atul'egwu ih'o bula;

Chineke gechebe i;

Nodu nim’ihu-n’anya-Ya;

Chineke gechebe i.

2.
Olu meme ka ike gwu:

Chineke gechebe i;

Ihe-ize-ndu di n’uzo:

Chineke gechebe i.

3.
Nkpa-gi nile ka O gegbo:

Chineke gechebe i;

O kwesiri ntukwas’obi:

Chineke gechebe i.

4.
Iguzoro nenwegh eyi?

Chineke gechebe i;

O geme k’obi-gi d’ike:

Chineke gechebe i.

5.
Nime onwunwa o bula,

Chineke gechebe i;

Ony'ume-ngwu, kwere na Ya!

Chineke gechebe i! Amen.

youtube_options.title: 099 SDA Hymn - God Will Take Care of You (Singing w/ Lyrics)

title: NDI-IJE
first_line: N’ihi ndi-ayi no n’eb’ozo  Ayi gabu n’ekpere-ayi:  Wer’ihu-n’anya-Gi di nro  Nke nech’umu-I n’ebe dum,  Nna Nke di nso,  Chebe ha na mgbe nile.
subtitle: Udo diri u_mu-nga-ayi, ya na, ihu-anya nke okwukwe yiko, site na. Chlneke, bu Nna, Onye-nwe-ayi Jisus Kraist.
english_hint: Ndi Efesos 6. 23. For the dear once parted from us.
lyrics:
1.
N’ihi ndi-ayi no n’eb’ozo

Ayi gabu n’ekpere-ayi:

Wer’ihu-n’anya-Gi di nro

Nke nech’umu-I n’ebe dum,

Nna Nke di nso,

Chebe ha na mgbe nile.

2.
Nime onwumwa na nsogbu,

N’ih'egwu ubochi dum,

Wer’omiko ebigh-ebi

Narior’obi kpafuru,

Onye-nzot’ayi,

Debe ha n’uzo di nkpa.

3.
N’oge ujo n’ahuhu-ha,

Mgb’anwanwa okwukwe-ha,

Wer’amara-I nke natute

Obi nke Kraist nwururu,

Mo nk'amara,

Bur'Onye-ndu ha mgbe dum.

4.
Nim’onu n’etiti ndi’eyi,

N’ogu megide nd’iro,

Ka ngozi-Gi noyere ha,

K’iru-Gi nye iz’ike,

Chuku d'ike:

Nna, n’Okpara, na Mo Nso. Amen.

youtube_options.title: Ayi bu ndi ije n’uwa nke a​⁠ of Aba central district. Choir@chigozirimebere325

title: NDI-IJE
first_line: Ezi'O'nye-nche ndi-Gi, nuru;  Gosi iru-I ugbu a;  I nyere ulo-ekpere:  Nye ayi obi nekpe.
subtitle: N'ebe nile, o bula' ébe  M’neme ka éheta aham, n’ebe ahu ka M'gabiakube gi, gozi kwa gi.
english_hint: Opupu 20. 24. Great Shepherd of Thy people, hear.
lyrics:
1.
Ezi'O'nye-nche ndi-Gi, nuru;

Gosi iru-I ugbu a;

I nyere ulo-ekpere:

Nye ayi obi nekpe.

2.
Nim’ulo nka k’ihu-n’anya

N'olil’anya nebi;

Nye ako-n’uche iz'ike,

Gw’onya nkpur'obi-ayi.

3.
K'ayi wer'okwukwe nar’okwu-I,

Nekpe nim'okwukwe;

We buru nkpa nile togbo

N’iru Gi, Onyé-nw’ayi,

4.
Nye nti nanu, n'anya nahu,

N'obi ume-ala;

Si n’elu musa ihé-Gi,

K’ayi nbeto n’amara. Amen.

title: IDO ULO NSO
first_line: Kraist bu Nto-ala di ike,  Kraist, Isi Nkume-nkuku  Nke Chineke roputara,  Nejiko Nzuko n’otu:  Iye’aka Zaion mgbe nile,  Na ntukwasi-obi-ya.
subtitle: O digh onye o bula puru ito nto-ala ozo ma-obugh Nke atoworo, Nke bu Jisus Kraist.
english_hint: 1 Ndi Korint 3. ll. Christ is made the sure foundation
lyrics:
1.
Kraist bu Nto-ala di ike,

Kraist, Isi Nkume-nkuku

Nke Chineke roputara,

Nejiko Nzuko n’otu:

Iye’aka Zaion mgbe nile,

Na ntukwasi-obi-ya.

2.
N'ulo nka eb'ayi nakpo Gi,

Chuku, bia n'ubochi ta;

Were kwa obi-oma-Gi

Nuru ariri ondi nke-I;

Wusa ngozi-Gi zur’oké

Nim'aja-ya mgbe nile.

3.
N’ebe a nye ndi-oru-Gi dum

Aririo nke ha nario,

Ka ha soro ndi-ngozi-Gi

Jid’ihe ha riotara;

So kwa Gi nime otuto,

Bur'eze mgb’ebigh-ebi.

4.
Otuto, nsopuru nile

Diri Chineke, bu Nna,

Di-kwa-r’Okpara na Mo Nso.

Ato nim’Otu mgbe dum,

Onye d’ike nim’otuto

Rue n’uwa ebigh-ebi! Amen.

title: ABU NTA DI ICHE ICHE
first_line: Jisus, noyer’ayi n’oriri;  K’ekele Gi n’ebe nile;  Gozie ih’oriri-ayi nka;  Kwe k’ayi na Gi riko n’igwé. Amen.
subtitle: Be present at our table, Lord.

title: ABU NTA DI ICHE ICHE
first_line: Onye-nw'ayi, ayi nekele Gi  N’ihi nri nka n’ih’oma dum;  Biko, nazu nkpur’obi-ayi,  Zidatar’ayi Nri nenye ndu. Amen.
subtitle: We thank Thee Lord, for this! our food.
lyrics:
1.
Onye-nw'ayi, ayi nekele Gi

N’ihi nri nka n’ih’oma dum;

Biko, nazu nkpur’obi-ayi,

Zidatar’ayi Nri nenye ndu. Amen.

first_line: Onye-nwem, nedum n'ezi-omume-I,  K’uzo-Gi di lari n’irum;  N’ihi na nani Gi, Onye-nwem,  Neme ka m’biri na ntukwus'obi. Amen.
subtitle: Lead me, Lord, lead me in Thy righteousness
lyrics:
1.
Onye-nwem, nedum n'ezi-omume-I,

K’uzo-Gi di lari n’irum;

N’ihi na nani Gi, Onye-nwem,

Neme ka m’biri na ntukwus'obi. Amen.

first_line: Onye-nw’ayi no n’ulo uku Ya di'nso;  Onye-nw’ayi no n’u1o uku Ya di nso;  Dere du n’iru Ya, gi uwa nile;  Dere du n’iru Xa, gi uwa nile. Amen.
subtitle: The Lord is in His holy temple.

first_line: Chineke bu Mo: ndi nekpere Ya  Nime Mo n'ezi'okwu gekpere Ya.  Gi, Onye nebi n’ebe kasi nso.  Biakute ayi mgbe ayi nabiakute I. Amen.
subtitle: God is a spirit
lyrics:
1.
Chineke bu Mo: ndi nekpere Ya

Nime Mo n'ezi'okwu gekpere Ya.

Gi, Onye nebi n’ebe kasi nso.

Biakute ayi mgbe ayi nabiakute I. Amen.

first_line: K’ebere-Gi, Nna, noyer'ayi  Mgb’ayi napu n'ulo nso nka;  Cheb’ayi pua n’ih’ojo nile.  K’ayi nagb'oso ndu nk'igwe;  Haleluya!  Haleluya!  Rue mgb’ayi gabu iru-Gi. Amen.
subtitle: Let Thy mercy, O Lord
lyrics:
1.
K’ebere-Gi, Nna, noyer'ayi

Mgb’ayi napu n'ulo nso nka;

Cheb’ayi pua n’ih’ojo nile.

K’ayi nagb'oso ndu nk'igwe;

Haleluya!

Haleluya!

Rue mgb’ayi gabu iru-Gi. Amen.

first_line: Chineke, Onye mara nkp'ayi,  Chebe ayi n’ura, gozie ayi;  Gbaghara nmehie-ayi nile,  Debe ndi-oru-I n’udo-Gi.  N’ihi olu nile nke ta,  Ayi ekele I, nel'any’echi;  Kraist, ziter’ayi ihu-n’anya-I,  K'ayi nile nye Gi otuto. Amen.
subtitle: Great God, Who know man need.
lyrics:
1.
Chineke, Onye mara nkp'ayi,

Chebe ayi n’ura, gozie ayi;

Gbaghara nmehie-ayi nile,

Debe ndi-oru-I n’udo-Gi.

N’ihi olu nile nke ta,

Ayi ekele I, nel'any’echi;

Kraist, ziter’ayi ihu-n’anya-I,

K'ayi nile nye Gi otuto. Amen.

first_line: Ayi nario Gi, Nna nk'ebere,  K’I nye ndi kwere na Gi  Ngbaghara nmehie-ha, n’udo,  K’ewe sachapu njo-ha.  Otu a ka ha gewere kwa  Uche di ezi nwayo  Nejere I ozi, site na  Jisus Kraist, bu Onye-nw’ayi. Amen.
subtitle: Grant, we beseech Thee, merciful Lord.
lyrics:
1.
Ayi nario Gi, Nna nk'ebere,

K’I nye ndi kwere na Gi

Ngbaghara nmehie-ha, n’udo,

K’ewe sachapu njo-ha.

Otu a ka ha gewere kwa

Uche di ezi nwayo

Nejere I ozi, site na

Jisus Kraist, bu Onye-nw’ayi. Amen.

first_line: Nna, ayi rara onw’ayi  Nye n’aka-Gi; biko,  Noyer’ayi, cheb’ayi, me k’ayi no  N’udo rue ututu. Amen.
subtitle: Now, Father, we commend.
lyrics:
1.
Nna, ayi rara onw’ayi

Nye n’aka-Gi; biko,

Noyer’ayi, cheb’ayi, me k’ayi no

N’udo rue ututu. Amen.

title: NKE NKE-IGBO CHEPUTARA CHINEKE NNA
first_line: Baba, baba,					lhe'oma,  Nne, nne, nne, nne, 			ih'oma,  Ge kwa nti ka m'gwa gi,			ih'oma,  Ihe mere n’uwa,					na mgb'ochie,  Di kw’iju-anya,					ih'oma.
subtitle: Agakpo kwa aha-ya, Onye-ebube, Onye-ndum-odu Chineke Nke bu Dike
english_hint: Aisaia 9. 6.
lyrics:
1.
Baba, baba,					lhe'oma,

Nne, nne, nne, nne, 			ih'oma,

Ge kwa nti ka m'gwa gi,			ih'oma,

Ihe mere n’uwa,					na mgb'ochie,

Di kw’iju-anya,					ih'oma.

2.
Ndi-nch'aturu,			ih'oma,

No n’ozara,					ih'oma,

N'abali ahu,				ih'oma,

Ha we le anya,				hu ihe,

M’ozi ridata,				ih'oma,

3.
O we si ha,				ih'oma,

Atul’egwu,					ih'oma,

Enwerem ozi,				ih'oma,

Ozi ahu bu,					ozi'oma,

N'amur’Eze-ayi				ih'oma.

title: ABU NKE NDI-IGBO CHEPUTARA ONWU JISUS.
first_line: Jisus biara ka O gbaput’ayi;  Ufodu madu we kpo Y’asi,  Nihi na O neme ez’ihe;  Ha we kwugbue Ya n'el'osisi.
subtitle: Ya onwe-ya bu onye amapuworo site na. njehie nile nke ayi, onye azopiaworo site n’ajo omume nile, nke ayi.
english_hint: Aisaia 53. 5.
lyrics:
1.
Jisus biara ka O gbaput’ayi;

Ufodu madu we kpo Y’asi,

Nihi na O neme ez’ihe;

Ha we kwugbue Ya n'el'osisi.

2.
Onu apugh ikwu ahuhu

Na ihe-nwuta di ich’iche

Nke Kraist Onye-nw'ayi nagidere,

K’O we topum n’agbu Ekwensu.

3.
Le Jisus k’O no n'el'osisi!

Ihe-ihere di ich’iche

Nke ndi ajo madu mere Ya;

Onye-nw’ayi nwere ntachi-obi.

4.
Le apa-ntu anya n'aka-Ya,

N’ube ha mara Ya n'akuku!

Ha nyere Ya manya gbar'uka:

Jisus nagidere ihe dum.

5.
Jisus rioro Chuku aririo

K’O gbaghara ndi kpogburu Ya,

Ebe h’amagh ihe ha neme.

I huwo ihu-n’anya Jisus? Amen.

title: ABU NKE NDI-IGBO CHEPUTARA AKWUKWO NSO.
first_line: Nna, meghe obi-ayi  Inu okwu nke-Gi;  Ka site n’ime ya  Ayi we bur-umu-Gi.
subtitle: Kpughepu anyam abua, ka m'we legide Oke di ichie iche si n’iwu-Gi puta.
english_hint: Abu Oma 119. 18.
lyrics:
1.
Nna, meghe obi-ayi

Inu okwu nke-Gi;

Ka site n’ime ya

Ayi we bur-umu-Gi.

2.
Wepu adigh-ike

Nke netufu okwu-I;

Tiye Mo Nso nke-Gi

Nim’obi-ayi nile.

3.
Me k’ayi debe okwu

Nke ayi ganu ugbu a;

Chup’ajo ony’ahu

Nke narafu ndi-Gi.

4.
Zitere ayi Mo Nso,

K'O nezi  ayi kari

Ime uche nke-Gi

N’ikwere Ozi’oma. Amen.

title: ABU NKE NDI-IGBO CHEPUTARA OKWUKWE.
first_line: Chineke nke ebere,  Nuru olu umu-Gi;  Ka iru-Gi mukwasi  Obi nke ndi-Gi nile.
subtitle: Onwegi, Jehova, egbochilaram obi-ebere-Gigi: Ka ebere-Gi na ezi-okwu-Gi nechezim mgbe nile.
english_hint: Abu Oma 40. 11.
lyrics:
1.
Chineke nke ebere,

Nuru olu umu-Gi;

Ka iru-Gi mukwasi

Obi nke ndi-Gi nile.

2.
Biko, me k’ayi necheta

Na Kraist biara n’ihi ayi,

K’O we sachapu njo-ayi,

K’ayi na Gi we di n’udo.

3.
Zitere ayi Mo Nso-Gi,

Ime k’obi’ayi di oku,

K’ayi we necheta mgbe dum

Ihu-n’anya uku-Gi.

4.
Mgbe obi-ayi gakpafu

N’uzo nk’ezi-omume,

Biko, were amara-I

Nedughachi ayi n’udo. Amen.

title: NKE NDI-IGBO CHEPUTARA OZI OMA
first_line: Umu-nnam, unu bia ge nti  N’ozi-oma, ozi Chuku,  Nke ayi nile zukoro ta  Ikwusa ya n’akuku dum.
subtitle: N'ihi na, ihu-n’anya Kraist nerugide ayi.
english_hint: 2 Ndi Korint 5. 14.
lyrics:
1.
Umu-nnam, unu bia ge nti

N’ozi-oma, ozi Chuku,

Nke ayi nile zukoro ta

Ikwusa ya n’akuku dum.

2.
Ndinyom, unu  nile bia kwa,

Ozi ahu di-kwa-r’unu;

O digh onye gagonari

Ez'ihu-n’anya nke Chuku.

3.
Umu-nta, ndi obi-oma,

Jisus nwer’ozi nye unu:

Nwat’O bula nwer’olu-ya,

Olu ihu-n’anya nke-ya.

4.
Ozi nka bu IHU-N’ANYA,

Nke Jisus ji nario ayi dum.

Gini! ka unu nechére?

Jisus nacho izop’unu. Amen.

title: ABU NKE NDI-IGBO CHEPUTARA OZI OMA.
first_line: N’ihi na Chuku hur’uwa n’anya,  K’O ji we nye Otu Okpara-Ya  Nke O mutara, n’ihi ayi nile;  K’onye O bula nke kwere na Ya  We ghara ila n’iyi, kama ya  K’onye ahu nwe ndu ebigh-ebi.
subtitle: N’ihi na Chineke huru uwa n’anya otu a, na O nyere obuna Okpara O muru nani Ya, ka onye o bula nke kwere na Ya. . . nwe ndu ebigh-ebi.
lyrics:
1.
N’ihi na Chuku hur’uwa n’anya,

K’O ji we nye Otu Okpara-Ya

Nke O mutara, n’ihi ayi nile;

K’onye O bula nke kwere na Ya

We ghara ila n’iyi, kama ya

K’onye ahu nwe ndu ebigh-ebi.

2.
Chineke bu uzo hu ayi n'anya;

O bugh ayi huru Chineke n’anya,

Ma Ya onwe-ya huru ayi n'anya,

Zie Okpara-Ya k'O buru aja

Ijuru Ya obi n’ihi njo-ayi,

Na n’ihi nmehie nke uwa nile. Amen.

3.
Nime ugbo-miri, nedugicle ayi,

Tinyua ebili dum di na miri;

Mechie onu ajo anu di na ya:

Gi Gnye mere k’ebili dajua.

4.
N'ebe o bula ayi no, nechebe ayi:

Onye gazoput'ayi m'obugh nani I?

Gi bu Onye-iye'aka nke umu-Gi:

Biko, nodebe umu-Gi n'udo. Amen.

title: ABU NKE NDI-IGBO CHEPUTARA UMU-NTAKIRI.
first_line: Nnam, nuru- ekperem  Tutu m’zuru ike;  O bum, nwa nta nke-Gi,  Biko, nyem-ngozi nke-I.
lyrics:
1.
Nnam, nuru- ekperem

Tutu m’zuru ike;

O bum, nwa nta nke-Gi,

Biko, nyem-ngozi nke-I.

2.
Gbaghara njom nile,

Kwe ka m’raru ura

N’udo n’abali nka,

We rue mgbe chi gabo.

3.
Yerem aka mgbe dum

Ka m’nahu Gi n'anya,

Ka m’neme kwa uche-I

Kari ka m’si eme.

4.
Nnam, lekwasim anya.

Tutu m’zuru ike;

Obum, nwa-nta nke-Gi,

Biko, nyem ngozi nke-I. Amen.

title: ABU NKE NDI-IGBO CHEPATARA NDI-ORIA.
first_line: Kraist, Onye neyer’ayi aka  Ichoput’otutu ihe  Iji me ka ndu-ayi di nma:  Na nti n’olu ekpere-ayi;
subtitle: Onye nagwo oria-gi nile; Onye nagbaputa, ndu-gi. n'aka nbibi.
english_hint: Abu Oma 103. 3, 4.
lyrics:
1.
Kraist, Onye neyer’ayi aka

Ichoput’otutu ihe

Iji me ka ndu-ayi di nma:

Na nti n’olu ekpere-ayi;

2.
Mgbe I no nime uwa nka,

I nyere ndu n’aru-ike:

Ndi kpuru isi nah’uzo,

Ndi-ngwuro nag’ije  nk'oma.

3.
Biko, nye ndi-dibia ike,
  
Ka ha we nagwo nriria dum,

Ka umu-Gi we no n’onu,

Ha we nenye Gi otuto.

4.
Ma mgbe ha nad’ike n’aru,

Biko, ka mo-ha di kw’ike;

Ha we buru ndi zur’oké,

We lakute I mgbe ndu gagwu.

5.
Kasie nd’oria nile obi

Mgbe olil’anya gwusiri;

Nye ha okwukwe sir’ike

Mgbe ike ndu nka gwuru ha. Amen.

title: ABU NKE NDI-IGBO CHEPUTARA NDI-IJE
first_line: Tutu ayi ejikere ije nke-ayi,  Ayi mara na Gi b’Onye gedu ayi;  N’oge ayi garapu, biko, duru ayi:  Nani Gi k’ayi natukwasi obi.
subtitle: N’ihi na ndi-mio-ozi-Ya ka O genye iwu bayere gi Idebe gi n'uzo-gi rule.
english_hint: Abu Oma 91. 11.
lyrics:
1.
Tutu ayi ejikere ije nke-ayi,

Ayi mara na Gi b’Onye gedu ayi;

N’oge ayi garapu, biko, duru ayi:

Nani Gi k’ayi natukwasi obi.

2.
O buru n’ayi ewere ukwu neje,

Biko, chupur’ayi ndi ajo madu;

Ekwela k'ajo anu zu ayi n’uzo:

Ayi mario Gi k’I nuru olu-ayi.

3.
O buru n’ayi ewere motor neje,

Biko, bur’Onye gedu ayi n’uzo;

Ekwela Ekwensu meru ayi aru:

Noyere onye nke nanya motor.

4.
Nime ugbo-miri, nedugicle ayi,

Tinyua ebili dum di na miri;

Mechie onu ajo anu di na ya:

Gi Gnye mere k’ebili dajua.

5.
N'ebe o bula ayi no, nechebe ayi:

Onye gazoput'ayi m'obugh nani I?

Gi bu Onye-iye'aka nke umu-Gi:

Biko, nodebe umu-Gi n'udo. Amen.
